
Chapter 51 Oh no, the first-class merit awards are being distributed in bulk!


The silent edge of the cliff.

Xiao Bo stared in astonishment at the scene before him.

He saw Gao Xiaolong, this high-ranking leader, standing before Jiang Tian, ​​even saluting him with great formality.

"You're a high-ranking leader! How can you do this?"

Xiao Bo's eyes were bloodshot.

"Commander, I didn't expect such a coincidence. I just came here to try my luck, and who knew I'd actually run into this," Jiang Tian said with a smile.

"This drug dealer's skills are far beyond what three or five people could handle, especially considering he had dangerous weapons. Furthermore, with hostages at his disposal, you not only successfully dealt with the drug dealer but also rescued the hostages unharmed. Your contribution is undeniable," Gao Xiaolong said solemnly.

Seven armed police officers! Seven armed police officers sacrificed their lives.

And even with hostages at his disposal, Jiang Tian easily defeated him.

Thinking of this, Gao Xiaolong re-evaluated Jiang Tian seriously.

This strength far exceeded his expectations, especially considering he was a highly skilled Krav Maga master.

"Sir, the drug dealer is dead. According to our examination, the death was caused by external injuries, including a shattered left temple and a large fractured sternum."

Just then, the forensic doctor stepped forward and spoke.

"He's dead already?" Mu Ya was the most shocked.

Because she had watched Jiang Tian throw just one punch and kick.

Two moves, and he was done for?

Mu Ya gasped.

"This is the hostage, right?" Gao Xiaolong turned his head with a smile.

He had been so focused on Jiang Tian that he had forgotten about the hostage.

But when he squinted and clearly saw the hostage, his brow twitched involuntarily.

He looked at her again, uncertainly.

Hiss!

Gao Xiaolong finally believed it.

Beside Gao Xiaolong, Director Shen, wearing a white shirt, was completely stunned when he turned to look at Mu Ya.

"Xiao Ya, what are you doing here?" Director Shen exclaimed.

"Uncle Shen."

Mu Ya waved and smiled.

"Was that hostage?" Director Shen gasped.

"Yes, Uncle Shen, that kidnapper held me hostage to cook for him." Mu Ya recounted the situation that had just occurred with Jiang Tian.

Buzz!!!

Director Shen stared at Jiang Tian in shock.

Good heavens.

Director Shen didn't know how to admire Jiang Tian's luck.

Who is Mu Ya?

She's the granddaughter of a big shot in the province!

Especially the situation Mu Ya just described, even Director Shen broke out in a cold sweat.

Stepping forward, risking her life to save the people.

And if the person they saved was the granddaughter of a powerful figure,

then she could grow up to serve the people better.

Shen Ting frantically comforted himself internally. To be honest, even Shen Ting was stunned by this incredible luck.

"Uncle Gao," Mu Ya greeted Gao Xiaolong again.

Her demeanor was neither humble nor arrogant, her manner appropriate, and her distance perfectly controlled.

Jiang Tian couldn't help but click his tongue in amazement.

To be honest, even in his previous life, he only knew that Mu Ya's family background was that of an incredibly powerful figure's daughter.

Otherwise, Xiao Bo wouldn't have been so desperate to curry favor with her.

Jiang Tian had initially set his sights high, but now it seemed insufficient, far from enough.

“Xiaoya, what are you doing here so late at night? It's dangerous for a young lady like you to be here alone,” Shen Ting asked, his face full of astonishment.

“I…I came camping. I'm sorry, Uncle Shen, for causing you trouble,” Mu Ya apologized, her head bowed.

“However, thankfully Officer Jiang stepped in and saved me, otherwise, I might…” At this point, Mu Ya looked at Jiang Tian, ​​her beautiful eyes shining brightly.

The moment Jiang Tian stepped forward and took action against the robber,

it was as if a ray of light had flooded her heart.

But this scene,

pierced Xiao Bo's heart.

Xiao Bo stared at this scene with bloodshot eyes.

At this moment, he felt like a clown.

The whole world seemed to have forgotten him, or rather, hadn't even seen him.

Jiang Tian stood at the center of the crowd, basking in everyone's compliments and praise, radiating brilliance.

Meanwhile, he stood in a dark corner.

Of course, what pierced him most deeply was the way Mu Ya looked at Jiang Tian.

"You deserve to die, Jiang Tian, ​​you really deserve to die."

Xiao Bo's anger erupted. Although no one cared what he said, Jiang Tian's indifference only deepened Xiao Bo's already low self-esteem.

What pained him most was the way Mu Ya looked at Jiang Tian.

That dazzling light.

It was as if it were filled with love.

It should have been his.

Mu Ya was his.

But Jiang Tian had destroyed it all.

Rescuing Mu Ya, marrying a beautiful and wealthy woman, reaching the pinnacle of life—Xiao Bo's plan was perfect, but reality slapped him hard in the face.

Especially the next moment.

"Jiang Tian, ​​on behalf of the Yunhai Public Security Bureau and the Kyoto Public Security Bureau, I hereby formally commend you. Furthermore, I will report your achievements and apply for a First-Class Merit for you." Gao Xiaolong's voice followed immediately.

Buzz!

Xiao Bo's eyes turned red.

A First-Class Merit, another First-Class Merit.

There's something fishy going on.

There must be something fishy going on.

Otherwise, why would Jiang Tian so easily obtain a First-Class Merit?

He just received one not long ago! Xiao Bo recalled how Gao Xiaolong had presented him with the First-Class Merit medal when he was humiliated the day before yesterday, and now, he was even applying for one.

Everyone says First-Class Merits are easy to obtain.

Why is Jiang Tian able to receive one First-Class Merit after another while standing up?

It's outrageous.

However, Xiao Bo didn't know that besides these two, Jiang Tian had also received the title of Anti-Drug Vanguard.

Not only that, Jiang Tian also has a First-Class Merit Medal in the application process.

Including this,

a simple calculation shows that Jiang Tian already has two First-Class Merits on the way, and one already in hand.

Xiao Bo's mentality exploded: "Right, Ya'er isn't that vulgar. So what if it was a hero saving a damsel in distress? Mu Ya must like me. Mu Ya is a good girl, how could she possibly be interested in a piece of trash like you?"

Thinking of this, hope rekindled in Xiao Bo's heart.

Meanwhile, beside the drug dealer's corpse.

Bai Qiu squatted, his gaze solemnly fixed on the body on the ground.

Previously, Bai Qiu had witnessed the deaths of seven armed police officers he had killed—undoubtedly fatal with a single blow. He was a terrifying figure.

But this same man, at this moment, was in a truly gruesome state.

His skull and chest were caved in, a horrifying sight, his death appearing utterly gruesome.

"One blow, one kill." Bai Qiu gasped, his pupils contracting rapidly.

"Was this done by that Comrade Jiang?"

Bai Qiu turned his gaze to Jiang Tian, ​​who stood there.

Bai Qiu truly needed to reassess Jiang Tian's skills. Then, Bai Qiu thought of the drug trafficking case he was investigating, and his heart pounded.

If Jiang Tian had helped...



Chapter 52 Breakthrough Progress: Starting Today, I'll Be a Police God


To be honest, these past few days have felt like a dream to Jiang Tian.

In less than three days...

Jiang Tian realized that he seemed to have truly altered the course of history.

When Xiao Bo approached, ready to offer to take Mu Ya home,

before he even reached her, he heard Mu Ya's voice: "Officer Jiang, could you please take me home?"

Jiang Tian, ​​who was discussing the case with Gao Xiaolong and needed to return to the city bureau for a detailed report, looked hesitant upon hearing this.

"Uncle Gao, Officer Jiang saved me today. I encountered such great danger, and I'm a little scared without you. You wouldn't be so heartless, would you?" Mu Ya asked Gao Xiaolong playfully.

Gao Xiaolong immediately understood and a smile spread across his face: "How could that be? How could your Uncle Gao be an unapproachable person? Alright, Xiao Jiang, stop pretending. You're getting the night off. You don't need to come back after a busy day. Just come to the provincial department tomorrow for a detailed mission report. Your task today is to escort Xiao Ya home safely."

"Yes!"

Jiang Tian nodded, overjoyed.

Because Jiang Tian truly hadn't expected Mu Ya to protect him so much.

No, or rather, Mu Ya was too perfect. She truly embodied the virtue of following her husband after marriage, never contradicting him in public.

Moreover, no matter the situation, she would always protect and side with her man.

What man wouldn't want a woman who protects him like that?

Jiang Tian was no exception.

"Officer Jiang, thank you for your trouble," Mu Ya said, her eyes crinkling into crescent moons with an invitation.

Amidst envious glances, Jiang Tian reluctantly followed Mu Ya. He clicked his tongue in amazement; in his past life, he had never imagined being the center of attention. From this day forward, Jiang Tian could proudly proclaim himself a police god.

Especially after passing Xiao Bo and seeing his bloodshot eyes, Jiang Tian stopped, puffed out his chest, and, out of Mu Ya's sight, leaned closer, speaking in a voice only the two of them could hear: "I must say, Ya'er, you're quite voluptuous."

Jiang Tian gave a disdainful smile.

Thinking of his past life's foolishness, Jiang Tian truly wanted to slap himself. He remembered being beaten to death with a stick by the bastard son he had raised for over ten years, and before losing consciousness, Xiao Bo, embracing Wang Yifei, looking down at him with a mocking expression.

Jiang Tian wanted to destroy his spirit.

But wait, this was just the beginning. Jiang Tian followed Mu Ya without looking to the side, strolling leisurely.

In his past life, Xiao Bo had been cuckolded for over a decade by the son he raised, and ultimately, that bastard son killed him with a single blow.

A transfer order sent him straight out of the system.

In this life, Jiang Tian would exact revenge tenfold, a hundredfold.

Mu Ya was just the beginning.

BOOM!!!

The sky collapsed!!!

Murder.

Murder!

Xiao Bo's head exploded.

His eyes were bloodshot as he watched Jiang Tian leave.

But now, neither of them was to be seen.

What truly devastated Xiao Bo was that Mu Ya hadn't even glanced at him once.

"Thank you for taking me home, Officer Jiang," Mu Ya's voice was filled with a tingling, seductive quality.

Seeing Mu Ya's lively and carefree personality, which seemed to be contagious, Jiang Tian couldn't help but smile and jokingly asked, "Really? Just one thank you?"

Under the bright moonlight, Mu Ya's bright eyes stared intently at Jiang Tian.

On the wide mountain path, the two stopped. Mu Ya looked at him for a moment, then suddenly moved closer. Jiang Tian's heart leaped with joy, inhaling the fragrance emanating from her.

Could it be...?

Hiss!

Jiang Tian waited expectantly for a moment, only to find that Mu Ya had simply passed him by.

"Hahaha, just kidding, Officer Jiang." Mu Ya's eyes crinkled into crescent moons with laughter.

Jiang Tian's lips twitched. He knew it. Xiao Bo had pursued him for so long without even holding his hand. In his previous life, Jiang Tian had a clear understanding of Mu Ya's conservative nature, so he wasn't too disappointed, just a little regretful.

But the next moment...

Jiang Tian felt a warm sensation on his face.

Looking again, Jiang Tian saw Mu Ya skipping and hopping down the mountain path, her hands behind her back.

"Goodness!" Jiang Tian raised an eyebrow, touched his face, and felt a surge of relief, a burning sense of pride returning.

"Great!" Jiang Tian smiled, watching her retreating figure, his gaze gradually settling. Actually, he had only been testing the waters, seeing how open Mu Ya was to him, and whether she had truly given up on Xiao Bo.

Now, Jiang Tian was certain.

"What are you standing there for, you idiot?" Mu Ya turned and joked at Jiang Tian.

But Jiang Tian clearly caught Mu Ya's flushed cheeks, and couldn't help but admire the power of the "hero saves the damsel in distress" tactic. The method might be old, but its effectiveness made it a classic!

However, Jiang Tian didn't see it at that moment.

When Mu Ya turned back, the slight blush had disappeared. She touched her lips, her eyes clear and bright.

Even the most meticulous plans can have flaws.

Jiang Tian overlooked Mu Ya's intelligence.

When Jiang Tian caught up, the bouncy Mu Ya suddenly turned to him and said, "Officer Jiang, you brought those photos on purpose, didn't you?"

Huh?

Jiang Tian was stunned, a sudden shock washing over him.

He'd become arrogant.

Jiang Tian admitted he'd become arrogant. After his rebirth, he started strong, achieving numerous victories and accumulating remarkable achievements. Undeniably, Jiang Tian had unconsciously become arrogant and looked down on everyone.

Even if Jiang Tian didn't want to admit it, his face darkened. He had underestimated Mu Ya.

That's true.

Jiang Tian thought of the Mu Ya he remembered; she was so incredibly intelligent.

Even though she was young now, born into that kind of family, she couldn't possibly be a clueless pretty face.

And the reason Xiao Bo never succeeded was probably because Mu Ya knew his true colors from the beginning, or rather, she saw through some of them.

Jiang Tian smiled bitterly, realizing he had underestimated her: "I'm sorry."

"Although I knew you prepared the photos beforehand and managed to find me by chance, even if you wanted to use me as a tool to get revenge on Xiao Bo, I'd accept it, because you saved me from the drug dealers today."

When Mu Ya smiled, her bright eyes turned into crescent moons, full of captivating charm, and irresistibly endearing.

Boom!!

And at this moment.

The question that had puzzled Jiang Tian for so long finally became completely clear.

Looking into Mu Ya's eyes, Jiang Tian finally understood why Xiao Bo had been able to win her over in his past life: it was because of this operation.

Based on Jiang Tian's observations, he was certain that before this incident, Mu Ya hadn't harbored much affection for Xiao Bo. Given her intelligence, she had even seen through his hidden true nature.

Therefore, from beginning to end, she had never considered developing a deep relationship with Xiao Bo.

But during this incident, when Mu Ya was at her most fearful and her psychological defenses crumbled, Xiao Bo seized the opportunity and rescued her from the drug dealers.

This allowed Mu Ya to ignore some of Xiao Bo's true nature, even though she knew a great deal.

Jiang Tian was startled.

Thank goodness.

Almost.

A step later. If, after this incident, Jiang Tian was certain that even if Xiao Bo was a heinous criminal, he wouldn't be able to change Mu Ya's heart.

However, when that man became him, Jiang Tian couldn't help but feel a genuine sense of satisfaction.

Not only is she incredibly intelligent, but she's also deeply devoted to him, unwaveringly loyal.

She comes from a wealthy family, possesses a terrifyingly high IQ, yet fiercely protects the man who loves her.

Jiang Tian approached Mu Ya with a serious expression, forcing her to stand beside the car: "I swear, while I wanted to show you the photos, I never intended to use you as a tool to get revenge on Xiao Bo. If I'm lying, may I remain single forever and be childless."

Mu Ya stared intently at Jiang Tian, ​​then suddenly chuckled and changed the subject: "I drove here."

Mu Ya took out her BMW keys, waved them, and tossed them to Jiang Tian.

"It's good to be rich," Jiang Tian said enviously.

But thankfully, he'd soon be blessed by the God of Wealth.

He'd definitely get himself a BMW, Mercedes, or Rolls-Royce.

"If you like, I can give it to you," Mu Ya said with a smile.

Jiang Tian couldn't possibly agree, and drove Mu Ya home safely.

There wasn't much progress, because Jiang Tian knew when to stop; today had already seen a significant development.

Jiang Tian then hailed a taxi on the street and returned home.

"Yes, I just got home. Want to go to the business building tomorrow? Sure, we can go together after get off work at noon." Jiang Tian, ​​still seemingly in a dreamlike state, had just finished his phone call with Mu Ya.

Thinking of his past life's depravity, he stared at the familiar yet strange ceiling.

*Thud!*

Jiang Tian slapped himself; it hurt.

Only then could he feel that all of this was real, and that the hellish life of his past life would never repeat itself.

His father's tired yet excited expression, his mother's kind and gentle demeanor, his sister's lively and adorable nature, and, of course, the perfect woman from his past life—everything was so perfect. Fate had been completely rewritten!

However, lying in bed, Jiang Tian stared at the ceiling, feeling as if he had forgotten something.



Chapter 53 A Macho Man Carried on His Shoulder, I'm the Wildest in the Police Force


"Captain, Captain, we've come to Baidongshan and haven't found anything unusual. It seems like nobody's here."

"Captain, are you listening?"

"We still can't seem to contact Chief Song. The walkie-talkie hasn't been working for a while. Have you found anything on your end?"

"Sister Li, why can't we get through on the walkie-talkie? We can't reach Brother Jiang either?"

On the eastern slope, Zhao Wei held the walkie-talkie and looked at Li Zijing.

Li Zijing scratched her head: "Maybe we should just call and see what the captain has found. Also, has he changed the mission channel? After all, the robbers killed the armed police; they might have gotten the walkie-talkie."

That makes sense.

As the morning sun shone into Jiang Tian's simple room.

In this tranquility...

Bang bang bang!!!

A series of urgent knocks sounded on the door.

Accompanied by a noisy commotion.

Jiang Tian opened his eyes and heard a voice outside the door: "Jiang Peng, what's wrong? Xiao Jiang works overtime every day, exhausted, and finally gets a good night's sleep. It's not even time for work yet, why are you knocking?"

"It's urgent," Jiang Peng's anxious voice rang out.

Jiang Tian instantly opened his eyes.

He jumped out of bed, opened the door, and looked at Jiang Peng, saying, "Dad, what is it?"

As he spoke, his sister's room door opened as well. Jiang Xiaoyu, wearing cute pajamas, was rubbing her eyes sleepily, looking adorably dazed.

This was a scene Jiang Tian had dreamed of countless times in his past life. However, since his parents passed away one after another in his previous life, Xiaoyu had matured a lot, and then was kicked out of the house by Wang Yifei, ultimately leading to an accident involving her.

Since then, Jiang Tian had lived in pain and self-blame.

Now everything had been rewritten by him. That bitch Wang Yifei was no longer related to him.

"Wei Youdao is in trouble."

Huh?

Jiang Tian's gaze darkened.

In his past life, after his family's misfortune, Jiang Tian fell into poverty, barely able to support himself, let alone his family.

Naturally, he had no interest in dealing with Wei Youdao's case.

"Something's not right."

Jiang Tian's expression shifted slightly. He thought back to his past life; he was certain he had concealed the truth about Wei Youdao's situation.

Because subsequently, no one from the Municipal Public Security Bureau participated in the investigation of Wei Youdao's case. At that time, Wang Yifei was still standing up for Xiao Bo and didn't participate in the case's progress.

That was five years later. Xiao Bo was now the head of the Narcotics Control Team in Yunhai City.

The person leading the investigation was the head of the Provincial Narcotics Control Department, but not Bai Qiu. In his past life, Bai Qiu had already sacrificed himself in a mission five years later, but in this investigation, the head of the Narcotics Control Department died of a sudden heart attack.

The case was completely blown up, and that was all Jiang Tian knew. He was too preoccupied with extortion by Wang Yifei's family to pay attention further.

However, this incident was somewhat distant, and Jiang Tian hadn't received any information about Wei Youdao's death, so he overlooked these issues.

"I'll explain the details on the way," Jiang Peng said seriously.

Jiang Tian put on his leather jacket; leather jackets and jeans were a common sight in this era.

He wasn't wearing a police uniform either. In fact, aside from joint missions, most narcotics officers don't wear uniforms when operating alone.

Even when going to the police station, Jiang Tian almost always wears a leather jacket.

Many people might not wear it for months at a time.

"This gun is so hard to store," Jiang Tian said, looking at the gun and silver bracelet on his waist. He then turned and saw a pink dinosaur backpack, putting the pistol and silver bracelet inside.

"Brother, why are you carrying my backpack?" Jiang Xiaoyu asked sleepily, rubbing her eyes.

"Your backpack is so cute, I love this muscular pink."

Jiang Tian followed behind, and as they left, he could still hear his mother complaining, "I shouldn't have listened to your father. Ever since your brother joined the narcotics police, he's been so busy he's never home. If you ask me, it would be so much better if he just stayed at the finance bureau; he never works overtime."

"Mom, don't say that. Dad and my brother are both protecting the lives and property of the people. We can't be so selfish. I just admire my brother; he's so cool when he's at my school, dominating the battlefield." Jiang Xiaoyu mumbled while brushing her teeth.

"It's so dangerous, with gunfire everywhere," Jiang's mother worried even more.

But Jiang's mother didn't see the gleam in Jiang Xiaoyu's eyes as she washed up. Then she took out her phone and typed: "Xin'er, my brother likes muscular pink, the flashy kind. My brother's birthday is in a couple of days. Come with me to buy him a pink shirt; he'll definitely love it."

When Jiang Peng and Jiang Tian rushed to the city bureau, the entire narcotics squad was completely silent.

"The forensic doctor came. Around 2 AM, Wei Youdao and his secretary both committed suicide." Song Liguo's face was frighteningly grim.

"Did they confess anything?" Jiang Peng asked.

"Wei Youdao didn't, but his secretary was about to vomit. Who knew he'd be gone in the blink of an eye? Our staff on duty checked on them at 3 AM and they were perfectly fine." Song Liguo's face was grim.

How could it not be grim?

They could already imagine the expressions on Gao Xiaolong's or the provincial department's faces if they found out.

It was safe to say that Wei Youdao was a major case they were focusing on.

The drug manufacturing plant case was far too complex. Over the years, how much drug had been distributed? How much drug had been sold? The numbers were enormous and terrifying.

Following the trail would be a crucial breakthrough.

That's why Gao Xiaolong specifically applied for the honorary title of "Anti-Drug Vanguard" for Jiang Tian. Jiang Tian was essentially tearing a bloody hole in the impenetrable crime capital of Yunhai.

Once the trail was followed, the sinister side of Yunhai could be completely exposed, allowing for a radical cure.

But just as the cause of the illness was discovered, the man died.



Chapter 54 Sorry, but I'm also pretty awesome at criminal investigation.


"Investigate! Get the Criminal Investigation Division here. Investigate thoroughly. Also, go through everyone who entered the police station last night." Jiang Peng slammed his fist on the table, his face contorted with rage.

This was a blatant slap in the face.

A person died right there in their police station, with solid evidence, just waiting for more information to be gathered, and then...the person was dead.

Jiang Tian stood outside the small, dark interrogation room, looking at the body inside. A forensic doctor was investigating the cause of death.

"How did he die?" Jiang Tian was shocked. This was utterly audacious.

Murder in the small, dark room of their Narcotics Control Division—Jiang Tian couldn't even imagine it.

"According to the forensic doctor's preliminary diagnosis, it was likely death by poisoning," Captain Guo led Jiang Tian into the conference room.

His face was grim; how could he be in a good mood? This one case, if handled well, would be a major achievement, perhaps even a second-class merit.

Perhaps, if they could uncover the drug trafficking network behind Wei Youdao, a first-class merit might even be possible.

Now, it's all gone.

At this moment, the room is full of people.

And at the front of the conference room stands a woman with glasses and disheveled hair, giving the first impression of being unkempt.

But Jiang Tian doesn't dare underestimate this woman in the slightest.

If, in his transmigration and rebirth, Jiang Tian is a drug enforcement god, a perfect start.

Then this woman is the darling of the criminal investigation team. Jiang Tian's strongest memory of her is that she became famous for solving a major cold case.

Rumor has it she's a genius in the criminal investigation team, but although both work at the city bureau, Jiang Tian has rarely seen her; everyone calls her Miss Qiu.

In his previous life, he saw her photo in the party's newspaper. At that time, she had been specially recruited into the Fifth Bureau of headquarters, stayed there for a while, and led a team to investigate a cold case in Yunhai, but she also died unexpectedly.

In his previous life, Jiang Tian didn't think much of it.

But at this moment, Jiang Tian suddenly felt a chill.

He witnessed the arrogance and terror of the criminals.

You're safe as long as you don't touch the darkness, but the moment you do,

Jiang Tian's fists clenched involuntarily. He vaguely sensed that an unseen dark force seemed to shroud the entire Yunhai.

Bai Qiu, and the captain who replaced Bai Qiu, the bureau chief who succeeded his father, and so on...

Right, and Gao Xiaolong too. Was it really an accident?

But whoever it was, Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile. He really wanted to play along.

"Hello everyone, my name is Zhu Tianqiu. I just investigated the details of the two victims. Both died of poisoning, around 3 AM. However, according to the surveillance footage, no one was found to have entered the interrogation room at that time." Miss Qiu pointed to the deceased.

"What are your thoughts? How did the murderer get the poison in there?"

Ms. Qiu looked at the people in the conference room. At this moment, Jiang Peng, Sun Haibo, and the other members of the anti-drug squad remained silent.

Compared to criminal investigation professionals, their anti-drug squad lacked knowledge in this area of ​​crime-solving.

No one spoke. Ms. Qiu's gaze suddenly turned to Jiang Tian.

"Officer Jiang, you've uncovered Wei Youdao's crimes through subtle clues and located his criminal gang. You should have some understanding of investigative reasoning. Can you guess how the murderer committed the crime?"

How did they commit the crime?

How would I know?

Jiang Tian rolled his eyes.

But all eyes in the conference room were on him.

Sun Haibo chuckled and said, "Ms. Qiu, if you're going to use your hands, just ask Officer Jiang. There's no need to use your brain. Even if you gave Officer Jiang a few more brains, he probably still wouldn't be able to figure out the motive for the crime."

Upon hearing this,

the atmosphere instantly became awkward.

Jiang Tian's expression turned even colder.

Don't underestimate the destructive power and malicious nature of those words. Within this system, good news travels fast, bad news spreads even faster.

If Jiang Tian fails to answer today, it will leave an impression on everyone in the system.

He's someone who doesn't use his brain but is highly capable with his actions. And when it comes to future promotions, leaders certainly won't consider someone without brains.

In other words, one sentence can negate all his achievements.

But Jiang Tian showed no anger; he even felt a little amused.

Because Sun Haibo was practically handing him a chance to show off and be humiliated!

"System, add points."

Jiang Tian directly opened his panel. Last time, through an upgrade, he spent 10,000 sin points to upgrade his stamina to red. Theoretically, if he could replenish his energy, Jiang Tian would have limitless strength.

Jiang Tian originally had 8300 sin points, but after capturing the notorious criminal Zhou Zicheng, he gained another 1900 sin points, bringing his total to over 10,000.

[Spotless (Gold)]

[Scanning Radar (Gold)]

[Martial Arts Master (Red)]

[Endless Stamina (Red)]

[Agile Detective (White)]

...Sin Points 10200

"Upgrade." Jiang Tian directly upgraded his Agile Detective skill, deducting 100 sin points.

[Agile Detective (White) - Criminal Investigation Expert (Green)] (You are now capable of leading a criminal investigation team to solve cases of moderate difficulty.)

Not enough.

Jiang Tian knew that the murder of Wei Youdao, the hidden forces behind Yunhai, and other powerful entities all required investigative reasoning and logic.

Continuing to upgrade, Jiang Tian watched as 1000 sin points were deducted.

[Detective Expert (Green) - Detective Genius (Blue)] (You have already achieved initial fame and are able to solve most slightly complex cases.)

.....Sin Value: 9100

Jiang Tian squinted, then looked at Zhu Tianqiu on the podium. Based on Jiang Tian's calculations, Zhu Tianqiu was likely at this level—a detective genius.

Combined with Jiang Tian's acquired hidden green-level memory transcendence, he carefully reviewed the cases and indeed found many things he had overlooked. Furthermore, the logic of criminal investigation appeared in his mind almost without thinking.

Sun Haibo smiled but continued to belittle him in a joking tone: "If you can't answer, then sit down. Nobody's perfect. If Comrade Jiang has such good skills and his brain is also so sharp, how are those of us who use our brains supposed to survive?"

"Deputy Director Sun, you've figured it out?" Jiang Peng asked, his face grim.

Everyone knew Jiang Tian was his son, yet Sun Haibo dared to speak like that; it was a blow to his authority.

Most importantly, belittling Jiang Tian was an insult.

"No, not at all. The investigation is still ongoing. But I have an investigative plan. Young Comrade Jiang is capable of taking action, but investigative work, he's far from skilled," Sun Haibo chuckled.

"Who says I don't know?"

Just then, Jiang Tian spoke, his face expressionless.

"You know?" Sun Haibo deliberately wanted to see Jiang Tian embarrass himself, or rather, he was seeing the father and son duo becoming increasingly powerful.

No one in the police force listened to him anymore, and Sun Haibo couldn't tolerate that.

Besides, during their conflicts, Jiang Tian was on the verge of meteoric rise, receiving the First-Class Merit Medal several times in a short period—a feat rarely achieved in a lifetime.

In the future, as Jiang Tian matured, their conflict was so significant—no, even without Jiang Tian's development, his achievements might even propel Jiang Peng further.

So now, even if Sun Haibo couldn't destroy Jiang Tian, ​​he wanted to annoy him from time to time.

Jiang Tian left his seat and went directly to the podium.



Chapter 55: Subordinates Issue Deadline for Solving the Case, Yunhai Explodes


"The key to this case is where the poison came from. There are only two possibilities. The first is that it was hidden inside their own bodies, but a normal person wouldn't carry poison on their person, as it could be fatal at any moment, especially someone like Wei Youdao. So, the only second possibility is that it was brought in through their evening meal," Jiang Tian said calmly.

Having eliminated all the impossibilities, the answer was clear. His extraordinary memory, combined with Jiang Tian's genius for criminal investigation, made everything go smoothly. He could recall and even discover suspicious details from things that were previously unthinkable or unseen.

Miss Qiu stared at Jiang Tian in astonishment.

Sun Haibo scoffed, "They died at three in the morning. By the time the food was brought in, they were already dead."

Jiang Tian smiled, not angry. "Is that so? Didn't Deputy Director Sun consider that someone might have left a simple threatening message in the food, informing them of the time of death, creating the illusion that they died at three in the morning?"

Beads of sweat dripped from Liu Haibo's forehead.

Buzz!!!

The scene was filled with members of the anti-narcotics squad. Logical thinking is a criminal investigation mindset, possessed only by professionals in this field. Anti-narcotics officers spend most of their time investigating drug dealers; investigating murderers and solving other cases isn't their responsibility.

But at this moment...

Even without any evidence, this reasoning was absolutely brilliant.

It seemed perfectly logical.

Clap clap clap!!!

The next moment...

The conference room door opened.

Shen Han led President Bai into the conference room, clapping incessantly.

After a moment of silence, the conference room erupted in thunderous applause.

These clear and loud claps felt like resounding slaps to Sun Haibo's face, making his expression even more unpleasant than if he'd eaten shit.

"Brilliant, absolutely brilliant, so accurate! Xiao Jiang, I never imagined you were not only incredibly skilled, but also a master of deduction!" Shen Han exclaimed in disbelief.

The case was very complex.

After receiving the news, he immediately led Chief Bai of the Provincial Public Security Department's headquarters to the Municipal Public Security Bureau at top speed, followed by a criminal investigation expert from the Provincial Public Security Department.

Even this criminal investigation expert applauded and bluntly stated, "While the truth of this case seems simple, figuring it out is definitely not easy. What's most valuable is that you analyzed the scene in such a short time. Excellent! I didn't expect the Municipal Public Security Bureau to have another talented criminal investigator besides Xiao Qiu."

The criminal investigation expert's praise was full of admiration.

These words instantly jolted everyone present, like a resounding slap in the face to Sun Haibo.

Because anyone else could be questioned, but not this criminal investigation expert.

It was Li Kegong, the tiger of crime-solving in Yunhai.

He has even solved a major case that shocked the entire nation.

Now he is a special expert for Yunhai and also a contracted professor at the Police Academy.

"Who just heard me say that Comrade Jiang is brainless, yet he still tries to show off how smart he is? What, he's no good at solving cases, no good at fighting drug dealers, but he can do it all right here in this conference room just by opening his mouth? In this system, you either succeed or you fail. Your words don't count; only your actions matter." Shen Han's stern gaze swept across the room.

Hiss!!!

The entire conference room fell silent.

Pupils contracted rapidly.

Although Shen Han didn't name names, Sun Haibo's face turned pale.

The director's words were very heavy.

Especially some people, their eyes were burning with desire as they looked for ways to build a relationship with Jiang Tian.

The bureau chief's father, the director's favor, the attention of a bigwig in Beijing.

Wow.

What is a winner in life?

In the conference room, looking at the radiant Jiang Tian.

Hiding in the deepest corner, not daring to utter a sound or attract anyone's attention, Xiao Bo's composure crumbled at this moment.

Even if he didn't want to admit it, facing Jiang Tian now, he felt immense envy, even clenching his fists in admiration.

That's right.

Jiang Tian had a bureau chief father, a department head as a backer, and powerful figures openly stated they needed his help.

And he himself possessed terrifying deductive abilities and could handle criminal cases.

Most terrifyingly, he had also accumulated numerous merits, receiving first-class awards left and right.

How could he lose?

To be honest, facing this start, Jiang Tian truly didn't know how he could lose.

Jiang Tian even knew that even if drastic changes occurred in the future, he would absolutely remain standing.

Meanwhile, Miss Qiu looked at Jiang Tian with utter shock.

Wow.

She had arrived early too, and after several hours of investigation and deduction, she finally came up with this.

Miss Qiu was very confident; the ingenuity of her modus operandi was something few others could have conceived of.

However, she hadn't expected that Jiang Tian, ​​who had been called out on the spot, would be mocked. Miss Qiu was still thinking about how to apologize and make amends to Jiang Tian when he suddenly gave her such a shock.

He analyzed it in such a short time?

"Officer Jiang, are you interested in joining the criminal investigation department?" Miss Qiu's eyes were bright, but her direct gaze seemed to see right through people.

"No." Jiang Tian shook his head decisively.

Being a narcotics officer suited him perfectly; he had no intention of changing departments.

After all, murder is a crime, but how much more sinful could it be compared to those ruthless drug dealers?

Miss Qiu looked regretful.

Shen Han walked to the podium, glanced around for a moment, and then spoke with a heavy expression: "Wei Youdao's case had already reached the highest levels of government, and everyone was waiting for good news. But then this happened—two people, brazenly killed right under the noses of the Municipal Public Security Bureau! It's utterly audacious! The Ministry of Public Security has issued an order to solve the case within a limited time, requiring the Provincial Public Security Department and the Municipal Public Security Bureau to solve it within ten days."

At this point,

everyone in the room turned extremely pale. Judging from the method of poisoning, this was clearly organized and premeditated.

Ten days to solve the case?

"Impossible! Does the Ministry of Public Security treat this case as a criminal investigation? Breaking up a drug trafficking organization isn't that simple," Song Liguo couldn't hold back any longer and stood up.

"Do you think I don't know how difficult it is? Wei Youdao definitely has a powerful force behind him, but what good will knowing do? This matter was personally ordered by the Minister, who explicitly demanded that Yunhai solve the case within a limited time, stop the spread of evil forces, and eradicate all criminal elements. Look at Wei Youdao and his companion dying here; don't you feel ashamed?" Shen Han shouted.

After Song Liguo sat down with his head bowed, Shen Han continued, "Difficulties are difficulties, so we'll solve them. For this case, we'll establish a special task force. I'll be the leader, and Elder Li will be the deputy leader. Because it involves drug crimes, the main members will be drawn from the anti-drug team. President Bai has a case and can't participate. Song Liguo, Jiang Tian, ​​Zhu Tianqiu, and the others I've mentioned—each of you bring two people to join the task force to help you. I'm telling you now, after solving the case within the deadline, the entire task force will receive a first-class merit."

"Everyone else, await orders to be mobilized for support."

Boom!!!

Everyone's eyes lit up.

Because Shen Han's meaning was very clear.

Solving cases, performing exceptionally well, might even earn a personal commendation from the minister?

Hiss!!!

Jiang Tian was even more excited.

Good, good, it seems my path is getting wider and wider.

As for Xiao Bo?

Jiang Tian calmly observed Xiao Bo standing in the corner, a barely perceptible cold smile appearing on his face. He had seen him when he came in, but ignored him because he didn't have time.

Of course, Jiang Tian wasn't surprised he would return. Xiao Bo hadn't committed any major offenses; no one had the right to fire him. Besides behind-the-scenes manipulation, with Sun Haibo's help, it would be easy to cancel his suspension under the pretext of manpower shortage.

But what could he do now that he was back? What kind of trouble could he cause?

Without Mu Ya, without Jiang Tian's identity to help him, and with Sun Haibo himself in dire straits, what achievements could a man from a mountain village like Xiao Bo possibly have?

Jiang Tian was mistaken; in his nearly twenty years in his previous life, Xiao Bo hadn't achieved a single major merit.



Chapter 56 A Man Who Boasts Like a Demon, Even More Awesome Than Jiang Tian


“This is going too far. Things in Yunhai are getting increasingly out of control. We initially thought it was just a minor ailment, but unexpectedly, tackling even a small problem has instantly exposed a terrifying symptom of intractable diseases throughout the entire region.”

In a dignified and imposing office, Gao Xiaolong sat in the guest seat, looking at a man opposite him with a serious and grave expression.

“Old Mu, the problems in Yunhai are far more serious than you and I imagined, countless times more serious than the Ministry of Public Security anticipated,” Gao Xiaolong continued.

The man called Old Mu looked at Gao Xiaolong, a helpless bitter smile on his face: “I didn’t expect the Yunhai problem to be this serious.”

Yes!

The problems that had already surfaced were already very serious.

How serious?

More than half of the country’s drugs flow out of Yunhai.

Because Yunhai connects to the Triangle Region, it fully embodies three advantages: safe and reliable routes, multiple routes, covert operations with no danger, and convenient and low-cost transportation.

But, similarly, given the inseparable nature of prostitution, gambling, and drugs…

The consequences of rampant drug trafficking include various criminal offenses, the existence of organized crime groups, and widespread corruption.

This, in turn, has spawned an even more uncontrollable drug cartel.

“Old Gao, the problems in Yunhai are very serious. Otherwise, I wouldn’t have reported it to Kyoto and sent you here to supervise,” Old Mu sighed.

Gao Xiaolong nodded slightly: “Since arriving in Yunhai, I’ve felt suffocated. It’s like a giant, tight net is covering the entire city. The drug dealers, from top to bottom, act with impunity, yet they are unable to move freely. Fortunately, a genius has emerged in Yunhai’s anti-drug squad.”

At the mention of that genius,

Old Mu’s spirits lifted instantly: “You mean that Xiao Jiang?”

How could Old Mu not have heard of this name? Jiang Tian’s appearances these past few days have been incredibly frequent.

Gao Xiaolong didn't hold back his praise: "Excellent! Comrade Jiang Tian fully demonstrated what it means to be fearless, prioritize the people, and fight bravely. At first, I just thought he was a good shot, but he gave me a huge surprise just two days ago at the drug factory. No matter how many drug dealers there were, he gave me an invincible feeling."

To be honest, Gao Xiaolong had seen skilled fighters before, like the bodyguards from the secret service in Beijing.

But those were professionally trained, traditionally trained from childhood. Even so, he felt their skills were probably only slightly better than Zhou Zicheng's, far inferior to Jiang Tian's.

Hearing about Jiang Tian's achievements these past few days, Old Mu's eyes showed a hint of envy.

Damn it.

Why isn't such an outstanding young man his granddaughter's husband?!

Wait, that Xiao Bo is in the same police team as Xiao Jiang, they should be about equal, or at least not inferior, right?

Oh, right, Old Mu suddenly remembered something his granddaughter had said earlier: there was a second-generation rich kid named Jiang Tian who was holding Xiao Bo back in the police force.

Is it him?

If someone as outstanding as Jiang Tian is holding Xiao Bo back, then Xiao Bo himself must be even more outstanding, right?

Thinking of this, Old Mu chuckled. Jiang Tian was indeed outstanding, but the young narcotics officer who was pursuing his granddaughter, and whom his granddaughter seemed to reciprocate, must also be exceptionally talented.

“What are you laughing at?” Gao Xiaolong asked, puzzled.

“Besides Jiang Tian, ​​your city bureau has another outstanding young man, perhaps even more capable than Jiang Tian,” Old Mu chuckled.

“Who?” Gao Xiaolong asked, somewhat surprised.

Jiang Tian was already overjoyed, having exposed the criminal activities in Yunhai and performed numerous meritorious deeds.

He hadn't expected there to be a second one?

And someone no less capable than Jiang Tian?

Who was it?

Who was it?

Gao Xiaolong's face was filled with surprise.

“That outstanding young man comes from an ordinary family; his parents are farmers. He worked part-time while in school and is a very excellent young man…”

Old Mu began praising him without any pretense.

Before Jiang Tian showed his true colors, Xiao Bo had said many times that there was a little brother named Jiang Tian who was a good-for-nothing and always dragged him down. Now that young man Jiang Tian has graduated, how outstanding is Xiao Bo as his master?

Gao Xiaolong's face grew increasingly animated and excited.

"His name is Xiao Bo."

Huh?

Xiao Bo?

Gao Xiaolong picked at his ear; he must have misheard.

Probably.

"This young man, Xiao Bo, has no background, yet he dares to confront the privileged without fear of power, arguing his case rationally and resolutely refusing to use his privileges. He's been pursuing my granddaughter, but I haven't agreed because I gave him a test to gauge his character, allowing him to be promoted this year based on his own abilities."

"Hmm, what's wrong?"

Halfway through his speech, Old Mu's gaze shifted to Gao Xiaolong.

Because at this moment, Gao Xiaolong's gaze was incredibly strange.

If it were anyone else, the newcomer Gao Xiaolong wouldn't recognize them, but that clownish Xiao Bo, that person with a dark mind, full of insidious schemes and questioning the authenticity of Xiao Jiang's meritorious service...

Gao Xiaolong knew him all too well.

Before Gao Xiaolong could speak, his phone rang urgently.

"It's Xiao Shen calling. It's probably because there's been progress at the Municipal Bureau," Gao Xiaolong said, putting the phone on speakerphone.



Chapter 57 You're still analyzing? You've solved the case already?


Rewinding to just before the two bigwigs received their phone calls.

The Municipal Public Security Bureau had already formed a special task force, but in essence, Shen Han was merely a figurehead. The real decision-maker was Li Kegong, the expert from the Municipal Bureau.

Even Jiang Peng, among others, were nominally involved, but essentially just administrative staff who didn't participate in the investigation.

The real leaders of the investigation were Li Kegong and Ms. Qiu from the Criminal Investigation Department.

As for the narcotics officers, they could only cooperate. Investigating and arresting drug dealers was fine, but asking them to conduct a locked-room murder investigation was a different story. Even veteran investigator Song Liguo could only stare blankly; lacking investigative logic, he was completely baffled.

However, Jiang Tian was an exception.

"Comrade Jiang, I've heard from the director that your skills are top-notch. You've killed hundreds of drug dealers. You'll be responsible for protecting Miss Qiu. Moreover, you have investigative logic; working with Miss Qiu will definitely make things much easier," Li Kegong instructed.

Jiang Tian naturally nodded.

Miss Qiu, upon hearing this, was stunned.

She stared at Jiang Tian in astonishment, her face full of shock: "You...you killed hundreds of drug dealers?"

Although both worked at the Municipal Public Security Bureau, one was in criminal investigation and the other in narcotics control. While there was some cooperation between them, there wasn't much deep involvement.

Besides, information from the narcotics control department couldn't be spread all over the world.

"Yes!" Jiang Tian nodded matter-of-factly.

"With you protecting me, I'm relieved," Miss Qiu said, her slightly vacant, lifeless eyes returning after her initial shock.

You know what, even with such a disheveled appearance and lifeless eyes, Miss Qiu somehow managed to be incredibly charming.

Jiang Tian, ​​possessing genius-level criminal investigation logic, handled the case by asking questions and Miss Qiu providing supplementary information.

Miss Qiu asked questions, and Jiang Tian would offer further details.

Especially given the urgency of the situation, Jiang Tian also interrogated the cafeteria delivery person, and the final result was as expected.

“There are three suspects in total. All three of them have the potential and opportunity to act: the cleaning lady at the city bureau cafeteria, the cook, and the last person involved, the cafeteria owner.”

The cafeteria owner?

To be honest.

Watching Miss Qiu analyze the situation, Jiang Tian smiled.

“What are you laughing at? Do you think I'm wrong?” Miss Qiu frowned slightly; Jiang Tian's carefree smile greatly displeased her.

Miss Qiu believed that investigation was a sacred matter, a means to seek justice for the innocent and to ensure that the guilty received their due punishment.

Therefore, Miss Qiu was extremely serious when solving cases.

However, Jiang Tian's face was completely relaxed, and he even seemed to disdain her analysis—yes, he showed her disrespect.

Even if you've taken down hundreds of drug dealers and have basic criminal investigation logic, you can't disrespect other people's hard work like this.

"No, quite the opposite, I think your analysis is very correct," Jiang Tian nodded in strong agreement.

"Then why are you laughing? Did you discover something else?" Miss Qiu asked, displeased.

Jiang Tian looked at his scanning radar and chuckled. Why laugh?

To put it simply, Jiang Tian suddenly realized that while a single keyword function was incredibly powerful, combining two compatible keywords unleashed a power far exceeding that of a single function by several times.

For example, Jiang Tian's boundless stamina combined with his martial arts mastery would create a fighting force that even a world boxing champion might not be able to withstand a casual punch from him. If using techniques, Jiang Tian didn't even know how many he would need to kill.

Similarly, when a criminal investigation genius is combined with the scanning radar...

A criminal has appeared.

Okay, as long as a simple target is brought before Jiang Tian, ​​or appears within a kilometer of him, he can instantly spot it.

And at this very moment...

Jiang Tian has spotted it.

"Brother Jiang, I brought him. This is our cafeteria owner."

Miss Qiu and Jiang Tian were in a small, makeshift meeting room. The blackboard was densely covered with drawings of Wei Youdao's interpersonal relationships, such as his wife, family, and potential suspects.

Jiang Tian was about to say something when he saw Zhao Wei, who had brought the man, looking at him with a resentful expression.

It wasn't just Zhao Wei.

Standing in the doorway, Li Zijing leaned against the doorframe with her arms crossed, her face also grim as she looked at him.

Hey!!!

Jiang Tian scratched his head; he finally remembered something he'd forgotten yesterday.

"Brother Jiang, you didn't think of us when it came to earning merit, but you remember us now that it's time to work?" Zhao Wei said, suppressing his anger.

Jiang Tian blinked: "This is also earning merit. We're all serving the people. If this case is solved, do you think you can escape a collective first-class merit?"

Huh?

“But if we can’t solve it, we’ll all be disciplined even if we join the special task force,” Zhao Wei said, his face full of resentment.

“What are you talking about? With your brother Jiang here, is there any case we can’t solve?” Jiang Tian snapped.

“Damn, brother Jiang, I’ve been waiting for that confident remark from you.” Zhao Wei’s admiration for Jiang Tian was palpable.

Although this case was terrifying.

The pressure was immense.

The pressure from the provincial department, the pressure from the Ministry of Public Security—it all weighed on them.

But precisely because of this, all eyes were on them, and the reward for solving the case would be even greater!

“Besides, don’t you know who your brother Jiang is? Last night, who knew where the murderer was, right? What if he was with you guys? I would have run away in fear. Last night, I acted on a whim; I even asked Sister Li for the location. I didn’t know anything beforehand,” Jiang Tian explained.

“Oh, oh.”

Zhao Wei looked a little guilty; it seemed he had wronged his brother Jiang.

Behind Zhao Wei, Li Zijing was furious at his appearance.

Last night, they were halfway up the mountain, having changed the radio channel. They searched for most of the night, but no one answered. They didn't dare call Jiang Tian.

So they kept calling until they encountered a retreating group of armed police, only to find out the case had been solved. Back at the police station late at night, they learned that Jiang Tian was the one who solved it.

When they tried to call Jiang Tian again, his phone was off. Actually, he had spent too much time chatting with Mu Ya the night before and had turned it off.

That's one thing, but the real problem is that Jiang Tian arrested people, and after all that hard work, they didn't get a single penny.

How could they not be angry?

However, Li Zijing, watching Jiang Tian interrogate the case, didn't lash out, but sullenly stared at the cafeteria owner.

The cafeterias at the Municipal Public Security Bureau are all contracted out.

And the cafeteria owner was a relatively large contractor in the area, not only for their Municipal Bureau, but also for the cafeterias at Yunnan University.

You can imagine how powerful this person was.

How big was his business.

But even Jiang Tian had to admit that the cafeteria owner's food was quite good, delicious and inexpensive.

"Why did you come to the Municipal Public Security Bureau cafeteria last night?" Jiang Tian scrutinized her.

Miss Qiu, biting her pen, lay on the table, staring at the cafeteria owner with dead fish eyes.

"Yesterday was the end-of-month audit day. Everyone in the cafeteria knows that. I always come here at the end of the month. It's always been like this. Everyone in the cafeteria knows this," the cafeteria owner said with a simple smile.

Jiang Tian stared intently at the cafeteria owner.

Without the scanning radar, even a criminal investigation genius like Jiang Tian wouldn't have noticed anything unusual.

But now, Jiang Tian stared at the blood-red dot on the scanning radar, flashing intermittently.

"Who's behind Wei Youdao?" Jiang Tian suddenly asked.

This was a type of logical interrogation used in criminal investigations, directly attacking the suspect's mind to catch them off guard.

Huh?

"Not going to talk?" Jiang Tian smiled slightly.

Then he glanced back at Miss Qiu, who was still analyzing the situation, completely bewildered. What did this mean? Was he implying that he had caught the culprit while he was still analyzing?



Chapter 58 Three Strikes to Shatter Drug Dealers' Relationship


Miss Qiu stared at Jiang Tian in astonishment, seemingly surprised by his sudden appearance and his apparent expertise in criminal investigation and interrogation. However, her deadpan eyes remained fixed on him.

Criminals are most likely to slip up during surprise interrogations.

But the bewildered canteen owner showed almost no weaknesses.

“Captain Jiang, these are the documents.”

Just then, Yu Hui walked in with a stack of documents, which Jiang Tian readily accepted.

The documents were all about the canteen owner, who, like Xiao Bo, was a representative of those who rose from humble beginnings in rural families.

To be able to contract so many canteens, one simply couldn't do it without immense connections.

So, was he acting with impunity?

Jiang Tian looked at the canteen owner's honest smile, seeing no sign of panic.

Therefore, Jiang Tian loosened his shirt. He decided it was time to let the drug dealers and criminals of Yunhai experience the power of brutality.

“Zhang Zheng, Zhengfang Food Co., Ltd., registered address…” Jiang Tian slowly recited the information.

“I have nothing to say. I don’t know Wei Youdao. Officer Jiang, right? If there’s nothing else, I’m sorry, I have to leave. I still have tens of millions of yuan in project funds waiting to be collected. Excuse me.” The canteen owner, Zhang Zheng, stood up.

This was true confidence and composure; his actions and demeanor were measured and elegant.

“You might have some misunderstandings about yourself.” Jiang Tian approached.

“What misunderstanding?”

Zhang Zheng looked at Jiang Tian with a somewhat confused expression.

Click!!!

Jiang Tian directly handcuffed Zhang Zheng. He could lie about everything else, but Jiang Tian believed his radar would never be wrong.

Besides, it was for the sake of the case, and there was a deadline for solving it.

Therefore, Jiang Tian could only resort to some special methods.

“What are you doing, Officer Jiang? I hope you don’t make a mistake.” Zhang Zheng remained calm even as he was handcuffed.

Bang!!!

The next moment.

Under the horrified gazes of everyone in the office, Jiang Tian casually pulled a police baton from the wall.

He struck Zhang Zheng hard on the head with the baton.

Zhang Zheng collapsed to the ground with a thud.

"What are you doing?" Zhang Zheng was completely bewildered, clutching his head, his eyes seemingly blank, his tone slightly panicked.

"You shameless bastard, are you threatening a righteous police officer, or do you think we can't find out just because you pretend not to know? You dog! The monthly audit ends on the 30th. Look at yesterday's date—the 25th! Go check your own monthly accounts!"

Jiang Tian, ​​baton in hand,

swung it, striking Zhang Zheng repeatedly.

The sounds of thuds echoed.

"Don't hit me, don't hit me..." Zhang Zheng writhed on the ground.

He even dared to make a fool of himself?

Jiang Tian was truly exasperated.

These criminals were truly arrogant. If they were genuinely innocent, or if the situation was uncertain, Jiang Tian wouldn't have acted. But now, Jiang Tian was certain this guy was definitely the murderer from last night.

Knowing the culprit, Jiang Tian didn't have time to play games.

The safety of the people's lives didn't allow Jiang Tian to show mercy.

Was he striking with a police baton?

No, it was the people's righteous judgment.

One strike, two strikes, three strikes!!!

Three blows, and Zhang Zheng's composure crumbled. He had never seen such a ruthless police officer; three blows from the start shattered all his elegant facade.

"How did you make Wei Youdao ingest the poison himself? What's your relationship with him?" Jiang Tian asked again.

"Nothing, Officer Jiang, I'm innocent!"

Zhang Zheng feigned a pitiful appearance, but at this moment, the cold glint in his eyes was almost explosive.

When had he ever suffered such injustice in his life?

Zhang Zheng vowed that as long as he was safe, he would kill this bastard.

As for confessing, impossible, absolutely impossible.

If he didn't talk, there would be no evidence; if he did, his crime would certainly carry the death penalty.

The reason why drug dealers are the most ruthless, vicious, and reckless of all criminals is that while other crimes, unless intentional murder, offer a chance of survival, drug dealers are truly a death sentence.

Bang! Bang! Bang!!!

Unfortunately, Jiang Tian's baton was truly merciless.

Moreover, as a martial arts master, his movements were incredibly precise; while outward injuries might not be visible, the blows from Jiang Tian's baton inflicted internal wounds.

"Cough cough!!!" Zhang Zheng coughed up blood, his face turning pale.

Meanwhile,

At the conference room door, Zhang Zheng's screams were witnessed by Xiao Bo, who was passing by.

"Good, good, so you really think you can act with impunity just because you've done something meritorious? Heh, you even dare to force a confession?" Xiao Bo's spirits lifted, and a look of wild joy appeared on his face.

He had even already considered using this as leverage to threaten Jiang Tian into taking responsibility for Wang Yifei.

Otherwise, he would expose his actions.

Heaven knows what Xiao Bo felt when he returned home yesterday to find Wang Yifei's parents waiting at the door, because he knew his affair might have been discovered.

And since the incident with Wang Yifei, he hadn't even dared to go near her.

At that moment, Xiao Bo felt a surge of relief, because he knew that Wang Yifei's parents were waiting outside his house, definitely because of Wang Yifei. Luckily, he had escaped quickly.

Now look what happened! He'd been caught red-handed.

"No, a forced confession! I'm going to see the director! Slandering an innocent person to solve a case and gain merit—you're insane!" Xiao Bo sneered.

But he didn't know...

At that very moment, Jiang Tian took out his phone.

He crouched down, grabbed Zhang Zheng's hair with one hand, and pulled out his phone. On it was a blood-soaked photo: "Look, do you recognize her? It doesn't matter if you don't. Let me tell you, this is Wei Youdao's wife. She's been silenced. While I can't convict you without a warrant, it's not difficult to get you locked up for a few days. Whether you live or die is irrelevant, but think about your family."

"Don't look at me like that. I didn't do it. Our captain saw it today when he went to Wei Youdao's house to investigate. She's already been silenced by your boss. Think about it. The sooner you confess, the sooner you're arrested, the safer your family will be, right? You don't want your family to be wiped out by your drug boss, do you?"

Jiang Tian grinned.

As for that nonsense about a plan, slowly solving the case, luring the snake out of its hole, etc., Jiang Tian didn't have that much time or energy.

Why would Jiang Tian waste days with a suspect when a single baton could solve the problem?

“Impossible.” Zhang Zheng’s pupils contracted.

“Don’t you know the difference between possible and impossible? If you were to leak information, think about whether your boss would wipe out your entire family.” Jiang Tian said slowly.

Cold sweat beaded on Zhang Zheng’s face.

“Since I dared to lay a hand on you, I already have evidence. Arresting you is more than enough. You can’t escape. Accept your fate. Now think about your family; that’s the most important thing.” Jiang Tian continued to intensify his attack.

“Don’t say anything.” Zhang Zheng, whether from the beating with the baton or from fear, was dripping with large beads of sweat. After a moment, Zhang Zheng coughed up a mouthful of blood before gritting his teeth and saying, “Don’t force me. If I tell, not only me, but you won’t survive today.”

Oh?

Jiang Tian’s eyes lit up.

A big fish.

This is a big fish!

Excellent, he likes big fish like this.

He wanted to see if someone so tough could withstand three blows from him.

At this moment, the conference room was completely silent.

No one spoke; they all stared blankly at Zhang Zheng.

“Do you think I’m joking? That person… I wouldn’t dare disobey him in the slightest. Don’t even mention you; do you know how your former director died?” Zhang Zheng gritted his teeth.

Hiss!!!

Jiang Tian gasped.

No wonder, in his previous life, after this case reached the highest levels of government, the Ministry of Public Security was directly involved in the investigation, even deploying thousands of personnel from the Ministry to Yunhai.

The previous director died in office; Jiang Peng was essentially his successor.

The previous director’s death was quite natural; he was hit by a truck on the road. The driver didn’t flee; he was a drunk man who hit the director, overturned into a reservoir, and then died himself.

In short, it was almost flawless, without any loopholes.

And Jiang Tian never expected that this would involve the previous director.

“Some things are better left unsaid, but once revealed, no one can cover it up.” Zhang Zheng was filled with resentment!

Jiang Tian's use of the three batons and his threats genuinely frightened Zhang Zheng. The seemingly simple conversation struck a chord with Zhang Zheng; that man was truly terrifying!

And ruthless.

“Name him, let him see how powerful he is.” Jiang Tian's smile gradually faded.

Although Jiang Tian was arrogant, he wouldn't underestimate anyone.

Especially Zhang Zheng's words—so ruthless—he had to be killed instantly.

And in the shortest possible time.

He could silence his own men, let alone his enemies.

Thinking this, Jiang Tian felt a sense of urgency.

Meanwhile, in the conference room, everyone's faces flushed.

This was out of excitement.

If they had encountered this normally, they would have been terrified, as if facing a formidable enemy.

But now, everyone around Jiang Tian, ​​without exception, felt no fear.

Meanwhile,

Shen Han stared blankly at Xiao Bo, who had barged into the conference room.

She even wondered if she had acted rashly.

"Director Shen, to meet the deadline, Comrade Jiang Tian has already been coerced into confessing under torture. I didn't want to contact you, but I don't want to see the Municipal Bureau fall into corruption and go astray under Jiang Tian's leadership. Director Shen, please believe me, I'm absolutely not lying. There's no risk of coercing a confession in such an important case."

Yes!

Anything else is acceptable, but this incident absolutely cannot have any flaws.

The focus isn't on the beating, but on preventing false information.

A coerced confession to take the blame would be a blatant disrespect to the Ministry of Public Security.

"Xiao Bo, can you take responsibility for your words?" Director Shen stood up, his face serious.

"I swear, Jiang Tian is absolutely an innocent person coerced into confessing under torture, and has absolutely no connection to this case." Xiao Bo frantically tried to prove himself, believing his opportunity had arrived.

Besides dealing with Wang Yifei to threaten Jiang Tian, ​​Xiao Bo ultimately made another choice.

He was gambling with his future, betting everything he had. If he lost, he might lose everything.

Xiao Bo couldn't bear the cost of failure.



Chapter 59 Is the cafeteria poisonous? It's blown up!


"Deputy Director Sun, are you like this too?" Director Shen looked at Sun Haibo.

That's right.

Given Xiao Bo's current character and status, how could Shen Han possibly have the time to meet with him privately?

Xiao Bo is nothing!

Currently, he's only at the lowest rank, even one level lower than Jiang Tian in terms of police rank.

An ordinary person without any special missions has no authority, and besides, Shen Han doesn't have the time to meet with him privately.

In the end, Xiao Bo still found Sun Haibo.

Furthermore, to be absolutely certain, Xiao Bo even secretly led Sun Haibo to the door of the conference room, where they saw Zhang Zheng's mangled body inside.

A pleasant surprise.

Sun Haibo's face immediately lit up with surprise.

What kind of case is this? The Ministry of Public Security is paying special attention, the provincial department is leading the investigation, and a special task force has been established to solve the case. You can imagine how much importance the entire system, from top to bottom, attaches to this case.

And it's a case that's taken so seriously.

Using harsh methods during interrogations is understandable; the pressure of handling cases is immense, and in special circumstances, resorting to special tactics is permissible.

However, if an innocent person is tortured into confessing,

in such an important case, if a wrongful conviction is fabricated, not only will Jiang Tian be implicated, but Shen Han will also be affected, potentially losing his job.

The problem is far from trivial.

Of course, Shen Han isn't stupid. The main concern is Jiang Tian's youth and his past achievements; Shen Han fears Jiang Tian might act impulsively and go astray.

"Are you sure it was a forced confession?" Shen Han asked, frowning.

"That's right. The person who was beaten is Zhang Zheng, the owner of our cafeteria. This man who contracts our cafeteria, and even the cafeterias of Yunnan University and many other government agencies, has always been highly praised for his high-quality, low-priced food. He's also honest and reliable. Director Shen, I can guarantee that Mr. Zhang is absolutely innocent," Sun Haibo quickly interjected.

"Let's go take a look."

Shen Han stood up. He didn't go back to the provincial department, but went directly to the municipal bureau. It was convenient; after all, he was the head of the special task force, and even if it was just for show, he needed to keep an eye on things.

As he walked, Shen Han frowned. Even if they couldn't solve the case within the deadline, at most they'd get some disciplinary action; the pressure would still be on their superiors.

Jiang Tian's urgency made Shen Han wonder if his and Gao Lao's actions were right.

After all, Jiang Tian was too young. Making an exception and adding him to the special task force, and entrusting him with such an important task, might lead to a serious mistake due to his eagerness to prove himself.

These were serious concerns.

At this moment, Xiao Bo, eager to prove himself, was running ahead like a lackey, his face full of excitement.

That's right.

He was frantically trying to impress Director Shen. Xiao Bo was already fantasizing that Director Shen valued him and would let him replace Jiang Tian in the special task force.

After solving the case,

he immediately became the center of attention, his career skyrocketed, and he completely changed Mu Ya's impression of him.

But he didn't know that Shen Han was looking at him with a furrowed brow, thinking to herself, "A dignified narcotics officer, and he hasn't learned anything good, resorting to such underhanded tactics and reporting on his own comrades."

Which leader would dare employ someone who likes to snitch, and even snitch to superiors?

Ultimately, Xiao Bo was still too young at this point. Based on that alone, even if Jiang Tian were to be demoted, it wouldn't be Xiao Bo's turn.

So, when Jiang Tian was taking Zhang Zheng's statement...

Looking at the shocking crimes Zhang Zheng had committed on the statement, truly countless offenses, Jiang Tian's eyes widened in disbelief.

He had considered that the radar wouldn't lie to him, but he hadn't expected the charges to be this serious.

"Hiss, he deserves to die!" Miss Qiu gritted her teeth, looking at Jiang Tian with utter shock. She truly hadn't expected Jiang Tian to be so bold and to have such accurate insight in identifying the culprit: "Officer Jiang, how did you find out? It's outrageous! This Zhang Zheng truly deserves to die!"

The charges were shocking; Miss Qiu's pupils contracted as she stared at the charges.

Because this guy actually dared to... poison the police force?

Upon seeing this charge, to be honest, Miss Qiu's scalp tingled; she was practically about to explode.

“The moment this guy showed up, I could smell the stench of drug trafficking on him,” Jiang Tian shamelessly declared.

Miss Qiu's deadpan eyes widened in shock.

But just then…

“Jiang Tian, ​​you piece of trash! What do you take the Municipal Bureau for? How did I teach you before? The first principle is never to extract a confession through torture! Did you learn that but nothing? Such an important case, and you dare to frame someone? Who gave you the audacity to wrong an innocent person?” Xiao Bo jumped in impatiently, launching into a tirade.

Xiao Bo was beaming with excitement.

He stepped forward, first invoking his status as Jiang Tian's mentor.

In reality, what a load of rubbish!

How could a mere ordinary police officer, barely a year into his job, possibly have a disciple?

It was utterly ridiculous.

But from another perspective, Xiao Bo was deliberately trying to elevate himself.

Before Jiang Tian could speak, Miss Qiu's dead fish eyes had already turned, her gaze blank and seemingly foolish.

However, if one truly believed she was foolish, that would be the real fool.



Chapter 60 Officer Jiang's Deepest Care


Zhang Zheng, the victim of forced confession, turned to look at the person who entered.

At this moment, Zhang Zheng's feelings were complex, but he had resigned himself to his fate. It was for his family; yes, because the person behind him was too terrifying.

Rather than trusting his boss, Zhang Zheng actually trusted Jiang Tian at this moment.

Moreover, when he confessed, Jiang Tian promised him a condition: if he confessed, Jiang Tian would guarantee the safety of his family.

Now, even if he remained tight-lipped, would his boss believe him?

Without police protection, his family would still be in danger; even with police protection, there was still danger. But Zhang Zheng had no other choice.

"This is terrible, absolutely terrible! Jiang Tian, ​​do you have any humanity? How could you be so cruel to such an honest man like Zhang Zheng? Even with a time limit for solving the case, you can't be this foolish! I know Boss Zhang very well; he's an excellent supplier for our police station, and I even personally recruited him." Sun Haibo approached Jiang Tian with a grim face, accusing him.

At this moment, Jiang Tian was still immersed in the news of the poisoning of the police force.

Good heavens.

So, that damn Zhang Zheng, in his competition, actually added something to the stir-fries and soups.

Good heavens, is this stuff even edible? Cold sweat broke out on Jiang Tian's forehead.

That stuff, if eaten improperly, can be deadly. If Jiang Tian didn't have some kind of cheat code, he'd probably be in trouble too.

This bastard actually poisoned the narcotics officers?

Are he insane?

The investigation revealed something that nearly shut Jiang Tian up; if it got out, it would be a huge laughing stock.

Their professional narcotics officers had been poisoned?

"You recruited him?"

Jiang Tian was still reeling from the news when he heard two blatant accusations. He turned and stared intently at Sun Haibo.

"This damned beast," Jiang Tian thought, narrowing his eyes.

Sun Haibo had been relentlessly targeting him time and again, and Jiang Tian had been so busy these past few days that he hadn't had time to find evidence of Sun Haibo's crimes.

Unexpectedly, Sun Haibo came forward himself. What a stroke of luck!

"That's right. Because I recruited him, I know how honest Mr. Zhang is. Xiao Jiang, what you've done is a violation of the law, a challenge to the bottom line of the law, which is absolutely intolerable. Mr. Zhang, don't worry, our city bureau will definitely give you an explanation," Sun Haibo said righteously.

Xiao Bo quickly followed up, saying, "It's our fault that such a scoundrel appeared in the Municipal Bureau. Don't worry, we've already called the Director to personally oversee things and clear your name. We will never allow a forced confession to happen to you."

After saying that, Xiao Bo even yelled at Jiang Tian, ​​"What are you doing? Hurry up and apologize to Boss Zhang! Do you really think that just because you've done a little favor, you can be above the law? Who gave you the guts? Who gave you the right?"

The two of them took the opportunity to point and whisper wildly at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian wasn't angry. He grinned and turned to Zhang Zheng meaningfully, saying, "Boss Zhang, should I apologize to you?"

"No, no, no," Zhang Zheng shook his head frantically.

"Mr. Zhang, don't be afraid. We're here, and Director Shen is here too. No one can wrong you. This black sheep is a cancer in our police force; we'll get rid of him sooner or later." Sun Haibo stepped forward to support him, a smile on his face, expecting Zhang Zheng to be grateful.

Zhang Zheng's expression suddenly became agitated: "I don't need your support! Who wronged me? I wasn't wronged! This is Officer Jiang's genuine care for me. I was moved by Officer Jiang and voluntarily confessed. Who asked you to seek justice?"

Boom!!!

Zhang Zheng's words.

Instantly left Sun Haibo stunned, as if he had become a clown.

Xiao Bo was also completely dumbfounded.

They had finally found Jiang Tian's weakness and were ruthlessly trampling on it, but the person who stood up for him was now saying such things?

"Mr. Zhang?" Sun Haibo was dumbfounded.

No, what does this mean?

“That’s right, I’ve confessed. I killed Wei Youdao and his son. I put threatening messages and poison in their food last night.”

What?

Xiao Bo and Sun Haibo’s faces turned green instantly.

But it didn’t stop there.

Zhang Zheng continued, “I’m guilty. I even poisoned your food to increase our competitiveness.”

Boom!!!

Good heavens.

This time, even Shen Han couldn’t sit still.

Shen Han clenched his fists.

He stared at Sun Haibo and Xiao Bo with a grim expression.

Just now, for a moment, he even misunderstood Xiao Jiang.

Thankfully.

He didn’t speak hastily, but at the same time, Shen Han stared intently at Sun Haibo with an unbelievably dark expression, saying, “You hired these cafeteria staff, you guaranteed they were problem-free, now, what else do you have to say?”

Boom!!!

Sun Haibo's face turned pale. After a moment, he suddenly turned around.

*Slap!*

Sun Haibo slapped Xiao Bo hard across the face. "Xiao Bo, what else do you have to say? You came here to spread rumors and slander Comrade Xiao Jiang. I kindly called you back to the police station, and you come back only to repay me. I think you're the black sheep of the police force."

"I..." Xiao Bo opened his mouth to say something.

*Slap!*

Sun Haibo slapped him again with his other hand. "Shut up! From now on, you're suspended. Go home and write a self-criticism. You'll also receive a public reprimand and a major demerit."

*Buzz!*

Xiao Bo's face was deathly pale, and large beads of cold sweat dripped down his face.

A major demerit—that's a lifelong punishment.

Especially since, when he was harboring grand dreams, dreams that hadn't even taken flight yet, this was a devastating blow.

The test Mu Ya's family put him through this year was a promotion, and now, instead of a promotion, he received a major demerit, and Mu Ya is slipping further and further away.

The more Xiao Bo thought about it, the more he felt his dream was slipping further away.

Jiang Tian sneered, quietly watching them fight like dogs.

"Enough."

Director Shen roared, his face contorted with rage, "Sun Haibo, what did you say to slander Comrade Jiang? Comrade Jiang made meritorious contributions at the front, and you're chasing after him, persecuting a hero within the force, ruining the police force's heroes! No wonder the city bureau's anti-drug efforts have made little progress over the years. The canteen owner you personally recruited is a drug lord! You let a drug lord poison the city bureau right at its doorstep! You're very good, very good indeed! Do you think you can get away with this?"

"I'm telling you, it's impossible. I will seriously report this to my superiors and request your transfer."

Boom!!!

Sun Haibo was stunned.
