Actually, Jiang Tian also knew that this incident was too serious.

The entire city bureau had been poisoned; someone had to pay the price.

Merely slandering Jiang Tian and then being dismissed—even if Jiang Tian had made a great contribution, he wouldn't have the face to accept that.

The real reason was that the person Sun Haibo recruited was actually a major drug lord. This was a huge provocation to the entire city bureau and the entire public security system.

Therefore,

The truth is that Shen Han immediately reported to Gao Xiaolong.

"That's right, Comrade Xiao Jiang identified the real culprit at a glance and decisively used special methods during this special period to get the criminal to confess. However, at this time, the main person responsible for recruiting the drug dealers, Deputy Director Sun Haibo of the Municipal Public Security Bureau, and his cronies vehemently defended the criminals and insulted Comrade Xiao Jiang."

Shen Han gave Gao Xiaolong a detailed report on the incident.

And at this time...

This happened just as Old Mu was praising Xiao Bo.

Gao Xiaolong was on speakerphone when he answered the phone.

Therefore, when Gao Xiaolong heard that Jiang Tian had identified the real culprit, his face lit up with elation.

Old Mu was still wondering if the young Xiao Bo had played a part.

Upon hearing Shen Han's next words, Gao Xiaolong instantly flew into a rage: "What did you say? Such a thing exists? How can Yunhai allow this to happen?"

Old Mu nodded in agreement: "If this matter isn't handled properly, the consequences will be severe. Those responsible must be severely punished, especially in such an important unit as the Municipal Public Security Bureau. We cannot allow such leaders to exist."

Gao Xiaolong agreed: "Sun Haibo must be transferred to a different post. We absolutely cannot allow such a black sheep in the police force. Sun Haibo is a cancer in the police force. I saw it last time and gave him a major demerit, thinking he could reform, but I didn't expect this cancer to show no remorse."

At this point, Old Mu frowned and said, "Speaking of which, the anti-drug campaign in Yunhai is urgent and at a critical moment. Too much action could affect the anti-drug operation. How many people does Sun Haibo have as collaborators?"

Shen Han on the phone could hear clearly. Upon hearing Old Mu's voice, she immediately revealed everything without any concealment: "Not many. Besides Sun Haibo, there's another one named Xiao Bo. When Xiao Jiang was handling the case, he was the one who tripped things up and obstructed the special task force. He's just a junior officer. Speaking of Xiao Bo, he's even more of a cancer, more trouble than he's worth."

A junior officer!

Just one!

Wait a minute.

Xiao Bo?



Chapter 61 The Truth Revealed


Xiao Bo?

Is this the Xiao Bo he remembered?

Old Master Mu was a very cheerful person and approved of his children's freedom to date, without any prejudice against social status, but only if they could demonstrate their value and ability.

Knowing that Xiao Bo came from the mountains, he felt even more favorably disposed towards him and immediately gave him a small test: if he was capable, he wouldn't object even if Xiao Bo married his only granddaughter, Mu Ya.

This condition seemed difficult, but it was actually easy to achieve with some effort—simply a promotion a year early and outstanding performance would suffice.

Just now, Old Master Mu had even praised him lavishly.

He thought that with Xiao Bo's many achievements these past few days, given his close relationship with Xiao Jiang, he must have also made significant contributions, exceeding expectations.

But he never expected this!

He heard this name at this moment! He had assumed it would be at the awards ceremony!

"Xiao Bo?" Old Master Mu exclaimed in surprise.

Shen Han scratched his head and said, "That's right. This Xiao Bo is extremely jealous. He went to Comrade Jiang's house specifically when Old Gao came to the Municipal Bureau, and persuaded Comrade Jiang's mother to help him get a job through connections, deliberately setting a trap for Comrade Jiang so that Old Gao would misunderstand him."

He knew this matter clearly. Gao Xiaolong was also present when the misunderstanding was cleared up and the truth was revealed. Therefore, Gao Xiaolong nodded in agreement, indicating that what he said was correct.

Buzz!!!

Old Mu was dumbfounded. Was this the refined young man he remembered? Could he be so vicious, even deceiving him?

"This...is it...?" Old Mu opened his mouth, wanting to ask if there was a mistake?

But the next moment, Shen Han's voice continued, "Not only that, because Xiao Jiang performed so well, I specifically investigated and learned about Comrade Xiao Jiang. I discovered that this Xiao Bo, out of jealousy that Comrade Xiao Jiang has a bureau chief father, secretly slept with all the women Comrade Xiao Jiang hadn't touched and had been pursuing, to satisfy his perverted desires. While Comrade Xiao Jiang was arresting and killing the notorious drug dealer Bo Yun, this Xiao Bo was in a hotel with one of the women Comrade Xiao Jiang was pursuing."

Bang!!!

Good heavens.

Even just hearing about it, let alone experiencing it firsthand, made even someone as composed as Old Mu slam his fist on the table and stand up.

Gao Xiaolong's expression turned serious; he didn't know about this.

However, Shen Han had recently taken a liking to Jiang Tian, ​​so he had been paying close attention.

Because of her investigation into Jiang Tian's past relationships, Shen Han couldn't help but gasp when she learned the truth.

She didn't react because the drug dealers were the priority, especially with the recent order from the Ministry of Public Security to crack the case, so she put these matters aside for now and wanted to ask Comrade Xiao Jiang how to handle it.

"Absurd! Utterly absurd!" Old Master Mu roared in fury.

Gao Xiaolong glanced at the enraged Old Master Mu, bewildered. He couldn't understand why Old Master Mu was even angrier than him. Did Old Master Mu know Comrade Xiao Jiang?

"A cancer! This is a cancer, a black sheep!" Old Master Mu continued his tirade.

How could Gao Xiaolong know that Old Master Mu's fury stemmed more from being deceived by Xiao Bo's true nature?

He hadn't even realized that Xiao Bo was such a beast.

"By the way, you just said that the Municipal Narcotics Control Team has a young man even more outstanding than Xiao Jiang, and they're short-handed right now. What's his name? How about we transfer him to the special task force?" Gao Xiaolong asked with great interest.

These kinds of things are handled by subordinates.

As the saying goes, high-ranking officials don't oppress those below them.

At Xiao Bo's level, even if Song Liguo tried to suppress him, it would be beneath him.

These high-ranking leaders wouldn't overstep their bounds to pressure someone.

Gao Xiaolong was merely expressing his opinion; the rest would be handled by Shen Han. Right now, Gao Xiaolong most wanted to know about that outstanding young man.

At this point, Old Mu's expression changed, and his tone became somewhat hesitant.

After reporting his work, Shen Han also knew what to do.

After finishing the call, he entered the room, glanced at Sun Haibo and Xiao Bo without saying anything, and then turned to look kindly at Jiang Tian.

Actually, Jiang Tian didn't have time to deal with Sun Haibo and the others right now.

At this point...

The outcome was decided.

Sun Haibo is finished, Jiang Tian knows it perfectly well. As for Xiao Bo, without those damned opportunities, relying solely on scheming and plotting, he had little hope to gain in this life. Besides, Xiao Bo's reputation is now completely ruined; his colleagues avoid him like the plague.

Because everyone knows that Xiao Bo, out of jealousy of Jiang Tian, ​​slept with the woman Jiang Tian was pursuing.

Who would dare associate with a cancer like Xiao Bo? What if he takes a dislike to you and cheats on you?

In other words, by revealing this stain on his reputation, Jiang Tian successfully evoked empathy, and from another angle, even mitigated some of the potential repercussions of his initial frenzy of self-promotion.

Once Jiang Tian has the time, Sun Haibo's transfer won't be so easy. Jiang Tian's style is either not to act at all, or when he does, he acts decisively, eliminating him completely.

Having the time to act means the end for Sun Haibo; the crimes he committed are enough to warrant execution.

"Since that's the case, why bother?" Jiang Tian's gaze fell on the report in the lab technician's hand.

Right after the interrogation, Jiang Tian immediately ordered the lab technician to collect the cafeteria food for testing. Because it was expedited, the results were quickly obtained.

"Captain Jiang, this is the test report. The food does indeed contain a large amount of opium, which is extremely harmful to the body and may even cause sudden death." The lab technician's words were like a cataclysmic event.

The sky had fallen.

It was utterly devastating.

Everyone's eyes widened.

Sun Haibo even staggered, nearly collapsing to the ground.

Because he knew, this was utterly finished.

A joke.

Even if the news got out, the entire city bureau would become a laughingstock.

The terror of this responsibility was immense. Even if nothing had happened today, even if Sun Haibo did nothing, his act of contracting the cafeteria to Zhang Zheng made him the primary person responsible, and he absolutely could not escape it.

Because it was too insane.

The kind that shatters the heavens and earth.

"Are you even human?" Jiang Tian, ​​breaking out in a cold sweat, slammed his baton down on him and cursed angrily.

Luckily, it was discovered early. If people had been eating this stuff year after year, it could have killed them even if they weren't sick. Would the entire city police department have fallen into chaos then?

Hiss!!!

It's practically digging up foundations.

The first crime was shocking. Jiang Tian was eagerly anticipating what would happen next, and before he could even process it all, Zhang Zheng began to confess everything.

Jiang Tian listened intently, his face full of seriousness, because he desperately wanted to know what the mastermind behind this was planning.

And, was Gao Xiaolong's ambush on the night he traveled through time orchestrated?

If it was a coincidence, that would be one thing, but if it was truly pre-planned, Jiang Tian simply couldn't believe that such a daring person existed.

"Who's behind you?" Jiang Tian couldn't sit still any longer.

No, this dangerous person had to be beaten to death with a baton.

This ruthless and audacious person couldn't be allowed to live.

Zhang Zheng wiped his blood-soaked face and said, "Have you heard? Mr. Yun, he was the one who initially ordered me to poison you, but the dosage was always controlled. Starting three days ago, he instructed me to increase the dosage, even wanting me to find an opportunity to put oxytocin in your water dispensers—a lethal dose—but I didn't dare, and I didn't find the opportunity."

Hiss!!!

Damn!!!

Jiang Tian's scalp tingled.

It was impossible to guard against.

These drug dealers were utterly vicious.

Wait, three days ago?

Jiang Tian stood up, squinting, and said, "Three days ago, the night of the operation to arrest Tu Cha."

Sure enough.

Jiang Tian's spirits lifted. He was now 100% certain that Gao Xiaolong's past life wasn't an accident; it had been planned.

And the mastermind behind it all was this so-called Mr. Yun.

Everyone in the room was stunned.

That was close.

"Damn, that was close!"

"From another perspective, Jiang Tian practically saved them!"

"What's his name? Where is he?" Jiang Tian was furious. Damn it, his past life was so miserable; besides Xiao Bo and Wang Yifei, Gao Xiaolong's death was the fatal cause.

"Very good, this Mr. Yun now has a reason to die."

"I don't know. I don't know his real name, I don't even know what he looks like. He's very mysterious; he only contacts me with anonymous SIM cards." Zhang Zheng shook his head.

"The trail has gone cold." Miss Qiu, with her deadpan eyes, finally spoke. Based on her criminal investigation experience, at this stage, it's basically impossible to find anything.

Jiang Tian didn't speak. The name Mr. Yun sounded somewhat familiar to him. He was certain he had heard this name in his past life. With his extraordinary memory, Jiang Tian kept trying to recall.

But just then, Jiang Tian looked up and saw Xiao Bo staring at him with a face full of jealousy and hatred.

Because at this moment, even Shen Han was standing behind Jiang Tian watching without participating.

Miss Qiu scrutinized Zhang Zheng with deadpan eyes and an expressionless face.

Everyone watched Jiang Tian's performance.

Xiao Bo's eyes, however, were practically conjunctivated with anxiety. Seeing Jiang Tian about to achieve another merit was more unbearable than death itself.

The most terrifying thing was that he not only could watch, but he was also directly facing a severe punishment.

Of course, Xiao Bo was unaware that he was completely ruined, his reputation utterly destroyed. Forget about his political future; even his own future—being entangled with Wang Yifei's entire family—was a nightmare Jiang Tian knew all too well.

So Jiang Tian ignored him, instead stroking his chin. The information about Mr. Yun was becoming increasingly clear. It seemed that in his previous life, a few days after Gao Xiaolong's death and shortly after his mother's arrest, Jiang Tian was drowning his sorrows in a bar late at night when he encountered a man who called himself Mr. Yun.

At the time, Mr. Yun looked down at him with a mocking smile. Jiang Tian had been baffled then, but now, he was completely energized. That mocking expression must have been that of a victor admiring their spoils, treating him as a prize.

Back then, Mr. Yun stood there so elegant and aloof, even inspiring immense envy in Jiang Tian.

That bar.

Jiang Tian's eyes grew brighter and brighter. Mainly, after so many years, such a small incident was something he wouldn't have remembered at all if it weren't for his extraordinary memory.

"A clue has been found."



Chapter 62 What goes around comes around, Bozi, it's your turn to sweep the floor.


"Officer Jiang, where are you going?"

Seeing Jiang Tian leave, Miss Qiu hurriedly called out.

Regardless, at least there had been some progress, even though the trail went cold with Zhang Zheng.

"There's nothing useful here either. We don't know what he looks like, not even his age. We've never met him. All our contact is through anonymous phone cards. Continuing the interrogation is pointless. I'm going out to look for clues," Jiang Tian explained.

Actually, Jiang Tian checked the time; it was already noon.

His date with Mu Ya was about to begin.

Good heavens.

His date with Mu Ya! How could Jiang Tian be late?

"Going out to look for clues?" Miss Qiu looked bewildered.

How could he go out to look for clues?

Right now, Zhang Zheng was the only one who knew. At least, he could make some arrangements, using Zhang Zheng as a pawn.

“You don’t think Mr. Yun was unaware that we interrogated and arrested Zhang Zheng, do you? He probably received the news long ago. Using Zhang Zheng to set up a scheme is impossible. Let me see if there are any other clues,” Jiang Tian said.

Currently, Jiang Tian has two first-class merits and one second-class merit, which are still being applied for.

But Jiang Tian wouldn’t let go of any opportunity to earn merit.

Especially this Mr. Yun.

In his previous life, if it weren’t for the other party’s despicable mockery and even arrogant attitude, Jiang Tian would never have remembered such a trivial matter, even with his extraordinary memory.

From a criminal investigation perspective, Mr. Yun’s behavior is a typical psychological response of a criminal to visit the crime scene after the crime.

The difference is that after harming Gao Xiaolong and even destroying countless anti-drug police officers, this so-called Mr. Yun, in his previous life, went to him, the primary victim, to see his miserable state.

Furthermore, when Mr. Yun appeared, there was a large crowd gathered at the bar.

Therefore, Jiang Tian was certain that even if Mr. Yun wasn't there, there were definitely clues about him in that bar.

Thinking this, Jiang Tian said goodbye to everyone.

"Wait for me, I'm coming with you." Miss Qiu chased after Jiang Tian.

"No way." Jiang Tian shook his head directly.

What a joke! This is a date, what would it be like to bring you along?

"The team leader asked you to protect me." Miss Qiu stared intently at Jiang Tian with her deadpan eyes.

"Fine, fine." Jiang Tian sighed.

Damn it, no wonder Miss Qiu's disheveled appearance couldn't hide her natural beauty.

A pair of deadpan eyes, which would look ugly on others, actually added a lot of charm to Miss Qiu.

It wasn't embarrassing to take her out.

It was just a bit of a third wheel.

"Where are we going?" Miss Qiu asked.

"The Trade Building." Jiang Tian said directly.

Quite by chance, Jiang Tian remembered that the bar was located on a street not far from the Commercial Building.

In fact, because of the special task force, under the guise of investigating a case, Jiang Tian was openly driving a police van, a plain black Santana.

Ding-dong!!!

"I've arrived. I'll wait for you at the east gate of the Commercial Building."

A moment later, his phone rang.

Jiang Tian took out his phone and glanced at it.

Yes, it was a message from Mu Ya; she hadn't stood him up.

Meanwhile...

Just as Jiang Tian was leaving.

Inside the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Shen Han looked at Xiao Bo and Sun Haibo with great regret.

The transfer process for Sun Haibo had already begun.

As for Xiao Bo.

If he hadn't passed his probationary period, he would have been fired long ago, but now he was a full-fledged employee.

Fireout was out of the question.

What to do?

Shen Han stood at the door and called Jiang Tian, ​​intending to ask for his opinion.

“I think the environment here at the Municipal Public Security Bureau is bad, and I don’t know how they do their jobs. From now on, you’ll be in charge of the sanitation work here.” Jiang Tian was driving, and Miss Qiu answered the phone for him.

“That makes sense.” Director Shen’s eyes lit up. He figured he should transfer him first, so as not to add any burden to Jiang Tian.

Otherwise, he didn’t want any more trouble.

After hanging up the phone, Director Shen smiled at Xiao Bo and said, "Comrade Xiao Bo, based on your mistake, you could have even been dismissed, but now, we've decided to put you in charge of the sanitation work for your police team."

Sweeping?

Xiao Bo, who was about to leave, was completely bewildered.



Chapter 63 The Date: Yunhai Can't Allow Such an Awesome Person


Today was an absolute nightmare for Xiao Bo.

He arrogantly thought he could make a contribution, only to be brutally slapped in the face. And that wasn't all; he was ultimately relegated to cleaning.

Yes, while dismissal wasn't an option—or rather, the organization had extremely strict regulations regarding dismissal—

even for the director, suspending an ordinary employee was incredibly difficult.

That's why there's a saying: if you don't want to advance, you can disregard everyone in the organization.

But at the same time, be prepared that if you commit a serious mistake, you might be assigned to a department you'd never expect.

Cleaning?

Xiao Bo was dumbfounded.

How could this be?

Why is this happening?

Xiao Bo thought back to the past few days; he'd been thriving in the police force. How did things turn out like this?

Jiang Tian.

Yes, that's right, it was Jiang Tian.

Xiao Bo's eyes were bloodshot. If it weren't for Jiang Tian, ​​he would still be just as outstanding, even with Sun Haibo's mentorship.

But now...

Xiao Bo looked at Sun Haibo's gloomy face, and his heart skipped a beat.

"Useless! I think you're the useless one! You call Jiang Tian useless every day, but have you ever done anything meritorious? You're always spreading rumors and inciting me to oppose Xiao Jiang. If it weren't for you, how could I have been transferred?"

Sun Haibo was even more furious.

In fact, Sun Haibo's conflict with Jiang Tian and Jiang Peng stemmed from Xiao Bo's instigation, starting by calling Jiang Tian useless.

By using this "useless" label, they could easily bring down Jiang Peng.

At the time, Jiang Tian did indeed seem somewhat useless, and Sun Haibo believed him. After all, Xiao Bo had schemed against Jiang Tian so much, and back then, Jiang Tian was still serving him tea and water.

And now...

Wait…

Sun Haibo suddenly glared, his eyes bloodshot. “Xiao Bo, you beast! Did you conspire with Jiang Tian all along, working with that father and son to openly target them, but actually to get rid of me?”

Yes, that’s right.

If not, why would someone change so drastically?

Jiang Tian was hiding his true intentions from the start, definitely to get rid of him.

“Director Sun, believe me, I didn’t,” Xiao Bo tried to explain, his scalp tingling.

If he lost Sun Haibo’s support now, Xiao Bo would truly have nothing.

After all, even if Sun Haibo was transferred, his rank was still there.

Even if he went to a retirement department, it would be easy for him. Besides, Sun Haibo had connections within the system; if he were willing to help him…

Xiao Bo might still have a chance to turn things around, to meet the conditions set by Mu Ya’s family, and then seek Mu Ya’s forgiveness. Yes, Xiao Bo still harbored a huge illusion about Mu Ya.

"Even now, you're still pretending in front of me. Let me tell you, you're the one who did this today. If I don't get away with it, I'll make sure you die with me!" Sun Haibo said angrily before turning and leaving.

Xiao Bo was so frustrated he almost vomited blood.

Of course, in stark contrast to Xiao Bo's miserable state was Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian brought Zhu Tianqiu to the commercial building and met Mu Ya. Upon meeting, Jiang Tian noticed that Mu Ya had changed into a pristine white dress.

It's settled.

Jiang Tian's eyes lit up. No wonder, today Mu Ya, with her light makeup, was a beautiful sight standing at the entrance of the commercial building.

In his past life, Jiang Tian was currently in a state of utter despair and deep pain. In his past life, Xiao Bo was enjoying immense success, relying on the connections left by Jiang Tian's family, achieving success in both career and love, advancing in his career, and even winning Mu Ya's heart, reaching the pinnacle of his life. Jiang Tian, ​​on the other hand, was living a life of unbearable suffering.

But in this life, things were completely reversed without him realizing it. Jiang Tian had been promoted, received a raise, and achieved success in both career and love, while Xiao Bo had unknowingly fallen into the depths of despair.

Jiang Tian smiled slightly. No, this wasn't enough.

"The Municipal Bureau has encountered an important case," Jiang Tian explained and apologized to Mu Ya, regaining his composure.

“I haven’t been here long. The case is the most important.” Mu Ya smiled broadly at Zhu Tianqiu.

“My name is Zhu Tianqiu. I’m from the criminal investigation team. There’s an important case right now, and I need to be with Officer Jiang. You don’t mind, do you?” Zhu Tianqiu’s deadpan expression remained unchanged; Jiang Tian was used to it.

Mu Ya nodded, then smiled and said, “Not at all, not at all.”

As she spoke, Mu Ya moved slightly closer to Jiang Tian, ​​and Jiang Tian casually took her hand.

This made Mu Ya slightly startled, her face instantly turning red. However, to Jiang Tian’s delight, even though Mu Ya was so nervous, she only pretended to struggle a couple of times before giving up.

No matter how clever she was, this was still the first time Mu Ya had been so close to a boy.

Oh right, except for last night with Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian’s smile widened. Touching Mu Ya’s sweaty hand, Jiang Tian instantly understood: Mu Ya and Xiao Bo definitely hadn’t made any progress yet.

"My treat today!" Jiang Tian said happily, waving his hand.

"You've struck it rich?" Mu Ya asked in surprise.

"Hahaha, you forgot? The escaped convict who kidnapped you has a 300,000 yuan bounty on his head," Jiang Tian explained.

That's right, the escaped convict who kidnapped Mu Ya last night is a Class A wanted criminal with a 300,000 yuan bounty.

Although the reward hasn't been announced yet, Jiang Tian already has the 50,000 yuan reward he received previously.

And once the first-class merit award is granted, Jiang Tian's "God of Wealth's Blessing" will arrive, and he won't be short of money at all.

While Jiang Tian was accompanying Mu Ya shopping, he was actually constantly observing the scanning radar.

The commercial building was very close to the bar from Jiang Tian's previous life, so while they were shopping, the kilometer-long radar could cover the bar.

Meanwhile, in a private room on the second floor of the bar...

A man in black was peering through binoculars at the commercial building. After a long pause, he slowly spoke, "The target has appeared."

"Appeared?"

Inside the private room, a man's face wore a faint sneer.

A long scar ran across his face, resembling a centipede, quite frightening.

Yet, at this moment, the scarred man stood respectfully beside the sofa.

On the sofa sat a man in a white suit and tie, slowly slicing an apple with a dagger.

“This Jiang Tian has been acting very aggressively these past few days. Not only did he cut off Wei Youdao's connection, but I also received information that he turned the operation a few days ago around. Find a way to kill him first, his whole family.” The white-collar worker raised his head as he spoke.

A man nearing forty gradually appeared, his face devoid of any emotional fluctuation as he spoke, as nonchalantly as if he had just killed a cat or dog. Clearly, this wasn't the first time he'd done something like this.

After a moment of silence, the man slowly spoke: “Just take him out at the trading company. The drug enforcement can't tolerate someone this powerful.”

These words sounded like an order, or a death sentence.

“Mr. Yun, please rest assured, we have prepared enough C4. No matter how powerful he is, he won't escape. Besides, it's Old Chen leading the operation; he's never failed.” The scarred man said respectfully.

"Hmm, Old Chen's actions are indeed foolproof."

Only now did Mr. Yun finally finish slicing the apple, pick up a piece with the knife, and elegantly eat it.

While eating the apple, Mr. Yun stood up with his hands behind his back. From here, one could even see Jiang Tian with two women walking towards the commercial building: "Two women to accompany him in death, that's quite a reward for him."

"But Mr. Yun, isn't killing him with a high-explosive bomb a waste of talent? Won't it attract the attention of higher-ups?" Scarface asked worriedly.

Mr. Yun turned around, expressionless, and said, "That's precisely why I need to use drastic measures to make a statement. You don't know, many people in Yunhai and even back home are already mocking me. If I don't do something, where will my reputation be? This bastard has repeatedly ruined the plan; he can't be allowed to live."

*Crack!*

But, just then, a crisp sound of breaking echoed from the doorway.

Everyone in the room turned to look instantly. Almost immediately, they saw a woman dressed as a waitress standing in the doorway, holding a fruit platter, trembling and looking at them with terror.

"Did you all hear that?" Mr. Yun's lips curled slightly as he waved to the waitress.

The waitress, utterly terrified, turned to run, but bumped into a strong chest.

With a thud, the waitress fell to the ground.

The scarred man strode over angrily, grabbed the waitress's hair, and yelled, "You bitch, you heard me and you think you can run away?"

*Slap!*



Chapter 64: TNT Appears? Killed Before Even Making a Move!


*Slap!*

With that, Scarface slapped her across the face, showing no mercy.

The waitress pleaded, but Scarface grabbed her hair and dragged her into the private room.

But they were unaware.

At this moment, Jiang Tian, ​​though accompanied by two women, was already excitedly watching the scanning radar.

Yes, he hadn't made a mistake.

It really was this bar.

Good heavens! Jiang Tian looked at the huge red dot on the scanning radar; it was the largest he had seen since acquiring it.

Right now, the red dot was inside the bar from his past life's memories.

But that wasn't all.

Just then, another blood-red dot appeared on Jiang Tian's radar, one that had been following him since he appeared at the commercial building.

"Being followed?"

Jiang Tian was startled, but then he suddenly realized that if it were a follower, his scanning radar couldn't possibly have missed it.

This is the terrifying aspect of scanning radar; it can instantly pinpoint an enemy's exact location within a kilometer. Give Jiang Tian a gun, and he wouldn't even need an 8x scope; he could kill with a single shot from a kilometer away.

"What's wrong?" Miss Qiu asked Jiang Tian absentmindedly.

"That person behind us has been following us for a long time, and he's wearing a mask. His target might be us. Be careful," Jiang Tian said.

However, he was also highly skilled and daring, confident that if the other party actually fired, he could take the two women and hide.

He just wanted to see what the person behind them was up to.

"Hiss, you actually noticed! How did you know there were clues as soon as we came out?" Miss Qiu was completely bewildered.

She had initially thought Jiang Tian was using his position for personal reasons to go on a date, but now Miss Qiu realized she had completely misunderstood him.

See? This was definitely all part of Officer Jiang's plan.

“I just know these drug dealers. They've killed so many, and even arrested Zhang Zheng and Wei Youdao. Even if I didn't want to provoke them, Mr. Yun definitely wouldn't sit idly by,” Jiang Tian chuckled.

He knew all too well the arrogance and ruthlessness of these drug dealers.

Jiang Tian even believed they were capable of retaliating against his entire family.

They might already be doing it.

Not only had he not shown up, but Jiang Tian had even come to Mr. Yun's headquarters. It would be strange if Mr. Yun didn't take action upon seeing his enemy.

They might already be plotting against Jiang Tian's family.

But some things had to be done.

Having done it, to protect his family's safety, Jiang Tian had no choice but to take the initiative.

“You’re very strong,” Miss Qiu said after staring blankly at Jiang Tian for a moment with lifeless eyes.

Jiang Tian's lips twitched. He couldn't help but find those dead fish eyes so adorable.

After strolling around for a bit,

in a women's clothing store, Mu Ya handed her bag to Jiang Tian and went to the fitting room to change into a dress.

Jiang Tian sat on the sofa in the rest area, closing his eyes to rest, but actually, he kept glancing at the entrance.

Sure enough, a moment later,

a man wearing a mask pretended to look at clothes.

Then, he went to the corner of the clothes rack, secretly took out a soft, strange object from inside his clothes, and quietly placed it in the lining of the garment under the rack.

"Heh, nothing special." The man's lips curled into a smirk, and he was about to stand up.

But the next moment, his shoulder suddenly slumped, followed by a terrifying, excruciating pain.

A pain that pierced to the bone.

And then, *crack!*

A crisp sound rang out.

The masked man's face was deathly pale; he trembled all over because his shoulder blade was broken.

That's right.

Damn it, his shoulder blade was broken?

He stiffly turned his neck and saw a hand on his shoulder. That meant someone had just slapped him on the shoulder, breaking his shoulder blade?

He couldn't lift his entire arm, and he could even clearly feel waves of intense pain brewing within him.

So much adrenaline caused him a dull ache.

One could imagine the terrifying pain that awaited him once he calmed down after the injury.

However, his endurance surprised Jiang Tian.

He'd broken a shoulder blade with a single slap, and although his face was covered in cold sweat, he only let out a muffled groan without crying out. Jiang Tian had never seen such endurance before.

"Come on, let me see what you've put here." Jiang Tian bent down and searched the inner pocket of his clothes.

But the next moment.

The masked man suddenly pulled out a controller with a red button from his pocket, intending to operate it.

But while he was fast, Jiang Tian was even faster.

With almost instantaneous speed, he pulled a police baton from his back and smashed it against the masked man's wrist with a single blow, before the remote control even fell to the ground.

To be honest, the speed was so fast that the masked man, who was closest to him, didn't even see any movement. The remote control with the red button was already in Jiang Tian's hand before it even hit the ground.

Even now, Jiang Tian was still holding something soft and mushy in his hand.

Jiang Tian squeezed it; it was very soft, like a lump of mud.

But...

Jiang Tian, ​​putting aside everything else, had exceptional police academy knowledge. He recognized this thing.

TNT?

Damn it.

Jiang Tian's pupils contracted. Good heavens.

To take him down with such a massive operation?

What audacity.

But at this moment, the most bewildered was the masked man.

He stared at the TNT and remote control in Jiang Tian's hand, racking his brains trying to understand how these two things had suddenly appeared in Jiang Tian's possession.

Broken wrist, broken shoulder blade.

Severe injuries, yet the masked man didn't utter a sound. Most importantly, not only did he not utter a sound, but he even turned and tried to run.

Trying to run?

Jiang Tian sneered, holding his baton.

Bang!!!

A police baton struck the masked man squarely on the head, drawing blood. The man was thrown to the ground, struggling.

But Jiang Tian showed no mercy.

To be honest, without the scanning radar, Jiang Tian couldn't even imagine what would happen.

If this makeshift C4 detonated, not only the mall, but even the nearby shops, with dozens of people, would likely be wiped out.

This was utter lawlessness.

This was utter madness.

The more he thought about it, the more frightened he became, and Jiang Tian's blows grew increasingly brutal.

Therefore...

When Mu Ya emerged from the changing room, wanting to show off her new dress to Officer Jiang, she was met with a scene that left her utterly bewildered.

Jiang Tian was frantically beating a masked man with a baton.

The masked man was writhing on the ground in pain.

“This?”

Mu Ya’s beautiful eyes widened. Before she could speak, Jiang Tian shoved a soft, squishy object into her hand.

“What is this?” Mu Ya asked, bewildered.

“TNT.” Jiang Tian, ​​holding the baton, bent over and began to strike the masked man.

*Thud!*

“What?”

“A drug dealer, a criminal. I didn’t even go looking for him, and he sent people to find me first, and he dares to retaliate?” Jiang Tian grew increasingly furious.

He had endured too much injustice in his past life; in his rebirth, he was most averse to being wronged.

Anyone who dared to wrong him would trigger a violent reaction from him.

"TNT?"

"This?"

Not to mention Mu Ya, even Zhu Tianqiu was stunned upon hearing the name TNT.

Looking at the object in Mu Ya's hand, it was indeed soft and squishy, ​​and even came with a remote control—it really looked like TNT.

Hiss!!!

If this were real, this wouldn't be a small case.

And this was in a public place. Detonating TNT, especially with the amount Mu Ya had—any more and the mall would probably collapse.

What if this hadn't been discovered beforehand?

"I...I'll report to the team leader immediately." Zhu Tianqiu's scalp tingled, and even his deadpan eyes showed a slight change.

Meanwhile, the masked man lying on the ground had his hat knocked off, his head covered in blood. Outside the shop, a crowd of onlookers had gathered, some even holding up their phones to film.

"Someone's being hit! Look, someone's being hit!"

"Quick, take a picture! Is this person crazy? They're going to kill someone!"

"How could you do this?"

"It's so horrible!"

At the shop entrance, among the twenty-odd people gathered, two young men and women were pointing and whispering angrily at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian suddenly turned his head and frowned, saying, "What are you saying?"



Chapter 65 Condemned by All? The Criminal Takes Hostages


No, that's not right.

Jiang Tian raised an eyebrow.

Suddenly, he recognized the two people leading the accusations. He recognized them, and in fact, he was very familiar with them in his past life.

This was Xiao Bo's sister. Jiang Tian hadn't expected to run into her here.

And the man, Jiang Tian also recognized him.

Xiao Bo's sister-in-law from his past life.

But after a quick glance, Jiang Tian realized that the two were currently in the early stages of a passionate romance.

Xiao Yuan.

Jiang Tian hated this woman terribly in his past life. This woman, relying on her familiarity with Wang Yifei, had actually given him advice and criticized him in front of Wang Yifei.

In fact, this woman was responsible for 90% of the reason Wang Yifei was able to go out on dates with Xiao Bo so easily. It was always Xiao Yuan who invited them out, and if Jiang Tian ever expressed any disagreement, this woman would immediately accuse him of being stingy, and what kind of man he was.

Jiang Tian remembered Xiao Yuan's husband clearly. He too had been deceived by Xiao Yuan at first, and in the end, his fate was no different from his own.

In his past life, Xiao Bo had risen to power, and this man, though owning a house in Yunhai, was dependent on Xiao Bo's influence. Essentially, he was the kind of person who knew he'd been cuckolded but could only endure it.

Now, these two were standing together on a moral high ground to condemn him?

Jiang Tian almost laughed.

"What are you laughing at? You almost killed someone! This is illegal! We've already called the police!" Xiao Yuan shouted at Jiang Tian, ​​her head held high.

"Young man, adults are breaking the law."

"Yes, young man, put down your weapon."

"You're not that old. No matter what happened, you can't resort to violence!"

So, ordinary people are most easily swayed. With Xiao Yuan leading the charge, others began to condemn Jiang Tian, ​​and for a moment, it seemed like everyone was pointing fingers at him.

Seeing so many people helping her, Xiao Yuan became even more confident. She took two steps forward and said to Jiang Tian, ​​"You should apologize to him immediately, compensate him for his losses, and take him to the hospital. Otherwise, we passersby won't let you off the hook. You don't want to be beaten so badly, do you?"

Looking at the approaching Xiao Yuan, Jiang Tian wanted to laugh.

If he hadn't discovered it beforehand, these people would have been dead long ago.

With that level of TNT, it wouldn't just collapse the commercial building, but it would easily kill dozens of people in several nearby shops.

If it exploded on a load-bearing pillar, it would be enough to collapse the entire commercial building, instantly killing thousands of people, including tourists and those working in the upper floors.

Therefore…

*Slap!*

Jiang Tian slapped her across the face.

Xiao Yuan covered her face in disbelief: "You thug, how dare you hit me! You bastard!"

Having been pampered since childhood, Xiao Yuan had never experienced such anger before.

But before she could finish her sentence, Jiang Tian struck Xiao Yuan with his baton with a bang, knocking her to the ground.

Wow!!!

The crowd erupted in uproar.

After all, although Xiao Yuan was vicious in her later life, on the surface, she was still a young girl, easily evoking sympathy.

"Let go of Yuan Yuan, you bastard!" Xiao Yuan's boyfriend tried to rush forward.

Jiang Tian brandished his baton. Putting everything else aside, Jiang Tian couldn't stand being wronged. He'd suffered so much injustice before his rebirth, and now he was suffering even more after? What was the point of his rebirth?

He was about to step forward, baton in hand.

"You bastard!" Xiao Yuan's boyfriend roared.

He stepped between Jiang Tian and Xiao Yuan.

At that moment, the crowd surged forward.

Not only did they block the distance between Jiang Tian and Xiao Yuan, but they also blocked the way for the masked man.

This led to...

"Young man, don't make another mistake," an old man stepped forward, his face filled with anger.

It must be said, the public's moral character was quite good.

Many people were condemning Jiang Tian.

They accused him of injuring an innocent person, saying that no matter what the conflict, this method was unacceptable, etc.

But the next moment...

"Let him go! All of you, get out of the way! Get out of the way now, or I'll kill this woman!"

A hurried, fierce, and murderous voice came from behind the crowd.



Chapter 66 Being a police god is really difficult


Xiao Yuan stared in terror at the man who had taken her hostage behind her, his blood slowly dripping down her face.

But this only intensified her horror.

Because at that moment, the man, seemingly out of nowhere, held a dagger to her neck.

Boom!!!

It exploded.

Everyone at the scene turned around in shock to see what was happening.

They saw the man they had just rescued now holding the girl who had stood up for him hostage.

What was this?

What had happened?

They were completely bewildered.

Especially the elderly man following them, who had a rather refined air about him, stared in utter astonishment behind him, then at Jiang Tian.

"Yuanyuan!" Xiao Yuan's boyfriend cried out in panic.

What had happened? What on earth had happened?

"Young man, what just happened?" The refined old man approached Jiang Tian, ​​his face filled with astonishment.

Jiang Tian sneered, then put his hand in his pocket and pulled out his identification: "I'm the squad leader of the Municipal Narcotics Control Detachment. This gentleman next to me is a crime-solving expert from the Criminal Investigation Detachment. We were just apprehending a criminal who attempted a terrorist attack."

BOOM!!!

Upon seeing the identification in Jiang Tian's hand, everyone present instantly exploded, their faces contorted in shock.

Especially thinking about their earlier accusations, their faces involuntarily turned bright red—a deep, visibly red.

They had just wronged Jiang Tian.

Shame.

Everyone was filled with shame.

"Officer, we didn't know what happened. We're truly sorry," the old man said, his face flushed with shame, yet he still forced apologetic.

They'd caused trouble.

At this point, even they had to admit they'd caused trouble.

In fact, if they encountered someone difficult to talk to, they could be charged with obstructing official business, since their actions had led to serious consequences.

"It's alright. Seeing such compassion in society shows your good intentions, which are commendable. However, you should think twice before acting so impulsively in the future." Jiang Tian expressionlessly retrieved his identification.

Hiss!!!

Jiang Tian's words instantly filled the crowd with gratitude.

This was equivalent to Jiang Tian not pursuing the matter and even praising them so highly. Think about what they had just done?

"You were on a mission, why didn't you tell me? Why? Get me out of here! My older brother is in your team too!" Xiao Yuan, filled with fear, looked at Jiang Tian and instantly erupted in rage.

"Young lady, how can you talk like that?"

"You tricked us into standing up and hindering Officer Jiang's mission. I think you deserve it."

"Yes, Officer Jiang, this woman isn't a good person. She might be in cahoots with that robber, deliberately misleading us into wanting to rescue him."

"That makes sense."

"Yeah, that woman is really vicious!"

Public opinion changed drastically. Jiang Tian raised an eyebrow, looking at the crowd defending him, a relieved smile appearing on his face.

His efforts in fighting crime hadn't been in vain.

The public still supports these heroic police officers on duty!

The police are one family.

"You, you all..." Xiao Yuan was completely stunned by the insults. After all, she was still young, and her boxing skills weren't high enough. Being hurled at and slandered by so many people instantly brought her to tears.

Jiang Tian couldn't help but sigh. If this were in later generations, someone like Xiao Yuan would be capable of anything in this situation.

"What do we do now?" Miss Qiu whispered to Jiang Tian.

"Have you reported it?" Jiang Tian asked softly.

"The team leader arrived with his men after learning about TNT." Miss Qiu clicked her tongue in amazement.

"Good. Have the team leader surround and seal off the nearby streets. This time, we've lured out a bunch of big fish." Jiang Tian grinned, a cold smile playing on his lips as he looked at the scanning radar.

As for Xiao Yuan, to Jiang Tian, ​​she was just a minor incident.

While waiting for Miss Qiu to report to the task force, Jiang Tian calmly looked at the masked man who had kidnapped Xiao Yuan and said, "You think you can escape? Don't dream."

"I'm going to report you! You're trying to save me now, knowing I'm in the hands of a criminal, yet you still threaten him. Are you deliberately trying to harm me, deliberately seeking revenge? Do you have any conscience?" Xiao Yuan dared not say anything to the criminal, but with Jiang Tian, ​​she was about to take advantage of him.

"Shut up." Jiang Tian frowned.

"I'm going to report you! You hit me! You deliberately tried to provoke the criminal to kill me!" Xiao Yuan continued.

"You're right, I can't escape."

At this moment, Jiang Tian's words seemed to strike the criminal's last psychological defense. Looking at the surrounding crowd and his own injuries, he was already dizzy. Jiang Tian's heavy blow had severely injured him, crippling one of his arms.

If it weren't for his astonishing willpower, he probably wouldn't even be able to stand up.

*Thud!*

The assailant was ruthless, almost mercilessly attempting to slit Xiao Yuan's throat.

"Hahaha, even if I die, I'll take someone down with me. A woman down with me, that'll be worth it," the assailant laughed cruelly.

But it happened in a flash.

Jiang Tian was stunned for only a moment, then cursed and drew his gun, firing: "You actually did it after I said you'd do it!"

With Jiang Tian's combat skills, he could now even kill the assailant before he could make a move.

However, the importance of this case, the assailant being a crucial witness.

On the other hand, a dead terrorist brings little merit; a living one has more value and thus more merit.

Jiang Tian was curious about the so-called achievement tasks. After completing three first-class merits, would there be further achievement tasks like five or ten first-class merits?

So, to save the perpetrator's life, the shot must be fired the instant they attack. This would perfectly disarm the perpetrator, capture them alive, and rescue the hostage.

That's right.

That's exactly it.

As for the hostage being injured, and whether the injury is fatal, that's none of Jiang Tian's concern.

After all, there's always a margin of error when firing, isn't there?

Bang!!!

A gunshot rang out.

Thud!!!

The dagger pierced Xiao Yuan's neck halfway, instantly losing all strength, and then fell to the ground.

Buzz!!!

The masked man stared blankly at Jiang Tian: "How is this possible?"

He clearly remembered Jiang Tian; he didn't have a gun just now. He was certain that when he decided to attack, Jiang Tian didn't have a gun. When was that?

What kind of speed was this?

With a thud, the masked man lost all strength, collapsing to the ground against the wall, his arms hanging limply.

Jiang Tian had broken the shoulder blade of one of his shoulders, and on the other arm, which had just been gripping the dagger, a bright red blood was flowing from it.



Chapter 67 What? It's him again? He's done it again?


"Help me! I'm injured! It's all your fault! You deserve to die! Why didn't the killer kill you?" Xiao Yuan was emotionally distraught. In this situation, she instinctively picked on the weakest link.

So...

Jiang Tian's face was icy cold. She'd become the weakest link?

"Do you have any conscience? You can't be so heartless! If Officer Jiang hadn't fired, you would have been killed by the drug dealers." Mu Ya couldn't stand it anymore.

"What does this have to do with you? If it weren't for him, I wouldn't be in this state." Xiao Yuan retorted angrily, "Do you think you can bully an ordinary citizen just because you're a police officer? My brother works for the city police too! You piece of trash, if you don't give me an explanation, I'm going to file a complaint against you!"

At this moment...

Jiang Tian was almost laughing with anger. If he hadn't acted, Xiao Yuan would have been dead already.

Ignoring her, Jiang Tian didn't bother with further words.

*Snap!*

Jiang Tian, ​​holding handcuffs, instantly handcuffed Xiao Yuan's hands: "I am now formally arresting and investigating you on suspicion of obstructing official business and endangering public safety."

Xiao Yuan was stunned.

Jiang Tian smiled coldly. Sometimes, boasting comes at a price. It just goes to show that Xiao Yuan is still too young.

Obstructing Jiang Tian from arresting terrorists.

Just this one charge, once investigated, would be enough to give Xiao Yuan a hard time.

So, this is the downside of not studying the law.

Oh right, if Jiang Tian remembered correctly, this woman, Xiao Yuan, seemed to have entered society as a delinquent at fourteen or fifteen. Oh well, never mind.

Meanwhile,

An ordinary minivan was driving towards the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Old Mu and Gao Xiaolong were sitting in the back seat, but both of them frowned as they watched a large number of people gather at the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Old Mu sighed, "To be honest, although I'm in charge of law enforcement, I feel completely constrained in many situations. This is the case throughout Yun Province, and I bear some responsibility for how things have turned out this way."

As he spoke, the car with license plate number 003 slowly drove towards the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Gao Xiaolong sighed heavily upon hearing this, but then changed the subject, saying, "Let's see what progress the Municipal Public Security Bureau has made in this case. That so-called Mr. Yun seems to be a big shot in Yunhai, but finding him won't be easy; it's a long-term battle."

Old Mu nodded solemnly, "Yes, finding him is easier said than done. But no matter how difficult, we must find him. Mr. Yun might be a key figure in Yunhai's anti-drug campaign."

The two had arrived at the Municipal Public Security Bureau by then.

The most important reason they came to inspect the Municipal Public Security Bureau was because of the discovery of this case.

The appearance of Mr. Yun, the Municipal Public Security Bureau's poisoning, and Mr. Yun himself.

These cases, each one a bombshell, were all horrific.

To poison the entire city police department and administer oxytocin.

Insane.

They were also here to check on the officers' condition.

As soon as the two got out of the car, Shen Han and Jiang Peng, along with numerous officers from the city police department, rushed to greet them.

"Secretary."

"Chief Gao."

Shen Han jogged over to greet them.

"You've gathered so many people, is there a mission?" Old Mu asked, frowning slightly.

Shen Han immediately replied, "Secretary, something terrible has happened! TNT has appeared in the Trade Building."

BOOM!!!

Old Mu and Gao Xiaolong's faces froze for a moment, then their expressions turned furious.

"TNT, a terrorist attack?"

This was no small matter. Terrorist attacks cause massive casualties, and the counter-terrorism operations are extremely drastic.

Shen Han shook his head: "It's a retaliatory operation by drug dealers against Comrade Jiang Tian. Fortunately, Comrade Jiang Tian detected it beforehand and seized the TNT and remote control immediately."

"Xiao Jiang."

Hiss!!!

Gao Xiaolong gasped.

Good heavens, another meritorious deed?

Another divine achievement?

"It's him again?" Gao Xiaolong's eyes widened.

This was purely Gao Xiaolong's subconscious reaction.

“It’s him! And I’ve already had the commercial building sealed off. Comrade Jiang Tian said his visit to the commercial building was accidental, there was absolutely no pre-arranged ambush. He discovered he was being followed and attacked only after entering the building. To be absolutely certain, he didn’t even use a gun, intending to kill himself with TNT. Clearly, they saw him enter the commercial building; there’s definitely a big fish in that area.” Shen Han said excitedly.

“What are you waiting for? Go now!” Gao Xiaolong roared angrily.

“I’ve already sent the armed police to seal it off; there will be absolutely no accidents.” Shen Han patted his chest.

“Go to the scene, now, immediately!” Old Mu also hurriedly said.

“Good, good, good! Comrade Jiang, you did a great job!”

Gao Xiaolong's voice trembled with excitement as he got into the car.

This time, almost the entire force was mobilized.

In recent days, the citizens of Yunhai had noticed a significant increase in police activity in the city.

After everyone had left,

Xiao Bo, holding a mop, gripped it tightly, his veins bulging.

He had just heard it.

It seemed Jiang Tian had performed meritorious service again?

Damn it!

"Such a big operation, it should at least be a second-class merit, right?" Xiao Bo was practically driven mad with jealousy.

Seeing Jiang Tian's merit was even harder to accept than his own punishment.

Of course, Jiang Tian was unaware of what was happening at the city police station.

At this moment, Jiang Tian approached the masked man and pulled off his mask.

Dark brown bloodstains were still visible on the mask, stuck to his face.

Although he looked filthy, Jiang Tian recognized him instantly after all these years.

That's it.

"Anything you want to say?" Jiang Tian squatted down and asked slowly.

"Being caught by you just shows I'm outmatched. I'll accept whatever sentence you give me, but as for getting me to say anything, sorry, that's impossible," the man replied.

"You think I don't know who you are just because you won't talk?" Jiang Tian sneered.

The man scoffed, "Don't try to trick me. I know a thing or two about your police interrogation methods; they won't work on me."

He still thought these were police interrogation methods, but he didn't know that whether he spoke or not, Jiang Tian had already locked onto his target.

That's right.

Jiang Tian had seen him in his past life; it was Mr. Yun.

In his past life, Jiang Tian had been drowning his sorrows in that bar when Mr. Yun came down from his private room upstairs. This same man was beside Mr. Yun, seemingly acting as a bodyguard.

"Old Chen, you think I don't know you, and Mr. Yun behind you?" Jiang Tian wiped the dirt off his hands on Old Chen.

Old Chen, still in shock, had his pupils contracting.

The reason for his shock:

It was because Old Chen's identity information was blank.

In China, he was completely unknown.

He had spent years like a shadow, hiding in bars, serving as a crucial tool for handling dirty work.

He was certain that absolutely no one knew him.

"Besides, you think that so-called Mr. Yun wanted to kill me? Why wasn't it me luring him out?" Jiang Tian stood up with a cold laugh.

Because at this moment...

Armed police had already stormed in from outside.

A terrorist attack, and a targeted attack on Jiang Tian at that—this was blatant provocation.

To be honest, Jiang Tian hadn't expected Mr. Yun to be so audacious.

"You guys negotiate with the armed police here first."

Jiang Tian glanced at the radar scanner, then immediately spoke to Miss Qiu, before turning to Mu Ya, "I'll treat you to a movie after I'm done; I have something urgent."

"Eh!!!" Miss Qiu gasped.

Actually, Jiang Tian's reason for chasing wasn't anything else, but rather that several red dots on the radar had suddenly left the bars and were moving rapidly down the street.

Trying to escape?

How could Jiang Tian let them get away?

He sped out of the commercial building, driving his Volkswagen Santana, and accelerated away.

On a street behind the commercial building, Mr. Yun sat in the back seat of a Rolls-Royce, eyes closed, resting.

The driver drove nervously in front.

"What are you so nervous about? Those guys are useless; they won't catch us," Mr. Yun said slowly.

With his eyes closed, Mr. Yun appeared completely unconcerned.

"Mr. Yun, I'm sorry, I didn't expect the mission to fail." Scarface readily admitted his mistake.

"It's not your fault. Nobody expected Old Chen to be discovered."

Speaking of the old minister, Mr. Yun's gaze darkened.

If one thought Mr. Yun had a kind personality based on his refined expression, they would be sorely mistaken.

Scarface understood this all too well, and he lowered his head in fear.



Chapter 68 Street Racing: Giving Mr. Yun a Hard Time


Mr. Yun showed no sign of tension. He merely glanced at his watch, then turned to Scarface and smiled, "Whether it's blown up or discovered, for something this big, even the nearest police reinforcements would take at least twenty minutes to cordon off the area. We have plenty of time."

It was clear that Mr. Yun was very familiar with the police's movements.

Scarface was completely relieved because Mr. Yun had never lied.

Moreover, although Old Chen's operation had been a botched failure,

Scarface had absolutely no doubt about Old Chen's loyalty.

Therefore, betraying them was impossible, absolutely impossible. He could doubt others, but on this point, he would never doubt them.

Because Scarface looked at Mr. Yun with a hint of fear. Anyone who showed the slightest disloyalty or dishonesty had been killed by Mr. Yun using various methods.

Not only killed, but their families would also disappear in car accidents or go missing—for various reasons. No one dared to betray Mr. Yun.

As for the police, even if they were arrested and interrogated, the police couldn't very well harm their families. Everyone has flaws, even those without families.

This is precisely how Mr. Yun controlled them. Even Scarface was controlled. So, even if some people made money and wanted to retire, they couldn't.

Thump thump thump!!!

Unfortunately.

Just as they were comfortably preparing to escape, they drove towards the mountains.

Regardless, laying low was the right thing to do. It was precisely because of this vigilance that Mr. Yun had managed to survive. As for his opponents, they were already rotting corpses.

Thump thump thump!!!

Just then, a car horn blared.

Mr. Yun was instantly enraged.

Damn it, do you know what kind of car I drive? A Rolls-Royce! What kind of junk are you driving?

Mr. Yun glanced at the small Volkswagen Santana behind him. It looked like it was about to overtake, honking its horn urgently.

"Don't let him have it, damn it, he's giving him too much face!" Mr. Yun cursed.

"You dare follow me so closely in my Rolls-Royce? If you even brush against it, his whole family will be eating a hornet's nest!"

Mr. Yun cursed inwardly.

The driver was obedient and maintained a steady speed.

Thump thump thump!!!

The horn blared incessantly, without ever letting up.

"Damn it, if it weren't for the special circumstances today, I'd get out and teach him a lesson," Mr. Yun cursed.

The next moment, Mr. Yun rolled down the window and gave the person outside the window a mocking middle finger.

The next moment!!!

Duang!!!

Mr. Yun slammed his head into the driver's seat with a thud.

*Whoosh!*

Mr. Yun was instantly enraged. Who do you think you are? What kind of car do you drive? How dare you bang your head on my car?!

I'm driving a Rolls-Royce!

Have you got a death wish?!

"Stop the car," Mr. Yun roared.

*Crack!*

Mr. Yun got out of the car, his face contorted with rage, and Scarface, the lead driver, followed closely behind, his scar on his face seemingly coming to life in his fury.

"Who, who is it?"

"You son of a bitch, get out of the car!"

"Damn it! What kind of car is that? A Rolls-Royce! That emblem alone could buy your whole family's lives!"

Scarface angrily ran up to the Santana and started punching and kicking the driver's side door.

Meanwhile, this was on a busy street.

Soon, a crowd of onlookers gathered, pointing and whispering.

A Santana crashed into a Rolls-Royce—this was big news!

"Holy crap, that Santana's in bad shape."

"A Rolls-Royce! You couldn't even buy half the emblem for that car! The back is completely smashed!"

"The Rolls-Royce guys got out. They're not to be trifled with. Damn, they've already started smashing the car. The driver in the back is doomed; he's definitely going to get beaten up."

"Yeah, I think he's going to get beaten up, and badly."

The onlookers pointed and whispered excitedly.

As for stepping forward, forget it. After all, Scarface looked fierce, and besides, the Santana was in such a hurry.

There were quite a few people gloating.

Scarface's face was full of murderous intent: "Open the door, you son of a bitch, open the door!"

Cursing, Scarface frantically pulled on the car door, the door creaking under the strain.

Click!!!

The next moment, the locked car door was finally pulled open by Scarface.

"Oh no, oh no, this driver is in big trouble!"

"This is going to be interesting."

"A Rolls-Royce! I bet five cents the driver of the car behind will be begging for mercy."

The onlookers perked up, all excitedly watching the spectacle.

Scarface also had a ferocious grin on his face. He wanted to see which little brat dared to bump into the back of his Rolls-Royce, enraging even Mr. Yun.

Today, openly and honestly, even if he's not killed, he'll teach him a lesson he'll never forget, Scarface thought to himself.

His cold gaze swept over the driver's seat, and he sneered, "Damn it, you dare hit me? Don't you know the meaning of death...?"

Halfway through his sentence, Scarface suddenly raised his hands, then trembled as he took one or two steps back from where he was pressed against the car door.

"What are you doing?" Mr. Yun was somewhat displeased at not seeing the scene of beating up the driver he wanted to see.

But unfortunately, Scarface didn't answer him. As Scarface retreated, the driver in the car also got out.

However, the first thing revealed was a dark gun barrel.

Buzz!!!

"Damn it!!!"



Chapter 69 The Nationally Famous Little Brother Tan


"Jiang Tian?"

After a long pause, Mr. Yun's expression instantly changed. His usual calm demeanor vanished, replaced by an extremely grim look.

"Recognized you. Not bad. No wonder you spotted me the moment I showed up at the Trade Building, Mr. Yun," Jiang Tian smiled slightly.

But his gaze, fixed on Mr. Yun, held a chilling coldness deep within his smiling eyes.

Damn it.

This bastard has gone to such lengths.

To retaliate against him, he even used TNT. He truly doesn't value human life.

Oh no.

It should be said that the long-standing laxity in Yunhai led to the continuous expansion of criminal forces. Eventually, even with local resources, it became impossible to control the massive and terrifying criminal organizations within Yunhai.

They were like spiders, having woven a vast and impenetrable web. But Jiang Tian's appearance was like a knife, forcefully slicing through that web.

These people have lost all humanity.

Jiang Tian has never shown any mercy to such people.

Holding a gun in one hand, Jiang Tian pulled out a police baton from his back with the other, looking at the scarred man: "So fierce, I'm so scared."

Bang!!!

These inhuman creatures need to be severely disciplined with a police baton, to be fiercely loved.

"Ah!" The scarred man was struck directly to the ground by the baton.

The force was so great that it almost instantly knocked him unconscious; it was truly ruthless, a direct blow to the face.

"It's all a misunderstanding, sir. We probably haven't met before and don't know each other. Besides, it's always good to leave room for maneuver, so you can meet again in the future. Don't be too ruthless." After the initial panic, Mr. Yun calmed down and smiled.

Jiang Tian approached expressionlessly: "Excuse me, but I'm arresting you on suspicion of terrorist attack and endangering public safety."

"Think it through. There are some things you can't do, and some people you can't afford to offend. Otherwise, not only will you be implicated, but the two girls beside you are quite pretty. Your father is a bureau chief, right? Your mother works in the finance bureau?" Mr. Yun narrowed his eyes, still showing no sign of panic, calmly revealing Jiang Tian's information.

"To be honest, you're young and have achieved a lot, enough for a promotion. Why risk yourself and even your family? You recognized me. Although I'm curious how you managed to turn Lao Chen against you, don't act impulsively. You're still young, with a bright future ahead, aren't you?"

Mr. Yun's face remained calm, showing no panic. Clearly, he had been recognized directly, and Jiang Tian had even mentioned his name.

Mr. Yun considered for a moment. Although unwilling to believe it, only Lao Chen's betrayal could have accomplished this.

But...

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a slight smile.

Mr. Yun still hadn't grasped his predicament.

He simply didn't understand that Yunhai had become a national model, that times had changed.

They dared to mess with even Gao Xiaolong; these people just didn't understand.

Now, even the entire Ministry of Public Security was closely monitoring Yunhai's every move.

Bang!!!

Before Mr. Yun could say anything more, Jiang Tian swung his baton down on his face.

He controlled the force, not enough to kill him, but there was blood and gore; his once composed and imposing face was now covered in blood.

"Times have changed. Haven't you heard the saying, 'Counter-terrorism only needs one coordinate'? Mr. Yun, you're in trouble." As Jiang Tian spoke, another baton swung down.

*Thud!*

A handgun was smashed from Mr. Yun's hand.

The next moment, Jiang Tian stomped on Mr. Yun's hand that had just held the gun, breaking it with a crack. "You've got guts! You dare to hold a gun in front of me, you bastard! A small-time drug dealer, daring to threaten the city bureau, threatening the public security department? You don't even know how to spell death!"

Mr. Yun felt like vomiting blood.

Especially when he saw the rank insignia on Jiang Tian's shoulder—one bar and two stripes—he felt like vomiting blood.

He'd spent his entire life in the underworld, wielding immense power and influence, killing countless people under his command, even causing numerous police officers to die silently while investigating him.

Years ago, he'd even managed to eliminate the city's former chief of police without a sound.

And now, damn it, he'd been publicly humiliated and trampled underfoot in the street by a mere rookie officer. Those leather shoes really hurt.

"I'm a narcotics officer from the city bureau. I'm currently arresting drug dealers. Please, citizens, do not spread this information, do not take photos, and do not spread rumors. Otherwise, you will face legal consequences," Jiang Tian shouted to the growing crowd.

Woo-hoo-hoo!!!

Just then, a rapid series of sirens blared.

Armed police arrived. A large number of officers quickly spread out to establish a perimeter, then dozens rushed in to control the crowd.

Especially with armed police vehicles parked on the road, loudspeakers repeatedly broadcasted that this was a security cordon, urging people not to gather and to leave immediately.

Fully armed, each officer carrying a submachine gun, they completely surrounded the street.

It turned out that just moments before, when the city police and armed police were responding to the cordon, they received a call reporting a gunfight in the street, with people carrying guns, etc...

They were stunned.

Shen Peng at the city police station was stunned first, then Shen Han was stunned after the news reached her, and Gao Xiaolong and Lao Mu, who were in the same car with Shen Han, were also dumbfounded.

The terrorist attack hadn't even ended, and now there was a gunfight in the street?

"Anyone who didn't know better would think they'd stumbled into Little Gotham," Gao Xiaolong said grimly.

This wasn't a joke from Gao Xiaolong.

Many people were indeed mocking the chaos and disorder in Yunhai, and there was a saying circulating: "All the drugs in the world originate in Yunhai."

And the nickname "Little Gotham" had naturally spread.

Fortunately, they were very close to the street, just two intersections away. After they found out, Gao Xiaolong immediately decided to go check out the situation on the other side of the street.

The other group went to the commercial building.

"One problem after another, that Mr. Yun is too ruthless. I wonder when we'll catch him," Shen Han said, trembling with worry in the car.

There was no way around it; both Gao Xiaolong and Lao Mu were people he had to look up to.

They might seem powerful and high-ranking on the outside, but in front of these two big shots, neither of them was someone he could afford to offend.

“What’s the situation up ahead?”

Their car stopped on the outskirts of the street. Gao Xiaolong got out and frowned, asking Wei Xun, the second captain of the Municipal Public Security Bureau’s Narcotics Control Detachment, who was approaching.

Wei Xun took a deep breath to calm himself down, then said to Gao Xiaolong, “Sir, we’ve caught him. It’s Comrade Jiang Tian. He’s arrested Mr. Yun.”

“Oh, arrested a criminal!”

Huh?

“Wait, who did you say you arrested?” Gao Xiaolong suddenly snapped out of his daze and asked, his face full of shock.

“Mr. Yun has been knocked unconscious by Comrade Jiang with a baton, but Comrade Jiang is very certain that it’s Mr. Yun.” Wei Xun took a deep breath.

Buzz!!

Having received confirmation, Gao Xiaolong shook his head, trying to remain calm. However, after holding it in for a while, he couldn't help but burst into laughter: "Good, good, good, hahaha!"

As he spoke, Gao Xiaolong's eyes shone. He had wondered if Jiang Tian's string of achievements might have made him arrogant, or if he might have pushed him too hard, ultimately destroying his potential.

But now, Gao Xiaolong finally knew that he hadn't pushed him too hard.

Therefore, Gao Xiaolong immediately exclaimed with bright joy, "True talent can withstand any test!"

However, Gao Xiaolong suddenly turned his head and asked, "Isn't Jiang Tian in the Trade Building?"



Chapter 70: Solving the Case in a Meticulous Three Hours, Shocking the Entire Audience


"Just now at the commercial building, but he spotted Mr. Yun beforehand. He wasn't entirely sure at the time, but after seeing him, Comrade Jiang Tian said he was absolutely certain."

As he spoke,

Gao Xiaolong led his men directly into the street.

As for whether Jiang Tian would lie, how could that be?

It was a classic case of killing two birds with one stone.

The police report stated that the driver who hit the person had a gun, and the person who was hit also dropped a handgun. It was killing two birds with one stone; the perpetrator was definitely not going to escape.

"If he can catch them all, that's truly amazing," Old Mu said, finding it hard to believe.

Mr. Yun—although he'd only recently heard the name after Jiang Tian solved the case, and from the cafeteria owner, this man was Wei Youdao's boss, and the person behind Wei Youdao.

He even killed Wei Youdao and Wei Rong, among others.

It's safe to say this person's crimes are countless, but the most terrifying thing is that he has no name, not even an age or gender. Even the name "Mr. Yun" is unknown—whether it's a code name or has some other meaning is unclear.

They've prepared for a long-term battle to capture Mr. Yun.

But...

If this Mr. Yun isn't a fake, Gao Xiaolong gasped.

"Did you already have a lead?"

Gao Xiaolong asked Jiang Tian eagerly upon seeing him.

"No, I'm just out on a date." Jiang Tian scratched the back of his head. He couldn't very well say that he knew clues about Mr. Yun before his rebirth.

Actually, many things have changed between his past and present lives, and Jiang Tian wasn't even sure if Mr. Yun was in this bar.

But unexpectedly, Mr. Yun really was there.

"Kid, you're on a date?" Gao Xiaolong asked, his face full of surprise.

"Very good, young man. At your age, it's time to get married and start a family. A man can't establish himself without a family."

Just then, a voice rang out beside Gao Xiaolong.

A moment later, a dignified old man appeared before Jiang Tian.

"This is the leader in charge of the political and legal system in our Yunnan Province," Gao Xiaolong explained.

"Hello, Secretary." Jiang Tian's eyes lit up.

This is a big shot!

"My surname is Mu. You can call me Old Mu. Don't be so formal, young man," Old Mu said to Jiang Tian with admiration.

Surname Mu?

Jiang Tian's expression was strange. Was it that Mu?

Could it be such a coincidence?

Actually, it wasn't that Jiang Tian didn't recognize Old Mu; it was just that in his previous life, Old Mu had no connection to him.

And Xiao Bo, in his previous life, also knew that some things could be shown off, and some things couldn't be said.

Therefore, even regarding Mu Ya's family affairs, it could only be said that a certain leader in the province had a very powerful background. In reality, Xiao Bo didn't dare tell anyone about that background; even someone as boastful as him wouldn't dare say.

As for Mu Ya, if nothing was wrong, she naturally wouldn't reveal it either.

Thinking of this, Jiang Tian's heart skipped a beat, and he exclaimed inwardly, "Wow!"

"Hello, Elder Mu," Jiang Tian greeted him.

"Comrade Jiang, thank you for everything you've done for Yunhai. You've saved many people," Elder Mu said warmly to Jiang Tian.

"It's all what I should do; it's serving the people," Jiang Tian replied solemnly.

Old Mu's smile widened, his gaze towards Jiang Tian filled with admiration. After all, who wouldn't admire such an outstanding young man?

As for those around him, their eyes were filled with envy as they looked at Jiang Tian.

Even Wei Xun, the captain of the Second Brigade, had bloodshot eyes.

Besides Gao Xiaolong's high regard, even this political and legal leader held him in such high regard.

This dual leadership system proved that everyone was looking at Jiang Tian with new respect. What about his future prospects?

Even Wei Xun's mentality was greatly affected. One could imagine that if Xiao Bo were here, he might have fainted from jealousy.

Of course, Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile. If he knew that Mu Ya's grandfather was at this level, how would Xiao Bo feel?

Jiang Tian was very curious. Would he be so heartbroken that he wanted to commit suicide, losing all will to live?

"Well said. To remain so calm after achieving merit, without arrogance or complacency, and without changing your original intentions," Old Mu said, his admiration for Jiang Tian growing even stronger.

Because Old Mu had seen too many like Jiang Tian, ​​who suddenly achieved great merit or gained sudden recognition, only to then spiral out of control and go astray.

But from Jiang Tian, ​​besides confidence, he still possessed the necessary humility.

His future was limitless!

Old Mu clicked his tongue in amazement. With such ability and wisdom, how could he not rise rapidly in his career?

It was just a pity he was already in a relationship.

Old Mu clicked his tongue inwardly. Being in a relationship meant there was nothing he could do. Old Mu had originally wanted to give Xiao Bo a chance, but he hadn't expected Xiao Bo's true colors to be exposed, leaving him utterly ruined.

Don't even mention Old Mu; even an ordinary person wouldn't choose someone as disgusting as Xiao Bo. He even secretly slept with his teammate's girlfriend, while the teammate was risking his life on a mission. Calling him a beast wouldn't be an exaggeration.

After the news spread, everyone avoided Xiao Bo. Those who couldn't avoid him were filled with disgust. In other words, Xiao Bo had now become public enemy number one.

After speaking, Old Mu turned his head and looked at the three people lying in a pool of blood.

At that moment, armed police were lying in wait, watching for the ambulance to arrive.

"Huh, what happened to them?" Old Mu was astonished. After all, Mr. Yun, the person involved in the case, had given off an air of unfathomable mystery.

What was going on now?

The three men were in increasingly miserable condition.

In reality, Jiang Tian had given Mr. Yun and the scarred man a severe beating with a police baton. The driver also tried to fight back, but Jiang Tian subdued him as well, giving him a good scolding with the baton.

So, when Old Mu glanced at Jiang Tian and saw the bloodstained baton, he understood almost instantly!

Therefore.

After everyone had dealt with the situation and returned to the police station, the entire station was in an uproar.

You see.

This time, with the public security department issuing a deadline for solving the case, the entire Yunhai area was under immense pressure.

From the provincial department to the municipal bureau, almost everyone was in a hurry.

But they couldn't find any leads.

Half a month—wasn't that putting them in a difficult position?

But what no one expected!

Jiang Tian went out for a stroll and came back, having made a contribution—the man was caught.

It was too fast.

The deadline for solving the case was just issued this morning, and by noon, it was solved in just a few hours.

"To be precise, from the time the deadline was issued to the Municipal Bureau until now, only four hours have passed."

Wow!!!

That's incredible.

Jiang Peng looked at his son, almost dumbfounded.

That's amazing.

"Dad, what kind of judgment do you have?" Jiang Tian said speechlessly.

"No, the Ministry of Public Security gives a maximum of half a month to solve a case, and you solved it in three hours. Doesn't the Ministry of Public Security have any face?" Jiang Peng said dumbfounded.

All the listeners nodded in agreement.

Because, although the injuries were severe, Jiang Tian had used restraint, and Mr. Yun quickly regained consciousness.

As a key suspect, he was naturally interrogated immediately.

"To be honest, I overestimated Mr. Yun a bit." Jiang Tian stood in the observation room next to the interrogation room.

Mr. Yun's initial performance, his calm and composed demeanor, all made Jiang Tian feel that he was someone special.

However, before they could even begin to use their methods and prepare to play along,

"I confess," Mr. Yun said, then frantically shouted at Jiang Tian, ​​who entered the interrogation room, his face filled with terror, "Don't come any closer! Don't come any closer!"

He had just refused to confess when Jiang Tian rushed in and began to beat him mercilessly.

He wanted to smash his mouth open with the baton.

It was now a bloody mess.
