Because Gao Yangyang's words revealed far too much.

One person infiltrated Tucha's hideout, the stronghold of hundreds of drug dealers.

They slaughtered everyone in the villa.

Then, carrying Gao Yangyang on their back, they broke through the encirclement of countless drug dealers.

This....



Chapter 133 Leader Tan: Special Merit?


If these words hadn't come from Gao Yangyang, anyone else would have thought it was a joke.

Even more of a far-fetched joke.

But Gao Yangyang's expression at this moment didn't seem like a joke.

"Yangyang, you... at a time like this, don't joke around." Zeng Fan stammered, forcing a smile that looked more like a grimace.

"We're so close, why would I joke with you? You may not have the ability to save me, but you had the intention, which I appreciate. However, you insulted Comrade Jiang Tian and maliciously misjudged my savior with your narrow-mindedness. Do you think I would tolerate that? Do you think I'd be obliged to joke with you?" Gao Yangyang said expressionlessly.

Boom!!!

And with these words,

everyone present erupted instantly.

Gao Xiaolong didn't even look at Zeng Fan.

He went to Jiang Tian's side.

Actually, at this moment, Comrade Jiang Tian's expression was still rather confused.

Because he had just washed his face!

Do you know how he endured being covered in filth all the way here?

To Jiang Tian, ​​the blood on these drug dealers reeked of stench.

So, at this moment, upon returning, he saw everyone staring at him in shock.

Especially Gao Xiaolong, who looked at him not only with shock but also with immense excitement and emotion.

That's right.

Gao Xiaolong was deeply moved.

Because, through Gao Yangyang's account, he had imagined how dangerous the situation was for Jiang Tian in the villa.

And how much he had done.

To bring Gao Yangyang back from the drug dealers' hideout.

In a sense, Jiang Tian had been a salvation for him this time.

But if given the chance again, Gao Xiaolong wouldn't let Jiang Tian go. Not for any other reason than that, in his heart, the public good was paramount. Jiang Tian's value lay in capturing more drug dealers and saving more lives.

And to save one person...

"Xiao Jiang, you've worked so hard to save Gao Yangyang, and you've given me an explanation to Yangyang's parents. Thank you." Gao Xiaolong took a deep breath.

He then spoke to Jiang Tian with a very solemn expression, and finally bowed slowly.

Clap clap clap!!!

Just then,

everyone applauded in unison.

The entire Municipal Public Security Bureau was clapping loudly.

Because they shared in the glory.

After Zeng Fan arrived at the Municipal Public Security Bureau, he practically launched a sweeping attack.

Not only did he despise the people at the Municipal Public Security Bureau, but he was also incredibly arrogant. Their dissatisfaction stemmed from the fact that Zeng Fan was sometimes right, and they couldn't refute the Municipal Public Security Bureau's past actions.

But Jiang Tian, ​​at this moment, had truly made everyone proud.

Gao Xiaolong suppressed his inner joy; he believed Jiang Tian deserved this bow.

But the next moment...

Jiang Tian helped him up, saying, "No, no, you mustn't."

Speaking of which, Jiang Tian was also filled with emotion.

Because...

Personally, Gao Xiaolong truly lived up to his words. Even in a high position, he was willing to send his children to the front lines when needed, even at the risk of their lives. How many people could possess such a noble heart?

Publicly, Gao Yangyang was also great, infiltrating a drug cartel.

His life was in danger at any moment.

There was a grandfather, Gao Xiaolong, who was still able to enter the drug cartel without hesitation.

Both of them were great.

Just for that reason alone, he had to rescue Gao Yangyang, even if it meant risking his life, even if the mission became infinitely more difficult.

In fact, if he hadn't rescued Gao Yangyang, Jiang Tian wouldn't have been trapped in the villa. Without Gao Yangyang as a burden, he could have easily fought his way out and escaped before the drug dealers could gather.

Although Gao Xiaolong didn't know the details of the situation, he understood.

The difference between carrying a burden and escaping alone, especially for a master like Jiang Tian.

However, before Gao Xiaolong could continue expressing his gratitude,

Zeng Fan, standing behind him, looked sullen: "What's so great about it? It's just a first-class merit, everyone gets one."

But, the next moment...

Jiang Tian's voice continued, "Chief Gao, you don't need to thank me like this. After all, I went into the villa to kill Tucha. I encountered Yangyang on the way; how could I just stand by and watch her die? Saving Yangyang was just something I did on the way."

"Hmm, kill Tucha."

"Wait, kill Tucha?"

"Holy crap, you killed Tucha?"

Boom!!!

Gao Xiaolong suddenly straightened up, his eyes wide as he stared at Jiang Tian, ​​his face filled with disbelief.

Crazy.

He desperately wanted to know if he had gone mad.

Otherwise, how could he have heard those words?

Was this definitely not a hallucination caused by excessive joy?

Gao Xiaolong's expression was somewhat bewildered.

And not just him.

Jiang Peng, as Jiang Tian's father, was also completely bewildered, but could only stand at the back of the crowd, secretly pinching himself repeatedly.

"Grandpa, after Jiang Tian saved me, he fought his way up, not even giving Tucha a chance to escape. He wiped them all out on the third floor of the villa, under the protection of dozens of drug dealers," Gao Yangyang recounted with absolute certainty.

Boom!!!

At this moment,

the scene completely erupted.

Tucha.

What did this represent?

It could be said that if Tucha were truly so easy to deal with, how could he have offended so many people in the country over the years and still escaped unscathed?

It was because of Tucha's cunning, he was incredibly cunning.

The kind of cunning that is outrageous.

To put it bluntly, this Tucha is simply an old fox.

Just like in the last operation, even Gao Xiaolong was almost killed, which completely touched a nerve.

Even at the cost of regaining his special merit.

"Are you serious?" Gao Xiaolong's eyes widened.

"Absolutely true. I saw it with my own eyes, and I also took photos and videos of the scene. They can all be compared." Jiang Tian knew this was going to happen.

Such a big matter—if it were wrong, it would be ridiculous.

Therefore, the review was extremely thorough.

If a special merit award had already been given,

and then a mistake was made,

and it was discovered that Tucha was still alive,

the higher-ups would become a laughingstock, and Jiang Tian himself would be in an incredibly awkward position.

So Jiang Tian confirmed it several times before he was certain it was Tucha.

"I can also testify; I was there at the time," Gao Yangyang eagerly jumped in.

Boom!!!

Good, good, good, that's it, completely confirmed.

The expressions on everyone's faces subtly shifted.

A Special Merit!

It was practically a legendary achievement, unused for decades.

Actually, this merit hadn't been completely abolished.

It's just that even in peacetime, no one could achieve such a feat anymore. A First-Class Merit was practically a death sentence, an achievement even more difficult to obtain.

In modern peacetime, it was simply impossible.

Now, Jiang Tian was, in a sense, making history, because creating a Special Merit in this era was infinitely more difficult than during wartime.

"Hahaha, excellent, excellent, excellent!" Gao Xiaolong finally understood this completely today.

What does it mean to go from heaven to hell?

Just then, Gao Xiaolong, seemingly out of nowhere, was on the phone, talking to someone.

Jiang Tian overheard the name "Minister Tan."

"I just heard from Shen Han. Congratulations, Gao! I can finally relax. By the way, what's the young man's name? I'll personally award him a first-class merit." Minister Tan said to Gao Xiaolong with a beaming smile.

He had just received a call from Shen Han reporting the situation.

He also learned about the situation on the scene.

Minister Tan was overjoyed that Yangyang had been rescued, because he had watched this girl grow up!

"Don't rush for the first-class merit. How's your preparation for the special-class merit going? That's a huge achievement; it must take a long time to prepare, right?"

Minister Tan: "Special-class merit?"



Chapter 134 Claiming Merit, Creating History, Breaking Through History


From the moment he awarded this special-class merit, Minister Tan never even imagined it would be taken over by someone else.

If it were truly that simple, given Tucha's numerous crimes, his status as a major drug lord, and the fact that he had been wanted for so many years, Tucha's influence had only grown stronger.

And increasingly bold and blatant.

If it were so easy to capture or kill him, why wait until now, and let him live so comfortably?

If it weren't for sending people across the border to target Tucha, it would be incredibly naive. It was precisely because they had already tried, but without success, that Tucha caused such a stir, prompting such a strong reaction from above.

Ultimately, they applauded and added Tucha to the list of most wanted individuals, promising a special-class merit award for his capture or death.

This level of reward wasn't set by Minister Tan himself, but rather a comprehensive assessment and verification of the difficulty level before being awarded.

However, a reward is a reward.

There's a saying that goes, rewards are just an attitude, especially historic rewards.

These things are meant to motivate you.

No one expected anyone to receive one.

So, when Gao Xiaolong's question rang out,

Minister Tan's expression froze, not reacting immediately.

"Didn't you say before that if we could successfully capture or kill Tucha, we'd get a special merit award? Let me tell you, Lao Tan, this can't be renegered on. I've seen it; it's already been officially announced," Gao Xiaolong hurriedly said.

What a joke.

For Gao Xiaolong, Jiang Tian had become his most important subordinate and one of his own.

This was a god-level strategic weapon.

Tell me, what leader wouldn't like to have such a capable subordinate who could create miracles?

On a personal level, Jiang Tian had saved Gao Yangyang. Humans aren't made of stone; even if Gao Xiaolong was utterly selfless, he would naturally side with Jiang Tian in the face of such gratitude.

"That's right. Old Gao, is there any progress on Tucha's case?" Minister Tan inquired.

Gao Xiaolong didn't answer immediately, but slowly raised his gaze.

Finally, he looked at the projector on the wall.

On it, the news of Tucha's death was being broadcast from all angles.

After so many years of being wanted, Tucha's appearance had naturally been preserved, so Gao Xiaolong recognized him immediately.

It was him.

He saw Tucha lying on the ground, his eyes wide open in death, and Jiang Tian even kicked him a few times to indicate that he was truly dead, including the gunshot wound to his forehead.

This was to ensure absolute certainty of death.

Because, for Jiang Tian, ​​this not only represented a special merit award, but also a special reward: the Eye of Judgment.

With the Eye of Judgment, Jiang Tian is now a true god.

He truly realizes the truth, leaving no place for evil to hide.

Seeing this, Gao Xiaolong took a deep breath.

Witnessing Tucha's death was unavoidably shocking for Gao Xiaolong.

But after the shock came an indescribable joy.

Holding his phone, Gao Xiaolong calmly addressed Minister Tan, "Old Tan, I have good news for you. There's definitely progress."

"Good, good, good. Don't worry, the entire system will cooperate unconditionally. As long as we can capture Tu Cha, no matter the cost, we will bring him to justice. That's our absolute bottom line." Minister Tan stood up abruptly.

Then, Zeng Fan from the cross-border operation came to mind.

Could it be Zeng Fan?

Minister Tan pondered for a moment; it seemed to be only him.

"Good, good, good. He truly lives up to my expectations of this young man."

"Could it be that Zeng Fan and his team escaped death and then did something?" Xu Poye guessed.

Minister Tan nodded. It was possible, entirely possible!

The next moment, Gao Xiaolong's voice rang out: "Old Tan, listen carefully. Tucha has been shot dead on the spot, he's dead now. Headquarters should have informants there, you'll be able to confirm this soon."

"Good, good, good, Zeng did a great job, creating a miracle..." Minister Tan said instinctively.

"What Zeng? What are you talking about?" Gao Xiaolong frowned.

"You mean Zeng Fan? Wasn't it him who did it?" Minister Tan immediately sensed something was wrong.

Gao Xiaolong, his face darkening, said, "Let me tell you, when Zeng Fan arrived, I sensed something was wrong. I immediately arranged for Comrade Xiao Jiang to follow him. Sure enough, they were immediately captured by the drug dealers. Comrade Xiao Jiang stormed into the drug dealers' hideout, drawing all their attention, which allowed Zeng to escape and return immediately."

"And Comrade Xiao Jiang, after rescuing Yangyang, fought his way into the drug dealers' hideout and killed Tucha on the spot. In the process, nearly a hundred of Tucha's drug dealers, big and small, were killed by Xiao Jiang. The entire Tucha criminal gang was almost completely wiped out."

Boom!!!

This news was simply explosive.

Too much information.

"The detailed information has been faxed to you. You can see for yourself. Once you've verified it, start awarding Xiao Jiang a special merit as soon as possible." Gao Xiaolong finished speaking in one breath and then hung up the phone.

He looked at Jiang Tian with a broad smile.

"Chief Gao, why did you hang up the phone?" Jiang Tian asked unexpectedly.

"If there's anything else, just tell me," Gao Xiaolong said.

"No, there's something else. I ran into a wanted criminal on my way here."



Chapter 135 When did our Lao Gao become so naive?


"Wanted criminal, tell me what they look like, where they went, and we'll have the criminal investigation team investigate."

Gao Xiaolong, thinking something had happened, instantly relaxed upon hearing this, smiling broadly at Jiang Tian.

"No need for that, I just took care of them in the process," Jiang Tian said casually.

This calm tone and casual manner infected Gao Xiaolong's mood, making him smile as well: "Good news, good news! What level is it? What crime did they commit?"

Wanted criminals, in this era, there's no shortage of anything, except wanted criminals.

Because technology wasn't particularly advanced, and there wasn't the widespread availability of surveillance cameras like in later generations, many criminals could escape to other places, and some could even pay money to change their identities and continue living peacefully.

Jiang Tian was deeply aware of this. Later, when surveillance cameras became widespread, they captured many wanted criminals who had been on the run for decades.

Normally, this was a considerable achievement.

Just thinking about Jiang Tian's recent achievement, he felt it seemed a bit small, and mentioning it in this setting was somewhat inappropriate.

However, Jiang Tian was a meritorious official, a great hero, and deserved special privileges.

Gao Xiaolong showed no displeasure, his face beaming with a warm smile.

At this moment, Gao Yangyang, standing not far from Jiang Tian, ​​ran out and said, "Grandpa, you definitely won't believe it, but do you know about the mastermind behind the massive kidnapping and robbery case that shocked the entire nation twenty years ago, the 314 case?"

"Yes, Zhang Jiasheng. Back then, three thousand military and police officers couldn't find him," Gao Xiaolong said.

Even Gao Xiaolong, far away in Beijing, was naturally aware of that case; in fact, the sensation it caused was immense, causing a nationwide uproar.

But in the end, the case was left unsolved because the criminal disappeared completely into the mountains.

And now...

Hmm?

Gao Xiaolong suddenly looked up.

“That’s right, Grandpa, it’s him, Zhang Jiasheng. We just happened to run into them on the way here. Jiang Tian was carrying me when we bumped into them. Isn’t that a coincidence? Then they even joined in, but Comrade Jiang Tian single-handedly took care of the whole gang. Finally, a member of the Sharp Sword Commando team arrived and subdued them. They should be arriving soon in a car.” Gao Yangyang hurriedly explained.

Wow!!!

The younger generation might not know.

But the older generation, who doesn’t know?

“Holy crap!!!”

Song Liguo, standing to the side, almost collapsed.

As for Zeng Fan,

he was completely dumbfounded.

Then he looked at Jiang Tian.

Jealousy?

At this moment, Zeng Fan suddenly realized that he wasn’t so jealous anymore.

Because when you’re slightly ahead, you might feel jealous and envious, but when you’re far ahead...

Even Zeng Fan was bewildered.

Is this even human?

"Are they even human?"

"Captain, they just said that Jiang Tian was the one who caused all the trouble inside the villa. It wasn't a group of freaks; he took down over a hundred drug dealers all by himself." A team member swallowed hard.

Because, let alone inside the villa, one person could keep hundreds of drug dealers at bay, preventing them from even stepping inside.

The key point is that even those who ran out only dared to peek from the outermost perimeter before being scared away.

How could Jiang Tian, ​​who was surrounded at the very center, have managed to do that?

Are you crazy?

“Captain, who is that wanted criminal Zhang Jiasheng that we caught on the way back? Why is Chief Gao's mouth agape like that?” a team member asked.

Zeng Fan remained silent.

He had seen the case from twenty years ago and knew its immense impact.

In terms of influence, it was no less terrifying than the attempt by Tucha to counterattack the anti-drug squad.

The only difference was that Tucha's sustainable threat was far greater.

This Zhang Jiasheng, however, had disappeared for twenty years, posing no further significant threat.

But regardless, this was still a first-class merit.

So, Jiang Tian, ​​having just earned a special-class merit, making history, casually picked up a first-class merit on his way back?

“Is this some kind of absurd?” Zeng Fan muttered to himself.

Before Zeng Fan could react, three military vehicles suddenly sped into the city police compound.

The vehicles roared to life.

Moments later,

nearly twenty fully armed men in uniform jumped out of the vehicles, one in front, one behind, and one in the middle.

This display of force startled the city police officers.

Following them, a man and a woman were escorted out. The remaining two drug dealers, now corpses, were also unloaded intact from the vehicles.

Tian Yuanjian, the leader, spotted Jiang Tian immediately in the crowd, jogged over, and saluted.

Jiang Tian was also utterly astonished.

No.

Just two wanted criminals, why all this fuss?

These special operations team members had offered to escort him, assuring Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian thought that since he couldn't get rid of them anyway, and these people were willing to help, he was even more willing.

Even if they only got a couple of drops of the leftovers from Jiang Tian's meal, it was enough to make their faces glow.

Seeing Jiang Tian, ​​they saluted him straight, and the next moment, Tian Yuanjian warmly grasped Jiang Tian's hands, as if they were long-lost brothers.

"Tian Yuanjian, why are you making such a big fuss?" Gao Xiaolong coughed, reminding himself that he was still nearby.

That's right, because of the dangers abroad, they had requested assistance from the military. The Sharp Sword Commando had arrived in the early morning and they had already met.

Tian Yuanjian smiled wryly: "This is the notorious bandit Zhang Jiasheng, the mastermind behind a major criminal case that shocked the entire country. Brother Jiang, when I requested assistance, I said we had captured Zhang Jiasheng here, and we needed some people for transportation. If my superiors hadn't stopped me, I probably would have sent the entire motor transport company."

What? You want to know why they were so excited and eager? Do I even need to explain?

Because this is Zhang Jiasheng. Even if it was just transportation and escort work, without them, Jiang Tian would have had a very difficult time transporting the goods. So, they deserve some credit, more or less.

At the very least, every single person who came and helped deserves a collective third-class merit.

"I understand," Jiang Tian said, shaking hands, showing complete understanding.

It's precisely because of this kind of enthusiasm that they are even more trustworthy, charging forward fearlessly in the face of evil.

"Chief Gao, Zhang Jiasheng is already here. We'll officially hand him over to the Municipal Bureau now," Tian Yuanjian said to Gao Xiaolong, who was still dumbfounded.

"Oh, oh, oh," Gao Xiaolong hurriedly nodded, recovering his senses.

Mainly, it's not that Gao Xiaolong was naive.

It's just that...

The series of surprises was simply too much, beyond measure.

Who dared to imagine it?

In just one day, Jiang Tian brought so many surprises.

He rescued Gao Yangyang, eliminated Tu Cha, and, conveniently, arrested Zhang Jiasheng, who had orchestrated a nationally sensational case.

Who could withstand this?



Chapter 136 Bah! I hate sycophants more than anything in my life!


It has to be said that even after this mission, Jiang Tian still had a lot to do. Gao Xiaolong had originally suggested that Jiang Tian go back and rest,

or go to the hospital for a necessary full-body checkup.

However, Jiang Tian knew his own body; there was probably no one in the world healthier than him.

After a simple meal, Jiang Tian regained his energy, feeling like he had inexhaustible strength.

In this state, Jiang Tian naturally went to the city police station and recounted every detail of the case.

Especially when he mentioned that hundreds of drug dealers surrounded two people.

Undoubtedly, everyone present held their breath.

But when Jiang Tian found the drug dealers' secret passage and escaped, then ran like mad...

Although it sounds simple,

everyone present knew the terrifying nature of this case.

It was only because of Jiang Tian; anyone else in that situation probably wouldn't have survived.

Because it wasn't just about brute force, but also, most importantly, intelligence.

Remaining calm under pressure, he made such precise judgments at a crucial moment and managed to find an escape route in such a concealed location.

After giving a detailed mission report, Jiang Tian didn't linger at the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

The Bureau still needed to deal with Zhang Jiasheng's case. Of course, Zhang Jiasheng's situation was special; strictly speaking, he should fall under the Criminal Investigation Division.

However, on another note, Zhang Jiasheng had also brought back a number of drug dealers with him.

This added considerable weight to Jiang Tian's resume.

Overall, Zhang Jiasheng's case didn't really require Jiang Tian's involvement; others would handle the aftermath.

In short, Jiang Tian took the lion's share, and he didn't care about the smaller credits.

As he stepped outside, Jiang Tian breathed in the fresh air.

But just as he left the office building, he heard a loud commotion on the stairs outside.

"Zeng Fan, I'll say it one last time: don't call me Yangyang, please call me by my full name. Also, I don't want to see you, please leave me." Gao Yangyang frowned deeply.

She had been waiting for Jiang Tian, ​​actually wanting to say something to him.

But Zeng Fan's sudden appearance and concern made Gao Yangyang panic, fearing Jiang Tian might misunderstand.

Now she just wanted Zeng Fan away.

"Yangyang, why are you like this since you came back? Always protecting that kid. He's just a little better-mannered and risked his life to save you, but after all this time with you, haven't you considered me at all? Not giving me any face in front of so many people!" Zeng Fan was practically bursting with anger.

Any man would probably explode if his beloved goddess were to fiercely attack him to protect another man.

He'd managed to hold back until now; Zeng Fan's composure was already remarkable.

"If you're not leaving, I'm leaving." Gao Yangyang turned to leave.

"Yangyang..."

Zeng Fan chased after her, trying to grab Gao Yangyang's wrist.

But the next moment...

Zeng Fan felt a sharp pain shooting through his shoulder.

An irresistible force surged from his shoulder.

Instinctively, as a successor of the Eight Extremes Collapse technique, Zeng Fan's right hand instinctively grabbed the other's wrist, using immense strength to twist it in a brutal twist.

Because a normal person's arm would be twisted into a pretzel by this move.

But unfortunately.

He used all his strength.

Only his face turned red from holding his breath.

The other's right hand remained firmly on his shoulder, unmoving.

Zeng Fan turned his head.

He was met with Jiang Tian's indifferent expression.

And this scene, already shattering Zeng Fan's composure, was further amplified when Gao Yangyang saw Jiang Tian, ​​her expression shifting from gloomy to bright.

Her previously cold expression vanished upon seeing Jiang Tian, ​​and Gao Yangyang ran excitedly to his side.

The contrast was stark.

"No, Yangyang, didn't you say you were busy?"

Zeng Fan's eyes reddened even more.

His mental state was on the verge of complete collapse.

Jiang Tian grabbed his wrist, and before he even exerted any force, Zeng Fan deeply felt the pain of being crippled.

"Didn't you hear Yangyang say she doesn't want to see you? Why are you still clinging to me like this? Have you no shame?" Jiang Tian stood on the stairs, looking down at him calmly.

"Let go...let go of me." Zeng Fan's forehead was beaded with sweat from the pain.

"Fine!"

Jiang Tian smiled slightly, then released his grip.

Zeng Fan stumbled backward.

But before he could even regain his footing, a dark figure suddenly appeared in front of him.

Thump!!!

Zeng Fan felt a sharp pain on his face, then instantly collapsed to the ground.

Looking up, he saw Jiang Tian holding a police baton, which he hadn't noticed at the time.

Actually, Jiang Tian still felt that in China, firearms were less effective than a police baton.

Three blows, and no matter what kind of criminal you were, you'd have to confess obediently.

For some arrogant and domineering individuals, one blow would immediately make them behave.

"If he bothers you again, just tell me. This time it was one blow, next time it'll be three," Jiang Tian said to Gao Yangyang.

Back in the conference room, Jiang Peng had told him to go home if he had nothing to do; his mother was very worried about him.

As for Jiang Peng, he still had to work overtime at the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

"Thank you," Gao Yangyang said excitedly.

Originally, she was worried about how Jiang Tian would treat her after she returned, whether he would act like a stranger. She was very worried.

Especially with Zeng Fan involved, she wondered if he would misunderstand her.

Now, seeing Jiang Tian beat up Zeng Fan for her sake, although she knew it was wrong, Gao Yangyang was secretly overjoyed.

"Let me take you."

Jiang Tian suddenly said, watching Gao Yangyang walk away.

Jiang Tian had learned from their conversation that Gao Yangyang was temporarily staying in the family compound, Gao Xiaolong's temporary residence, located in the provincial compound.

Perfect timing! Jiang Tian simply drove his father's official car to take Gao Yangyang home.

After a long night's journey, Gao Yangyang, though carried back by Jiang Tian, ​​was exhausted. She dozed off as soon as she got in the car and slept all the way to her residence. When Jiang Tian woke her up, she even invited him in for a drink of water.

Jiang Tian had initially intended to do so, but ultimately, considering his mother's likely worry at home, he declined.

Besides, Jiang Tian also needed to deal with Jiang Xiaoyu's situation.

After all, Jiang Tian's identity wasn't a secret to many drug dealers in Yunhai.

The situation of his family members naturally came under scrutiny.

Normally, narcotics officers could conceal their identities, even if they occasionally achieved a major success, but Jiang Tian's recent actions had been too high-profile to hide.

It was already Wednesday.

Jiang Xiaoyu was still at home.

The family apartment building was a six-story villa without an elevator. Jiang Tian parked his car downstairs, locked it, and was about to go upstairs.

Just then, a woman wearing sneakers, with a high ponytail and sports headphones, came down the stairs.

She was fairly attractive, but Jiang Tian had been exposed to too many beautiful women lately, so he only glanced at her and didn't give her much attention, continuing to head upstairs.

"Hey, which floor does your friend live on?" a sporty girl with a high ponytail suddenly asked.

"What?" Jiang Tian asked, his face suddenly turning wary.

If this woman hadn't lacked a red "crime value," Jiang Tian probably would have attacked her directly.

Inquiring about the address of a top-notch narcotics officer? Kid, are you tired of living?

"Comrade, this is my ID." The girl realized what she meant and gave an awkward smile, then took out her ID from her pocket.

Jiang Tian took it. The ID photo was good; she was a beautiful, edgy, and cool woman, and most importantly, her high ponytail was long enough.

But that wasn't the point. The point was...

"A trainee officer from the Narcotics Control Unit of the Municipal Central District Branch?" Jiang Tian was completely taken aback.

Had he encountered a colleague, or someone from the Municipal Central District Branch?

"I live on the third floor. What's the matter?" Jiang Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

However, the girl's next sentence made Jiang Tian's expression twist sharply.



Chapter 137 Whoever you are, you're dead now.


"You're in room 301 on the third floor. There's a drug dealer in there," the athletic girl said nervously.

Drug dealer?

Jiang Tian raised an eyebrow. Where was this? A cadre's family compound!

Drug dealers here? Wasn't that ridiculous?

Besides, Jiang Tian always took precautions for his and his family's safety. Yesterday, there weren't any red dots around.

Now, Jiang Tian activated the scanning radar.

The floor was still spotless. For a moment, Jiang Tian couldn't even tell if the girl was lying or if she was telling the truth.

And, a trainee narcotics officer, arresting drug dealers alone?

Jiang Tian was momentarily confused.

Was this really true?

If Jiang Tian remembered correctly, the neighbors next door were a young couple. The apartment was allocated to them by the woman's parents as their wedding home.

The woman was a civil servant, and the man was a businessman. They didn't seem to have any connection to drug dealers, did they?

"I'm not lying to you, young comrade. I've been tracking this for a long time, and I've finally found a clue," Ma Ziling assured him, patting her chest.

Looking at her smug expression, Jiang Tian was puzzled.

If it were anything else, it wouldn't matter, but the key issue was that if a drug dealer appeared next door, it would be a serious threat to both Jiang Tian and his family.

Moreover, Jiang Tian knew that his scanning radar wasn't omnipotent. For example, some dangerous individuals, even without criminal records, might still pose a danger.

"Anyway, comrade, you must be careful," Ma Ziling said anxiously.

Jiang Tian could understand the girl's feelings. She had just graduated, but judging from her appearance, Jiang Tian felt she was probably a year ahead of him.

Still in her internship, she was full of ambition and eager to make a name for herself.

Actually, Jiang Tian was a special case. Otherwise, in his previous life, when he had just graduated and was still in his internship, his mindset would have been similar to this young woman, Ma Ziling.

But…

“Why are you the only one here? Didn’t you report this to your branch office?” Jiang Tian glanced around.

If there were any unusual circumstances, or if the narcotics officers had set up an ambush, Jiang Tian was absolutely certain he would have noticed.

But clearly, there was nothing unusual around him; everything was calm.

Ma Ziling suddenly looked a little embarrassed and said, “Well, actually, it’s because yesterday when my friend took me to a bar, I saw him seemingly trading powder with someone. I haven’t had time to report it to the branch office yet.”

Hmm?

Jiang Tian’s gaze sharpened.

Looking at Ma Ziling’s face, he felt it was becoming increasingly familiar.

Jiang Tian frowned, suddenly remembering a horrific drug bust reported by the system in his later life.

Because the outcome was so tragic, it caused a huge uproar and was eventually reported by the media, shocking the entire nation.

The incident began when a trainee narcotics officer inadvertently uncovered some drug dealer leads. However, after reporting them, the lack of evidence and other factors led to a lack of attention, ultimately resulting in the trainee being discovered while secretly investigating and arrested by the drug dealers.

The final outcome was tragic, so tragic that it was reported by the media.

Jiang Tian's eyes were blurred, so he could only make out the general outline, but he increasingly felt that it was probably this woman.

Really reckless.

Doesn't she know that tracking down drug dealers is a ruthless process, and acting alone is a major taboo?

Okay.

Looking at Ma Ziling's worried expression, Jiang Tian suddenly understood.

Wait...

Jiang Tian frowned deeply. So, in his past life, the person next door really might have been a drug dealer, or connected to drug dealers?

Hiss!!!

If that's the case, it would be an extremely terrifying and dangerous situation for both Jiang Tian and his family.

But why didn't she show any criminal markers?

Is it because she hasn't committed any crimes?

Jiang Tian had never wanted the Eye of Judgment more than at this moment.

Because the situation seemed to be getting increasingly complicated.

“Young man, drug dealers are dangerous. From now on, you must stay away from them. They are all ruthless and vicious. You must avoid them, understand?” Ma Ziling instructed, following behind Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian stopped in his tracks. He had to admit, she was quite kind; what a good girl.

“Don’t worry, I’m more afraid of dying than anyone else,” Jiang Tian said.

“Aren’t you afraid people will look down on you for saying that?” Ma Ziling had never met such an honest person before.

Soon, Jiang Tian reached the third floor.

Standing at the top of the stairs, he suddenly heard a fierce argument.

“You son of a bitch, I’ll beat you to death!”

“You bitch, I’ll beat you to death, you bitch!”

“And you, you bastard, you dare to try and break up the fight? I’ll beat you to death too!”

Bang bang bang!!!

Accompanying the fierce argument were even more intense screams of terror.

And ordinary screams were one thing.

The key was that Jiang Tian recognized the voice.

Because it was his sister.

Swish!!!

In that instant.

Jiang Tian's eyes turned red.

It could be said that Jiang Tian would only intervene in the fight between the couple, depending on his mood.

Even if it turned into a life-or-death struggle, it wouldn't affect Jiang Tian.

But if Jiang Tian's sister, Jiang Xiaoyu, suffered even the slightest harm...

Jiang Tian's mind exploded.

"Whoever it is, they're already dead." Jiang Tian's eyes instantly turned red.

Even after killing hundreds of drug dealers, Jiang Tian had never been blinded by rage, but now, his eyes were truly red.



Chapter 138 What? Murder resulted in a prison sentence? No, it was self-defense.


Reaching the third floor, Jiang Tian looked up and saw numerous broken pots and pans scattered in the hallway.

At that moment, the door to his neighbor's apartment across the hall was open. A menacing-looking man, holding a wooden stick, stood there, his face contorted with malice.

His eyes flashed a terrifying red light as he prepared to strike two women across the hall.

Jiang Tian recognized one of the women; he knew her from his previous life. Her name was Ou Miao, a woman in her thirties, a dutiful civil servant. As neighbors, Jiang Tian had seen her many times, always greeting her amicably. He often called her "Sister Ou," as she was nearing thirty.

In Jiang Tian's previous life, nothing like this had happened. However, this neighbor had disappeared afterward; thinking back, he realized he hadn't seen him for over ten years.

And there hadn't been any fighting either.

Of course, at this time in his past life, Jiang Tian was probably overwhelmed by Wang Yifei's harassment and utterly devastated by his sister's death, or perhaps he simply wasn't paying attention.

But regardless.

This man, at this moment, looked like he wanted to kill someone, holding a wooden stick in one hand, and even reaching for a knife from the table.

Ou Miao leaned against the wall, her face filled with fear. Beside her was

Jiang Xiaoyu.

"It's him, that man! Young man, step back! Drug dealers are dangerous," Ma Ziling said, her brow furrowed and her face serious.

Regardless, at this moment, Ma Ziling felt she needed to step forward.

So she ran directly in front of Jiang Tian, ​​blocking the door and saying to the man, "What are you doing? Please put down your weapon immediately."

"Another bitch has come," the man said, his eyes bloodshot, seemingly having lost his mind.

Holding a knife, he brandished it menacingly: "You bitch, dare say another word and I'll kill you! Get lost, I've found three..."

"One..."

Ma Ziling was furious: "You, do you want to break the law?"

But before Ma Ziling could continue her persuasion, she suddenly felt a tremendous force behind her.

That's right, her tracksuit hood was yanked up, and then she was violently pulled down, landing hard on the doorstep steps.

"What are you doing?" Ma Ziling looked at Jiang Tian, ​​who had pulled her down, not understanding what he was doing.

Is this young man crazy?

However, she quickly received no answer from Jiang Tian.

At that moment, Jiang Tian moved with lightning speed.

First, he arrived in front of Jiang Xiaoyu and glanced at the mark on her face.

That's right.

At this moment, there was a handprint on Jiang Xiaoyu's face.

Without asking who hit him, Jiang Tian gently touched his beloved younger sister, the one he had never dared to touch since childhood. Had someone assaulted her?

He stood up.

Looking at the man opposite him, Jiang Tian remembered his name was Huang Meng, given that they had been neighbors for a while.

He ran a small business and had a rather fierce appearance, but the two had practically never interacted. Since meeting, Huang Meng had ignored him, and Jiang Tian hadn't spoken to Huang Meng either.

Now, Huang Meng, enraged, held a cleaver as if he were truly about to chop someone up.

"You damn bastard, who let you in?" Huang Meng brandished the cleaver, cursing, "You worthless piece of trash, let me chop you up first!"

Regardless of whether the other party was genuinely angry or just bluffing.

But what kind of people hadn't Jiang Tian seen? What kind of ruthless drug dealers hadn't he killed?

Tucha was tough enough, but Jiang Tian still managed to kill him outright.

Jiang Tian didn't know where he got his courage; perhaps it was the cleaver in his hand.

Thinking this to himself, the next moment, he saw Huang Meng swing the cleaver at him.

This was no joke.

"He really dares to do it?" Jiang Tian's heart skipped a beat.

Looking at Huang Meng's state, and recalling Ma Ziling's words, he suddenly sensed a conspiracy, a gut feeling that came from a criminal investigation genius.

"Die, you son of a bitch!" Huang Meng's eyes were filled with murderous intent.

The cleaver was aimed with all its might, aimed at Jiang Tian's forehead. If it hit, an ordinary person's head would likely be split open.

This was a deadly strike.

"Brother, be careful!" Jiang Xiaoyu cried out in terror.

But the next moment...

Jiang Tian suddenly pulled a thick police baton from his back. He usually carried his baton on his lower back; although it was somewhat inconvenient to carry, it was incredibly useful in many situations.

Bang!!!

Before the cleaver could fall, Jiang Tian slammed the baton directly onto Huang Meng's head.

Huang Meng collapsed to the ground with a thud.

Blood gushed out instantly.

"I...I'll kill you, you son of a bitch! Today, either you kill me, or I'll kill you!" Huang Meng clutched his head, struggling to his knees to get up.

His face contorted with malice as he glared at Jiang Tian, ​​a狰狞 (zhengning, meaning ferocious or hideous) smile plastered on his lips.

Huang Meng hadn't been unfamiliar with this young man before. He was usually timid and hesitant, even once daring to leave after being verbally abused.

Therefore, Huang Meng was confident that even if this seemingly weakling appeared calm on the surface, he was probably terrified inside.

However, he might be overthinking things. In the past, before his rebirth, the fresh-out-of-graduation Jiang Tian was indeed naive and cowardly.

But after his rebirth, too many people had died at Jiang Tian's hands.

Jiang Tian had no qualms about striking.

So, without uttering a single word, Jiang Tian gave a mocking laugh, took a step forward, and Huang Meng, his head spinning, looked up at Jiang Tian standing before him, somewhat confused.

But before he could utter a harsh word...

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian's baton slammed down instantly, aimed at Huang Meng's raised face. The blow produced a dull thud, and blood gushed from Huang Meng's nose.

The crisp sound of his nose breaking was audible.

"Ah!!!" Huang Meng screamed, tears streaming down his face as he lay on the ground, clutching his nose.

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian's third blow struck his leg.

Crack!!!

The bone broke.

The scream abruptly stopped.

Huang Meng lay stiffly on the ground, trembling uncontrollably. The intense, soul-deep pain rendered him speechless.

But even now, Jiang Tian hadn't stopped.

Bang!!!

The fourth blow struck Huang Meng's arm, the one holding the baton. The force was so great that Jiang Tian could easily break a person's bones, even snapping them with his bare hands.

A crack sounded as the baton fell to the ground, and Huang Meng's hand, which had been clutching his leg, fell limply to his side.

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian, ​​bent over, continued to strike Huang Meng's body with the baton, his face expressionless.

He didn't utter a single word.

Jiang Tian had always believed in one principle: when it's time to act, don't waste words.

"Pfft!!!"

Lying on the ground, Huang Meng coughed up blood, but Jiang Tian continued to strike.

His arm was almost completely smashed.

Boom!!!

Ma Ziling, sitting on the steps by the door, finally snapped out of her daze, her voice filled with terror.

“Stop hitting him! You’ll kill him if you keep hitting him! Brother, brother, if you keep hitting him, you’ll be committing murder!”

Someone was faster than Ma Ziling – Jiang Xiaoyu. She lunged at Jiang Tian from behind, hugging him tightly and shouting.

Jiang Tian seemed oblivious, continuing to smash the police baton.

Blood dripped from the baton, splattering everywhere; the scene was gruesome.

Huang Meng’s condition was even more gruesome.

“Brother, you’ll be imprisoned for murder!” Jiang Xiaoyu cried out in terror.

Ma Ziling rushed forward, standing between the two, blocking Jiang Tian: “You just…”

Looking at Jiang Tian’s expressionless face, Ma Ziling almost instinctively shuddered.

Back in the hallway, Ma Ziling had only thought Jiang Tian was a weak, unassuming college student, fair-skinned and harmless.

Now, looking at Huang Meng lying on the ground, his life hanging in the balance, Ma Ziling was completely dumbfounded.

This guy...

is he the real lunatic?



Chapter 139 Before killing me, I'll wipe out your entire family first.


"Young man, are you a college student? Are you crazy? How could you be so ruthless?" Ma Ziling gasped frantically.

"It's alright, he had a knife. Killing him is self-defense," Jiang Tian said nonchalantly, carrying his baton.

Hiss!!!

Is he a psychopath?

Ma Ziling glanced at the calm Jiang Tian, ​​then at Huang Meng lying on the ground, twitching intermittently. He was indeed still clutching a kitchen knife tightly.

Good heavens, this is truly something else.

Ma Ziling stared at Jiang Tian in shock. No, this guy is a psychopath!

And with this level of skill, Ma Ziling didn't believe Jiang Tian hadn't killed someone before.

She never expected this. She thought he was just an ordinary, innocent college student, but he turned out to be the most dangerous criminal?

"Get out of the way," Jiang Tian said, shoving Ma Ziling aside.

Then he untied Jiang Xiaoyu's restraints and, baton in hand, approached Huang Meng.

The next moment, Jiang Tian stomped heavily on Huang Meng's face.

Even Tu Cha wouldn't dare call him that; Jiang Tian didn't know what gave this kid the right.

No...

Maybe he'd taken too much.

After being beaten, he started playing dead.

That's right, Jiang Tian's attacks were executed with extremely precise control over his strength and demeanor.

He only targeted areas that were painful but not fatal, the kind of places that wouldn't kill him immediately.

Now that he was lying motionless, he was either unconscious or faking it, so Jiang Tian's baton went straight for the groin.

Jiang Tian slammed it down on Huang Meng's crotch.

Thud! !!

"Ah!!!"

Huang Meng's eyes widened, and he froze for a full second or two, almost popping them out of their sockets, before letting out a piercing scream.

But Jiang Tian stomped directly on Huang Meng's mouth, instantly silencing the scream.

Huang Meng's bloodshot eyes filled with tears of blood.

"I'll talk, you answer."

Jiang Tian spoke.

Huang Meng kept whimpering, seemingly agreeing.

Jiang Tian casually grabbed a piece of clothing from the side, put it on, then grabbed Huang Meng's hair, dragged him to the sofa, and sat down.

He slowly lit a cigarette, took a deep drag, and exhaled.

While Jiang Tian appeared to be smoking, he was actually using his genius detective skills and extraordinary memory to deduce the events, comparing them with his past life, searching for a hidden conspiracy within the complex web of events.

"You took it, didn't you?" Jiang Tian cut to the chase.

Huang Meng's eyes were glazed over, even somewhat clear.

After a beating with a baton, Jiang Tian had to admit that Huang Meng had probably endured the most; it took so many blows to finally calm him down.

"What?" Huang Meng shook his head, bewildered.

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian brought his baton down, then explained, "Too much drugs, huh? Tell me, how much?"

Huang Meng looked up in panic.

"I'll only ask once, how much did you take?" Jiang Tian stomped on Huang Meng's hand, chasing it with his heel.

Hiss!!!

Huang Meng gasped in pain, "Stop hitting me! I admit it, I took it, too much!"

Boom!!!

Ma Ziling's eyes widened suddenly, staring dumbfounded at Jiang Tian, ​​who sat on the sofa puffing on his cigarette. No, it was that simple? He made someone confess to using drugs?

And did this prove that everything she'd discovered was now evidence?

Ma Ziling's eyes grew brighter with each thought.

But Jiang Tian wasn't finished yet. He took another drag of his cigarette and continued, "Who sent you?"

"I just used too much, so I beat my wife. Your sister got dragged into it," Huang Meng protested.

Bang!!!

The next moment, Jiang Tian's baton slammed down again.

The dull thud sent shivers down everyone's spines.

"I fucking said you used too much and beat your wife? You fucking kidding me!"

Jiang Tian cursed as he bent down and began striking Huang Meng with his baton.

"Don't hit me! Don't hit me!" Huang Meng cried out, the pain was unbearable.

"I'm asking you, who sent you to find me? Who gave you the drugs, leading you to this state? And who lured me here?" Jiang Tian's face was icy cold.

That's right.

Jiang Tian figured it out.

This was aimed at him.

A crime of passion, an accidental killing—if handled properly, these things leave no trace.

Although Huang Meng smelled of alcohol, Jiang Tian had never considered acting drunk.

These words were just for show.

From the beginning, he was beating his wife, and the argument had dragged on for so long without Jiang's mother returning. It was clear the other party had deliberately lured Jiang Xiaoyu over to mediate while Jiang's mother was out.

And once Jiang Xiaoyu arrived, Jiang Tian would be 100% hooked.

Therefore, someone was behind this.

Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes. The question was, who gave Huang Meng and the people behind him such confidence?

It was because…

Jiang Tian looked at the two blood-red lights approaching the stairwell.

Without a doubt, those two were drug dealers.

“Even if you tell me, do you think you'll survive?”

At that moment, seemingly seeing a figure at the door, Huang Meng's screams stopped, and he laughed wildly at Jiang Tian: “You're dead, you know that? I'll torture you like crazy, I'll even have dozens of people kill your sister. Not just you, your whole family will die, hahahaha…”

Thump!!!

Before Huang Meng could finish speaking, Jiang Tian, ​​his face grim, kicked Huang Meng, who was lying on the ground, sending him flying. Huang Meng slammed against the wall, spraying blood, before rolling on the floor convulsing.

Even now,

Everyone in the room was stunned.

Before they could react…

The next moment, Jiang Tian suddenly placed his hand on his chest.

"Die."

Two men with pistols suddenly appeared at the doorway, rushing in and preparing to fire into the room.

But unfortunately...

Bang! Bang!

Two muffled sounds followed, and the two men instantly lay in pools of blood.

Buzz! Buzz!

Standing on the veranda, Ma Ziling watched in horror.

As an intern, an intern who had only ever followed her mentor around for a year, she had never encountered any missions.

This was the first time she had witnessed murder.

Even more terrifying was that she had initially called him "young man," mistaking him for a fragile college student, only to have him kill her with two shots.

They beat people to death.

What's wrong with this world?

Ma Ziling stood frozen, pale-faced, still shaken by her near-death experience.

Because those two men, without a second thought, pulled out guns the moment they entered.

"What happened?" Ma Ziling muttered to herself, her body ice-cold.

She was bewildered. What had happened? Why did Huang Meng suddenly threaten to kill Jiang Tian's entire family?

Why did Jiang Tian say as soon as he entered that these people were targeting him?

Why was this happening?

Jiang Tian exhaled a puff of smoke, his face filled with melancholy.

He could only say that this day had come sooner than he had imagined.

The drug dealers in Yunhai were incredibly arrogant.

Don't think that just because this was Yunhai's drug dealers, Jiang Tian's recent actions would deter drug dealers from seeking revenge even elsewhere, where there weren't so many outrageous criminal groups.

Especially in Yunhai.

The drug cartel here all have intricate connections to overseas entities, and they have countless ruthless thugs under their command.

It wouldn't be difficult for them to find a few people to take revenge on Jiang Tian.

"Come on, tell me, who ordered you? Who's behind you? Who sent these two people? Why are they so eager to kill me?"

They're going to attack in broad daylight.

The arrogance of these criminal groups has reached this level, or rather, they've always been this arrogant; they've just kept it under wraps.

"Will you talk or not?"

Jiang Tian held a pistol to Huang Meng's head, seemingly ready to shoot before even answering, his face completely calm.

But this calmness instantly shattered Huang Meng's mental defenses: "Don't shoot! I'll talk! It's Blood Hand and the Yun family. They asked me to do this. It has nothing to do with me. They have a terrifying deal tonight and want to create chaos in Yunhai so they can't focus on them."

"Fine, fine, wipe them out before you kill me."



Chapter 140 Report: How audacious! Who dares to lay a hand on Xiao Jiang?


*Whoosh!*

Instantly.

Ma Ziling's gaze changed, completely changed, her eyes shining brightly.

Even her gaze towards Jiang Tian was entirely different.

He hadn't expected such a significant drug trafficking lead to emerge so unexpectedly.

You see,

Throughout Yunhai, from the municipal bureau down to the branch bureaus, almost every meeting was met with strong condemnation and contempt from anti-drug systems across the country.

Sometimes, even the provincial department's headquarters was criticized.

Inadequate drug enforcement.

Or rather, because Yunhai's anti-drug efforts were insufficient, it led to widespread drug trafficking nationwide.

Later, Yunhai was ridiculed as "Little Gotham."

Who could feel good about that?

Everyone joins the anti-drug police with fervent enthusiasm, but earning merit is incredibly difficult, or rather, achieving results is incredibly difficult.

The entire drug trafficking ring in Yunhai, operating from within and without, had become an impregnable fortress, virtually unbreakable.

However, recently, Ma Ziling heard that a drug enforcement genius had emerged in the city police department, a figure who could be considered a source of national pride for Yunhai.

There were even rumors that this drug enforcement genius had started as a trainee officer.

This instantly reignited a terrifying flame of passion in Ma Ziling, which had previously cooled.

Now.

An opportunity to solve a major case was right in front of her.

Ma Ziling's gaze towards Jiang Tian completely changed. She never dreamed that they could catch drug dealers like this.

Such a crucial clue had appeared so unexpectedly.

Moreover, the Yun family overseas, and the deal between Blood Hand and another person, had actually dared to send someone to assassinate this young man.

Wait...

Assassinate this young man?

The young man killed two drug dealers?

Ma Ziling was completely dumbfounded.

After the initial excitement wore off, Ma Ziling finally realized something was wrong.

Just now, this young man seemed to have instantly killed two thugs who had come in with guns.

No.

What kind of guy is this?

Especially when Ma Ziling looked at Huang Meng lying on the ground, a bloody mess, his pitiful state made it seem like he might die any second.

Ma Ziling was completely bewildered, her mind reeling.

"You just killed them?" Ma Ziling exclaimed.

"Didn't you just see it?" Jiang Tian shrugged.

Ma Ziling gasped: "You almost killed this guy! Who are you? What do you do?"

But at this moment, Jiang Tian didn't answer directly.

This attempt, though unsuccessful, was a beginning; it was clear someone was targeting her.

Drug dealers in other places might be somewhat hesitant to act too ruthlessly, but the drug dealers in Yunhai are completely different. They all have powerful backers, including foreign forces and numerous powerful backers.

Like a spider web, they are intricately layered.

These people are truly capable of anything to achieve their goals.

Therefore, Jiang Tian immediately called Gao Xiaolong; this matter had to go through Gao Xiaolong.

Even Jiang Peng, as the bureau chief, had no solution to this situation.

“Hey, who are you calling? Put down your phone and tell me the truth.” Ma Ziling's face grew even more wary.

Why would a drug deal involve assassinating Jiang Tian?

And why was Jiang Tian so ruthless, his eyes never dry?

And why was he so vicious?

This was clearly not his first murder.

A murderer?

Is this young man a murderer?

Unfortunately, Jiang Tian didn't even look at Ma Ziling.

Because his heart was filled with worry, and on the other hand, a terrifying rage.

Dare to kill his whole family?

Then Jiang Tian would wipe them all out.

Meanwhile, while Jiang Tian was on the phone, Gao Xiaolong hadn't actually gone to bed yet. Lying in his bedroom, Gao Xiaolong was still talking to Minister Tan on his phone.

"So, this wanted criminal who shocked the entire nation has been apprehended by Xiao Jiang, and approximately 100 kilograms of methamphetamine have been seized," Gao Xiaolong said calmly.

Hiss!!!

Minister Tan, holding his phone, was completely dumbfounded.

He thought killing Tucha was the biggest surprise, but he hadn't expected something even more surprising.

"For Xiao Jiang, this is a minor issue," Gao Xiaolong coughed and cleared his throat.

Boom!!!

On the other end of the phone, Minister Tan couldn't sit still.

For Jiang Tian, ​​this was a small matter.

But for Minister Tan, this was a matter of utmost importance!

"What did you say?"

"Zhang Jiasheng?"

"Damn, how many merits has Xiao Jiang accomplished?" Minister Tan turned to look at Xu Poye.

Xu Poyue, with his professional expertise, stated, "So far, besides the promised but still pending Special Merit, Comrade Jiang Tian has already received four First-Class Merits, one Second-Class Merit, and one Third-Class Merit. If this is true, Comrade Jiang will have one more First-Class Merit."

"Excellent, excellent, excellent! Hahahaha, such talent must be protected! This kid is practically a drug dealer's nemesis! Hahahaha..."

Minister Tan was excited.



Chapter 141 Gao Xiaolong is furious; challenging the red line is courting death.


"So impressive?"

Minister Tan hadn't actually compiled a specific list, and he was astonished after hearing Xu Poye's words.

In fact, not only Minister Tan, but even Xu Poye was dumbfounded after reviewing the records.

The key point was that these merits were all recently earned.

So many merits in such a short time.

If it weren't for the detailed records of Jiang Tian's contributions behind each first-class merit, providing irrefutable evidence, Xu Poye would have suspected that Jiang Tian was taking credit for others' work.

The sheer number of merits was simply outrageous.

Even the well-informed Minister Tan was utterly shocked and gasped repeatedly as he looked at Jiang Tian's file.

However, after the initial shock, Minister Tan's face lit up with joy.

Were they afraid of their subordinates accumulating merits?

It was ridiculous.

In short, the merits were there for others to claim; if they weren't claimed, what did that prove? That the department's work attitude was problematic.

Jiang Tian's ability to accumulate so much merit is a testament to his true talent.

Minister Tan isn't just afraid of you taking credit; he's even afraid you won't take enough.

"As for Zeng Fan, Lao Xu, you misjudged him this time," Minister Tan said, putting down the documents.

The documents detailed Zeng Fan's performance in this operation.

While not exactly greedy and reckless, what he did was insignificant compared to Jiang Tian's. The key issue was that he looked down on Jiang Tian afterward.

Gao Xiaolong solemnly and seriously expressed his opinion: Zeng Fan was utterly unreliable.

"That sounds nice, but there are only a handful of talents like Jiang Tian. Zeng Fan is already quite good," Minister Tan said, his face darkening.

After all, Zeng Fan had indeed rendered some merit.

Although not a huge one.

It was just that compared to a monster like Jiang Tian, ​​he was completely overshadowed.

But this also allowed Minister Tan to see Jiang Tian's capabilities.

"Old Gao, are you afraid I'll renege on my promise or something? But you know, the importance and review standards for a Special Merit are completely different. There's no shortcut; it requires step-by-step approval. But without a doubt, I've seen Xiao Jiang's merits this time, and the Special Merit is absolutely deserved," Minister Tan said confidently.

That's right.

In this operation, Jiang Tian killed over a hundred drug dealers, escaped the encirclement of numerous powerful criminal groups, and even rescued the heroic undercover agent, Gao Yangyang.

His entire performance was absolutely perfect.

Especially the killing of Tu Cha.

If Jiang Tian can't get a Special Merit, who can?

"The approval process for the Special Merit has already begun, but Zhang Jiasheng has been on the run for twenty years. Can we confirm his identity?" Minister Tan's heart was racing.

After all...

Even Minister Tan was somewhat bewildered after hearing this.

Wow, after getting the Special Merit, he also managed to capture a wanted criminal in a major national case on his escape.

This luck is almost too good to be true.

"It's already been verified, and the DNA test results have been compared. There are no problems whatsoever. He is Zhang Jiasheng. Besides, even if it weren't Zhang Jiasheng, wouldn't over a hundred kilograms of seized drugs be enough for a first-class merit award?" Gao Xiaolong unconsciously defended Jiang Tian.

"Alright, alright, don't worry. The Special Merit Citation approval process is difficult, but fax me the case file, and I'll personally apply for it for Xiao Jiang again immediately," Minister Tan said excitedly.

Given the recent case's issues,

Minister Tan even thought this was a perfect opportunity for public publicity.

Especially since Yunhai was universally criticized, now, thanks to Jiang Tian alone, Yunhai had finally achieved a triumphant return.

"A talent, simply a talent!" Xu Poye muttered repeatedly, his eyes reddening.

"You want him? Don't dream about it. A talent like him can only be truly effective in a place like Yunhai. But be careful, someone like Xiao Jiang might tempt some drug dealers to take the risk," Minister Tan said gravely.

"Impossible, right? Those drug dealers shouldn't dare."

Xu Poye's eyes widened. Good heavens, who is Jiang Tian?

He's someone who, not just them, has already entered the sights of some people and earned their praise.

He even personally approved the Special Merit Citation.

To put it bluntly, Jiang Tian had become a role model.

Even Minister Tan himself couldn't help but feel a deep admiration for Jiang Tian's talent.

And such a talent...

If the drug dealers were to actually do something dangerous...

It would be nothing short of a provocation against the entire system.

A hero about to receive a special merit award, if assassinated by those drug dealers or targeted in other ways...

It would be a resounding slap in the face.

"You're right, I must have been overthinking it," Minister Tan nodded upon hearing this.

After all, considering Jiang Tian's skills, those drug dealers would probably be too busy avoiding him to even think about it.

Just as Gao Xiaolong hung up the phone...

The phone rang immediately afterward.

"Grandpa, you haven't slept all night, don't be busy, go and get some rest."

At the door, Gao Yangyang, who had just finished showering and was still wearing her pajamas, frowned slightly upon hearing the voice, her face showing displeasure and worry.

While at the Municipal Bureau, Gao Yangyang knew that Gao Xiaolong hadn't slept all night.

His grandfather's health was failing, and coupled with his worry for her and various other pressures, he hadn't expected that even at home, there would be endless phone calls and unfinished official business.

He had just hung up one call when it rang again.

Gao Xiaolong, holding the phone, smiled wryly and said, "If it's someone else, I won't bother. Xiao Jiang usually doesn't call me unless it's important. Yangyang, I'll take this last call."

"Just this one last one. If you keep going like this, your body won't be able to handle it." Gao Yangyang seemed to agree reluctantly, but secretly she was overjoyed and ran to the side, eavesdropping intently.

Thankfully, cell phones these days are very loud.

Sitting beside her, Gao Yangyang could hear everything clearly.

"Xiao Jiang, what's up?" Gao Xiaolong glanced at Gao Yangyang and said, "Yangyang's watching me rest. If it's not important, can we talk after I wake up?"

Gao Xiaolong even cracked a joke towards the end.

But the next moment...

Jiang Tian's voice came through the phone.

Gao Xiaolong's humorous expression gradually froze.

"What did you say?" Gao Xiaolong's voice gradually turned cold, like ice, filled with the calm before a storm, giving off a deep sense of oppression.

Anyone familiar with Gao Xiaolong would understand that he was on the verge of losing control in a fit of rage.

"I just got home and found something was wrong with my neighbors. They even plotted to beat my wife after my mother left, and my naive sister came over to break up the fight and joined in the beating," Jiang Tian recounted.

He paused slightly before continuing, "But later, after interrogating them, I learned that they wanted to lure me here this way. They sent two assassins to kill me and my family, aiming to create chaos in Yunhai and cover up their drug deal that night involving Blood Hand and the Yun family overseas."

Boom!!!

Hearing this,

Gao Xiaolong could no longer suppress his anger. He slammed his fist on the table, his face contorted with fury: "How dare they! They're courting death!"

He was enraged.

Let alone Jiang Tian, ​​even an ordinary narcotics officer would be enraged if retaliated against like this by Gao Xiaolong.

However, Gao Xiaolong didn't expect those drug dealers to be so audacious, daring to do something like this.

They were practically courting death.

What wouldn't they do?

They dared to hire assassins to target Jiang Tian's family.

This was practically challenging the entire system's sensitive nerves.

It was a direct provocation of their absolute red line.

They were asking for death.



Chapter 142 caused a sensation. Now, standing before you is...


“Grandpa,” Gao Yangyang quickly comforted him.

“I’m fine,” Gao Xiaolong shook his head.

The Yun family.

Before this, Jiang Tian might have been somewhat unfamiliar with them.

However, after arresting Mr. Yun, a very detailed interrogation of the family forces behind him was naturally conducted.

It could be said that the Yun family was a very well-known drug trafficking family overseas.

Moreover, unlike Tucha, the Yun family was much more deeply rooted in the local area, with extremely powerful armed forces. Tucha was a new force, while the Yun family was an established force overseas.

“Trying to harm your family?” Gao Xiaolong stood up, suppressing his anger as he spoke.

The saying goes, “Don’t harm your family.”

But this saying doesn’t apply to ruthless drug traffickers. Those people are capable of anything for revenge.

“Was it the Yun family or that damned Blood Hand?” Gao Xiaolong asked.

“The Yun family is, after all, based overseas. Operating within the country wouldn’t be so easy. It must have been that Blood Hand,” Jiang Tian said.

"Okay, I'll have Song Liguo bring some men to your place right away," Gao Xiaolong said in a deep voice.

Bang!!!

He slammed his phone down on the table, his face contorted with rage.

This was outrageous!

This was a provocation against the entire anti-drug system.

If they didn't react promptly, similar incidents would become increasingly common.

After Jiang Tian hung up the phone,

he looked down at Huang Meng.

Huang Meng's eyes were now clear, completely devoid of his previous madness. He lay on the ground, trembling.

Jiang Tian, ​​wearing leather shoes,

tap tap tap!!!

Step by step, he approached Huang Meng. Reaching him, Jiang Tian kicked Huang Meng in the face, venting his anger.

"Stop!"

Ma Ziling stepped forward, pushing Jiang Tian away with both hands.

Jiang Tian looked somewhat confused.

Ma Ziling explained, “I don’t care who you are, but this person is very important to our branch. I’ve already reported it to the chief, and he’ll be here with people soon.”

“Your branch can’t handle this situation,” Jiang Tian explained.

Ma Ziling looked up: “If our branch can’t handle it, who can? He’s a drug dealer; I found him by surveillance, and our anti-drug team is on their way. If we can’t handle it, then you…”

At this point, Ma Ziling looked Jiang Tian up and down and said, “You, this unknown dangerous individual, can be handled. Not only him, but you also need to come with us for questioning. I’ve already reported everything to the bureau; the captain is on his way, so you can’t leave.”

As she said this, Ma Ziling became increasingly excited.

After all, in her eyes, this achievement was, in fact, a tremendous one.

As for the other details, they would naturally find out once they arrived at their branch, including what Jiang Tian did for a living.

“I told you, you can’t take it.” Jiang Tian sighed, then reached into his pocket to take out his identification.

“What are you trying to do? I’m warning you, don’t make another mistake!” Ma Ziling frantically took two steps back, startled.

She had just seen Jiang Tian instantly draw his gun and shoot two people dead.

*Thump thump thump!!!*

Just as Ma Ziling screamed, the previously silent stairwell was suddenly filled with hurried footsteps.

A moment later.

Leading the way was a man in police uniform, gun in hand: "Everyone, hands behind your heads, get down! We're from the City Central Branch Narcotics Control Team. Everyone, get down immediately and don't move, or I'll shoot!"

Quickly.

Very quickly.

Jiang Tian wasn't surprised, because this was in the city center.

It was very close to the City Central Branch, only a block or two away. Ma Ziling's call had prompted the narcotics control team to arrive so quickly, which was to be expected.

Following the man, seven or eight more fully armed men, some carrying riot shields, rushed in.

After glancing around, everyone's eyes instantly locked onto Jiang Tian, ​​their faces filled with vigilance.

"Captain Tian."

Upon seeing the team arrive, Ma Ziling immediately ran to the man in charge. "Captain Tian, ​​it's him! He had a gun. Although he just shot a drug dealer, he's definitely connected to them. It was probably infighting among the drug dealers."

"Judging a case requires solid evidence, not arbitrary guesswork," Jiang Tian shrugged.

*Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!*

But instantly, the seven or eight officers at the door were all startled.

Because Ma Ziling's description on the phone was terrifying—shooting and killing two enemies who had entered with guns.

Whether it was a revenge killing or something else, illegal possession of a firearm and murder is a capital offense.

Captain Tian, ​​his face icy, roared, "Hands behind your head, squat down immediately, or we'll shoot!"

"Before that, I think you need to verify their identities first," Jiang Tian explained.

In fact, he had already recommended Ma Ziling for credit on the phone.

Unfortunately, Ma Ziling didn't give him time to reveal his identity.

"Shut up! I've found three leads. Put down your weapons and put your hands behind your head, or you'll be shot dead!" Captain Tian shouted gleefully.

After all, this was a huge achievement!

Regardless of who Jiang Tian was, Huang Meng was undoubtedly a key figure in the drug trafficking trail.

Following the trail could potentially lead to a massive success.

Thinking this, Captain Tian glanced at Ma Ziling discreetly, seemingly never expecting her to discover such a crucial drug trafficking lead.

"Let's see who dares!"

But before Captain Tian could even rejoice,

a furious shout rang out.

Before Captain Tian could react, another urgent voice sounded.

A moment later.

Song Liguo and his men rushed up from downstairs.

Wei Xun and Captain Guo followed Song Liguo, running at breakneck speed. Song Liguo even smashed through several officers from the branch office blocking the entrance.

He then reached Captain Tian, ​​his face dark with rage as he stared at Captain Tian pointing a gun at Jiang Tian.

Insolence.

An act of defiance.

Do you know who's standing in front of you?

"Chief Song."

Captain Tian was instantly dumbfounded.

The anti-drug system operates under a dual leadership structure.

One is the internal anti-drug system, such as the subordinate branches and squadrons of the 21st Bureau; the other is the local branch office.

But regardless of who was in charge, one thing remained constant: Song Liguo, the branch captain, was the superior of this so-called Team Leader Tian.

How could he not recognize him?

That's why Team Leader Tian was dumbfounded, not understanding why Song Liguo had suddenly appeared here.

"Chief Song, what brings you here?" Team Leader Tian asked, bewildered.

"What brings me here? If I hadn't come, you would have been in big trouble! Look at the mess you've made!" Song Liguo roared, his eyes bloodshot with rage.

"Chief Song, we're investigating and arresting drug dealers." Team Leader Tian was still completely confused, not quite understanding. Trouble?

How could arresting drug dealers be trouble?

The two armed men at the door, Huang Meng, confessed to being assassins sent by the drug dealers.

Inside, Huang Meng, lying on the floor, was undoubtedly a criminal, even if he wasn't a drug dealer.

Jiang Xiaoyu and Ou Miao, needless to say, were two women, so it wasn't a big deal.

But Jiang Tian, ​​who was standing there, had just killed two people and beaten Huang Lei to this state. Logically and morally, it was only natural for them to take him back for investigation.

So, what trouble did he cause?

“Chief Song, is there some misunderstanding?” Ma Ziling’s big eyes revealed a clear naiveté.

This made Jiang Tian, ​​standing to the side, sigh. There was a reason Ma Ziling was discovered by drug dealers in her previous life and suffered such a terrible fate; she was too stupid at crucial moments.

Song Liguo took a deep breath and looked at Captain Tian, ​​saying slowly and deliberately, “Who was that you pointed a gun at? Let me tell you, it was someone awarded the title of Anti-Drug Vanguard by headquarters, a recipient of multiple first-class merits, a heroic anti-drug police officer. Now, do you understand what you’ve done?”

Buzz!!!

Pfft!!!

“My God!”



Chapter 143 Ma Ziling, Ma Ziling, do you know you've caused a huge disaster?


A deathly silence fell.

Ma Ziling stared in astonishment.

The entire room was silent except for heavy breathing.

Song Liguo's face was grim.

Actually, Jiang Tian's situation was rather unique. As a trainee police officer, he didn't even recognize his colleagues at the city bureau, and there were many he couldn't even name.

Not to mention the people from the branch bureaus; Jiang Tian had practically never met any of them. He'd only been on the job for a month.

People like Ma Ziling were the kind who were about to be promoted, had already passed their probationary period, and whose official appointments probably hadn't been finalized yet. But regardless, they had seen more people than Jiang Tian; for example, they'd attended meetings at the city bureau with their team.

Team Leader Tian and everyone from the branch bureau stared intently at Ma Ziling.

Because, at this moment, Ma Ziling had made them lose face, and had even almost caused a major disaster.

Originally, everyone thought it was a major achievement, that Ma Ziling had really done something amazing for their branch, standing out from the many Yunhai branches. It's just those few big drug lords like Mr. Yun, right?

Of course, the news from overseas hasn't spread yet, especially about Jiang Tian's hostage rescue operation abroad. Aside from the city bureau, not many people know about it yet.

However, as time goes by, this news will soon spread.

While Ma Ziling was still in a daze, a group of piercing gazes made her face turn pale instantly.

Oh no, she had just earned a merit, and now she had offended someone.

“Multiple first-class merit award recipients, and you're also a narcotics police officer?” Ma Ziling pointed at Jiang Tian, ​​her face contorted with pain.

"What a coincidence, me too," Jiang Tian nodded.

"Then why didn't you say so earlier?" Ma Ziling nearly vomited blood.

Jiang Tian had just stormed in, killing with ruthless efficiency, even Ma Ziling was completely stunned.

She thought he was some kind of gangster or terrorist.

And his expressionless face while killing clearly indicated it wasn't his first time; if she didn't know better, Ma Ziling would have thought Jiang Tian was an assassin.

Since he was a narcotics officer, why didn't he say so earlier?

Jiang Tian calmly took his hand out of his pocket and said, "I was just getting my badge, and then you guys rushed in, not giving me a chance to speak, pointing guns at me."

Team Leader Tian was stunned.

Good grief, after thinking about it carefully, he realized that Jiang Tian reaching into his pocket had startled him, and he almost fired in a reflex.

After all, there were already dead people at the scene; this was very dangerous.

But he never expected this.

The man reached out his hand—he was taking his identification!

Team Leader Tian's brow twitched, then his steps became heavy. He took one step at a time to Jiang Tian, ​​his head trembling as he accepted the black leather badge-adorned identification.

Upon opening it, Jiang Tian's photo came into view.

"Jiang Tian?"

Team Leader Tian's head buzzed at the first two words.

Those two words, that name.

It was quite famous.

Mr. Yun's criminal gang was apprehended.

Furthermore, the city bureau forwarded the case to the branch bureau for their staff to study.

What impressed Captain Tian even more was that, like Ma Ziling, the other party was an intern—or rather, Ma Ziling's junior.

Yet, they skyrocketed, not only getting promoted early after just one month of internship but also receiving a promotion ahead of schedule, and even achieving numerous merits.

Whoosh!!!

Team Leader Tian immediately stood at attention and saluted.

In reality, Jiang Tian's identity was already semi-public.

Currently, because he had solved numerous major cases, almost single-handedly cracking them, and even receiving expedited commendations for his achievements,

it was difficult to conceal.

Especially for someone within the system, it was even more impossible.

Precisely because of this, it had become a semi-public secret.

Team Leader Tian was completely exasperated.

Ma Ziling, Ma Ziling!

Do you even know how much trouble you've caused?

At that moment, Song Liguo, along with his men, was carrying away the unrecognizable Huang Meng.

After all, Huang Meng might be involved in a very serious drug trafficking case.

Good heavens, she'd offended all the leaders, and now she was losing all the credit?
