Chapter 144 Advanced Gold-Burning Entries, Exploded!


As the people in the room gradually dispersed, the forensic doctor conducted the autopsy at the door, while Jiang Tian fell silent.

Blood Hand.

Who was Blood Hand? Huang Meng didn't know either. Jiang Tian had just interrogated Huang Meng, and it turned out Huang Meng was essentially a good-for-nothing.

Mainly because Huang Meng was doing business outside, he came into contact with a businessman from out of town, couldn't resist the temptation, and ended up getting addicted to that stuff.

Personally, he hadn't done anything heinous, otherwise Jiang Tian's scanning radar wouldn't have failed to detect him.

However, the good news was that Jiang Tian's Judgment Eye would soon be in place, and the application for a special merit award was also in the process of being processed, which would make up for this shortcoming.

However, through brief questioning, Jiang Tian did understand the general outline of Huang Meng's situation.

He had only recently become addicted to that stuff, and was then threatened and controlled by the other party to do this. Generally, foreign forces have very little understanding and control over their own territory; they mostly support proxies.

It's obvious that the Yun family is unlikely to be behind this; it was almost certainly Blood Hand's idea to wipe out Jiang Tian's entire family.

Having figured this out, Jiang Tian's goal became clear.

"So, it's usually that businessman who contacts him, using the threat of investment and the potential for financial gain or even being tainted by that substance as leverage. Don't you have any news about that person?" Song Liguo hung up the phone, his brow furrowed deeply, then looked at Jiang Tian with concern.

"Xiao Jiang, don't worry too much. Don't fret. Chief Gao is taking your niece and sister-in-law's situation very seriously and will arrange for people to protect them secretly," Song Liguo reassured him.

"Xiao Jiang?"

Song Liguo sat on the sofa in Jiang Tian's house and waved to him.

Jiang Tian suddenly stood up.

Actually, it wasn't that Jiang Tian hadn't responded; he'd just been thinking about Blood Hand.

He was certain he'd heard the name in his past life, but because it was so long ago, and perhaps he hadn't paid much attention then, he'd long forgotten it.

His memory was too hazy; even extraordinary memory wasn't enough.

Jiang Tian had just been frantically adding points to his memory.

[Transcendent Memory (Green) - Photographic Memory (Blue)] (Things you've seen, you can recall if you so choose, stored forever in the deepest recesses of your memory.)

That's right, Jiang Tian was leveling up.

And he was absolutely right.

If you were to ask what Jiang Tian's most valuable asset was after his rebirth, without a doubt, besides the attribute system, it would be the many cases he'd handled while working in an office in his previous life.

After leveling up, Jiang Tian looked at his attribute panel with increasing satisfaction.

[Perfect Shot (Gold)]

[Scanning Radar (Gold)]

[Martial Arts Master (Red)]

[Endless Stamina (Red)]

[Detective Genius (Blue)]

[Photographic Memory (Blue)]

Special Attributes 1: [God of Body Shape] 2: [God of Wealth Blessing (Automatically generates two coins per minute)] (Reserve Funds: 4772)

Current Sin Value: 107800

These sin points were even enough for Jiang Tian to upgrade a gold-level attribute. Jiang Tian had already been frantically harvesting sin points from Tu Cha, accumulating over 100,000 in one go. Then, on his return, he happened to run into Zhang Jiasheng and harvested some more.

Jiang Tian's gaze was dark. After a moment's consideration between Martial Arts Master and Endless Stamina, he chose Endless Stamina.

"System, add points." Jiang Tian's eyes were sinister.

This time, he was going to give that so-called Blood Hand a huge surprise.

Didn't he like killing him and his entire family, adding excitement to Yunhai so he could do business in peace?

Then Jiang Tian would make him regret it for the rest of his life.

"Ding, Endless Stamina attribute has been upgraded."

[Endless Stamina (Red) - Extraordinary Human (Gold)] (Your speed at full power can instantly kill a cheetah, your energy is inexhaustible, your strength surpasses that of a tyrant. At this moment, you have become a hexagonal warrior.)

Boom!!!

At this very moment...

The moment his stats upgraded, Jiang Tian felt a terrifying surge of heat coursing through his body, as if his very essence had been cleansed. While the term "marrow cleansing" might seem exaggerated, Jiang Tian was undeniably confident at that moment.

It was too powerful.

Even his boundless stamina had its limitations.

But Jiang Tian at this moment...

was a superhuman.

A thought struck Jiang Tian. Yes, for him, even if ten or twenty martial arts masters approached, none could be his match. In that respect, he was sufficient for now.

But...

In terms of physique, the return on investment was the highest.

Especially with the golden stats, Jiang Tian touched his heart and could clearly feel it pounding like thunder.

"Blood like mercury..."

Jiang Tian felt it, clenched his fist, and moved it slightly. He felt he could kill someone with a single finger. This wasn't arrogance; it was something he could genuinely do.

Seeing Jiang Tian's stunned expression, Song Liguo immediately became worried and began to reassure him.

After Jiang Tian returned home, he sat on the sofa without saying a word. Jiang Xiaoyu carefully placed a glass of water beside him, not daring to interrupt.

As for Jiang's mother, after returning from grocery shopping, Jiang Xiaoyu told her what had happened, which startled her.

Seeing her son so distraught, she didn't dare disturb him and silently went to cook.

In this situation, as a mother, Jiang's mother couldn't offer much help; the only thing she could do was not disturb Jiang Tian.

"Xiao Jiang, I'm leaving now. You must pull yourself together. Believe that evil will not prevail over good, and we will definitely bring them to justice," Song Liguo comforted him.

Jiang Tian suddenly snapped back to reality.

He had been so focused on adding points that he had completely forgotten about Song Liguo. But it didn't matter; Jiang Tian desperately needed to vent.

Regardless of the surge in power.

It gave Jiang Tian the feeling that even a boxing champion could be defeated with a single punch—it was terrifyingly absurd.

That's incredibly strong!

Jiang Tian thought to himself, then looked up and saw his mother wearing an apron, cooking, with his sister helping her. Song Liguo, however, had left sometime earlier.

"That's wonderful!" Jiang Tian's gaze was deep and unsettling. In his past life, at this time, he was all alone; all his relatives were gone, and only Wang Yifei had turned his life upside down.

Fortunately, everything had changed now, and anyone who wanted to disrupt it... Jiang Tian's eyes grew increasingly terrifying.

Meanwhile, Song Liguo returned to the city police station and reported to Jiang Peng and Gao Xiaolong.

Instantly, Jiang Peng and Gao Xiaolong, who had rushed over to understand the situation, were filled with worry.

With their rich experience, especially Gao Xiaolong, who had seen many geniuses in his life, they knew that over 90% of these geniuses would ultimately suffer a setback and never recover.

Although no serious consequences had occurred yet, what if the drug dealers' target wasn't Jiang Tian, ​​but rather Jiang Xiaoyu and his ilk?

"I hope this blow won't place too much psychological burden on Xiao Jiang," Gao Xiaolong said, his face grim.

"Chief Gao, I believe in Xiao Jiang," Jiang Peng said.

Gao Xiaolong shook his head: "This is quite a blow. We thought we could get some information from Huang Meng, but unexpectedly, besides a tiny bit of evidence, we got nothing else."

Gao Xiaolong's face darkened as he said this.

Because they didn't even have a direction to take.

Another reason was that they had absolutely no idea where the bloody hand was located.



Chapter 145 Are you crazy? How could you find this? Justice is everywhere.


“In the underworld, Bloodhand is quite famous, no less so than that so-called Black Wolf. It's just that Bloodhand is rather mysterious. It's said he has over a dozen smuggling teams under his command, with considerable armed force, but very few people have ever seen him,” Jiang Peng sighed.

Yes.

If it were a quick and decisive solution, that would be one thing.

This blow could be enough to erase a genius from the public eye forever.

That's why…

Because these kinds of complex, unsolved cases ultimately come down to luck, the experienced Gao Xiaolong knew that after capturing Huang Meng and eliminating the two assassins, the real culprit behind it all would likely be known by now.

Therefore, Gao Xiaolong planned to go back and rest before considering the next steps.

How to teach those criminals a terrible lesson? This would be a slap in the face, a blatant provocation.

They dared to assassinate even Jiang Tian; what wouldn't they dare to do?

Jiang Peng nodded helplessly.

Jiang Peng himself was helpless in this situation.

Killing Jiang Tian's entire family meant killing him, the city police chief, as well.

It was incredibly audacious.

It's a matter of mutual dependence.

If Jiang Tian's entire family is wiped out, what about them, the narcotics officers?

Will they one day...?

But, it must be said, this was something these desperate criminals were capable of doing.

For them, living one day at a time, earning money through the dangers of life and death.

Their minds were completely irrational; they had almost no scruples.

Of all criminals, drug dealers are arguably the most troublesome and terrifying.

While the city police were still working on their operation,

Jiang Tian had already finished his meal.

"Xiao Jiang, you didn't come home to rest all night. What were you up to?" Jiang's mother asked, carrying a plate of dishes.

"Nothing, just going out to digest a bit, taking a walk," Jiang Tian replied with a relaxed smile.

That's right.

Thanks to his photographic memory, Jiang Tian successfully recalled the case file about the Blood Hand.

The reason his memory was so hazy was because his colleague who was categorizing and compiling the case files had only casually mentioned it in passing.

"What a pity. Although Bloodhand has been caught, his crimes over the years are countless."

Jiang Tian casually replied, "If only he'd been caught sooner, none of this would have happened."

"Who would have thought that Bloodhand's hideout was actually Layton Security, frequenting high society all the time?"

Actually, for Jiang Tian in his previous life, this was just a casual remark from a colleague during a chat, and more than ten years had passed.

In reality, after so many conversations with colleagues, just casual comments, who could remember them all?

Jiang Tian felt a sense of familiarity only because of his extraordinary memory; otherwise, he would have forgotten it completely.

But after upgrading his photographic memory, Jiang Tian could even recall the details clearly, as if it happened yesterday.

"System is awesome."

What could Jiang Tian say? Of course, he praised it wildly.

In Jiang Tian's eyes, this system was practically a god.

Jiang Tian silently tucked his gun into his waistband, preparing to check out Layton Security.

Layton Security.

A well-known company in Yunhai.

If Jiang Tian remembered correctly, many celebrities recruited their security guards from Layton Security, especially many of today's business tycoons.

Jiang Tian, ​​lost in thought, walked out of the residential area.

That's why Layton Security, like most security companies, doesn't really have much connection to ordinary people, and it's not particularly famous.

These kinds of companies generally serve the upper class.

For example, some of the big bosses who have become rich overnight during this era's boom.

"Layton Security."

Jiang Tian hailed a taxi on the street, but as he opened the car door, he suddenly stopped, then looked thoughtfully in one direction.

However, he immediately jumped in without paying much attention.

Less than ten seconds after Jiang Tian left, Ma Ziling, dressed in a pink tracksuit, rushed out from behind a tree by the roadside and reached the intersection. Just then, a taxi pulled up.

“Stop! Stop!” Ma Ziling flagged down the car and hurriedly told the driver, “Sir, sir, follow that taxi ahead.”

“No problem.” The driver, a young man in his early twenties, stared intently at Ma Ziling.

“Beautiful lady, hold on tight.” The driver smoothly shifted gears, and the car launched itself forward with a burnout.

“Thank you, sir,” Ma Ziling said gratefully.

Then, her eyes were fixed on the taxi ahead, a smug smile spreading across Ma Ziling's face.

“I knew he’d found some clues and wanted to secretly solve the case.” Ma Ziling praised herself for her quick thinking.

After all, strictly speaking, she was the one who discovered the case.

As a result, because it was aimed at Jiang Tian, ​​the Municipal Bureau took over the case directly. Not to mention Ma Ziling, even their branch bureau had no chance to intervene and could only cooperate with the Municipal Bureau.

Seeing an opportunity to earn merit so close, only to have it slip away completely, Ma Ziling was unwilling to accept it. So, while everyone else had left, Ma Ziling secretly hid in the small green woods.

Sure enough, Jiang Tian left home alone not long after.

He must have discovered something.

"Oh, so you're trying to hog the credit for yourself," Ma Ziling muttered to herself.

The car drove for about half an hour.

The journey wasn't short. Although the city center was only one district, it was quite large. Navigating the winding city streets, it took at least ten minutes.

They arrived directly at the most bustling CBD commercial district in the city center.

No wonder Yunhai, as a first-tier city, is among the top cities in the country in terms of development.

In terms of GDP and development, it ranks high nationwide.

Otherwise, Yunhai wouldn't be able to accommodate tens of millions of people and be at the forefront of development in this era.

Of course, this rampant economic development also bred a great deal of darkness.

It provided fertile ground for countless criminal gangs to thrive in the already chaotic Yunhai. It can only be said that every gain has its loss.

And as the core of the core, Yunhai CDB, reborn, Jiang Tian was momentarily dazed.

In the first two thousand years of its development, the roads were eight lanes wide, four lanes in each direction.

It even resembled about 80% of the Jiang Tian's previous life before his rebirth.

"Holy crap, that's a Rolls-Royce! And what are those in front and behind? Those are Mercedes-Benzes! My god, these people are really rich!"

Just then...

The driver suddenly gasped and instinctively slowed down.

The three cars—a Rolls-Royce in the middle, flanked by Mercedes-Benz W14s—cut in front of the taxi.

The taxi driver was terrified of bumping into them.

Jiang Tian, ​​who had been lounging in his car, suddenly sat up straight.

His gaze was fixed on the three cars.

Because at that moment,

more than a dozen red dots appeared on Jiang Tian's radar.

Especially above the Rolls-Royce, a particularly bright crimson dot was visible.

"If I hadn't heard about this in my past life, I would never have imagined that such a terrifying criminal gang existed in such a bustling area." Jiang Tian gasped, memorizing the license plates, preparing to deal with them after finishing today's business.

After all, for Jiang Tian now, the more credit he earned, the stronger he felt.

Now, he's earning nearly 100,000 yuan a month from keyword entries, especially if he were to earn a first-class merit.

Jiang Tian's eyes brightened.

But, speak of the devil, and he appears.

[A stamp collecting advancement task is now available: First-class merit achievement reward. Currently holding 4/5 first-class merits. Task reward: Randomly sign in to a building in the CBD.] PS: (As an anti-drug vanguard, the system will not allow any drug dealers to use their wealth to crush and insult the host.)

Buzz!!

Holy crap.

Jiang Tian's eyes widened. What does a building in the core CBD mean?



Chapter 146 The Mantis Stalks the Cicada, Unaware of the Oriole Behind; Actually, I'm the Hunter


As Jiang Tian pondered this, he had already called Yu Hui on the way, asking her to investigate Layton Security's information and company location directly at the police station.

The taxi driver maintained a safe distance from the three cars ahead, his speed gradually slowing down.

Soon.

As time passed, the three luxury cars gradually drove towards a building, and Jiang Tian couldn't help but lean forward.

"A coincidence?" Jiang Tian asked, his face full of astonishment.

Because Layton Security's company headquarters was located here, in this very building.

"Keep going, downstairs," Jiang Tian pointed to the underground parking lot ahead.

The taxi driver followed him into the underground parking lot. Jiang Tian didn't know if it was a coincidence, but he was skilled and daring.

Jiang Tian was here today to cause trouble.

Of course, Jiang Tian couldn't be sure if the other party was indeed Layton Security, as other companies also occupied this building.

It wasn't just Layton Security; it might be from another company.

"Looks like we're going to catch a big fish again today," Jiang Tian couldn't help but lick his lips.

"Alright, Master, it's right here."

Jiang Tian took out his leather wallet to pay, which was honestly a bit inconvenient.

At least for Jiang Tian, ​​who was used to online payments for everything in his future life, carrying cash everywhere was quite uncomfortable.

Of course, besides three meals a day, Jiang Tian didn't have many other major expenses, except for the car he had always longed for.

Not having a car was very inconvenient for Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian was thinking about something as he opened the car door and got out. He had only taken two steps when another taxi pulled up from behind.

Jiang Tian had noticed this taxi from the beginning, or rather, he had noticed Ma Ziling following him, but he hadn't said anything. If Ma Ziling wanted to see, let her see.

A real narcotics officer wants to be a heroic narcotics officer.

How do they deal with drug dealers?

Let's give Ma Ziling a little shock first.

Jiang Tian's gaze wasn't on Ma Ziling, but on the three luxury cars that had now stopped in the parking lot.

Jiang Tian lit a cigarette, his gaze fixed intently.

As an all-around fighter, Jiang Tian certainly had weaknesses, such as his tracking skills.

To be honest, Jiang Tian wasn't very good at tracking. Rather than sneaking around, he wasn't afraid of what the criminals might do, so he preferred to observe openly.

Click!

Just then, four or five men in black suits and sunglasses got out of the two Mercedes-Benz cars.

After getting out, they looked around, giving Jiang Tian a special look.

One of them quietly approached the rear window of the Rolls-Royce and gently knocked. After a moment, the window slowly opened, revealing a pair of sharp eyes.

After a brief exchange, the bodyguard-like man quietly opened the rear door of the Rolls-Royce and then placed his hand on the car frame.

Tap tap tap!

A pair of brand-new, gleaming leather shoes emerged from the Rolls-Royce, landing crisply on the epoxy flooring.

Accompanying this was the sound of conversation.

"It doesn't matter if the mission fails, as long as chaos ensues." The voice followed immediately after the shoes landed, unhurried and measured.

A moment later.

A man of average appearance, about 1.8 meters tall, with a slender build, in his thirties or forties, wearing a neat suit, stepped out of the Rolls-Royce, speaking as he did so.

He didn't even try to be discreet while speaking.

In fact, he turned his head and even gave Jiang Tian a friendly nod and a slight smile.

He appeared to be a very successful and polite businessman.

However, his words instantly ignited a cold light in Jiang Tian's eyes.

"Young man, we met several intersections ago, and it's such a coincidence that we're walking this route together. What, working at a company?" The man smiled and nodded at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian made no attempt to hide his intentions, smiling at the man who stepped out of the Rolls-Royce. "Yes, quite a coincidence, boss, you have a keen eye!"

"Young man, is this your first time here? Let me show you to the elevator. The garage is a maze of twists and turns; it's easy to get lost. The first time I came here, I was lost for over half an hour and couldn't find the elevator." The man invited with a friendly smile, even joking with Jiang Tian.

"That's because we didn't plan ahead."

Jiang Tian nodded in agreement, following the man. After a few turns, they arrived at the elevator.

Jiang Tian glanced behind him; Ma Ziling was following closely behind. Unfortunately, she probably wouldn't see what was about to happen.

Turning back, Jiang Tian looked at the man, his face instantly breaking into a smile.

But...

When they entered the elevator...

At least...

When Ma Ziling hid in the corner, watching inside the elevator...

At the very moment the elevator doors were about to close...

Ma Ziling suddenly saw...

Both Jiang Tian and the smiling Rolls-Royce owner's warm smiles vanished instantly.

They disappeared completely.

Instead, their faces turned cold, their eyes seemingly filled with terrifying murderous intent.

"No, what is this?" Ma Ziling's heart skipped a beat.



Chapter 147 High School Classmates on the Mission


"Do they know each other?"

"Why did their expressions suddenly change after entering the elevator?"

"Did they talk about something unpleasant?"

"No, no, no, there must be something I don't know."

First floor.

Because of Jiang Tian's identity, after learning about him, Ma Ziling wondered, could a narcotics officer, and a newly joined trainee at that, know a big boss like him?

Normally, Ma Ziling wouldn't suspect anything.

Ma Ziling felt increasingly uneasy.

"What if? What if they know each other?" Ma Ziling was getting anxious.

Although outwardly strong-willed, Ma Ziling had to admit that Jiang Tian had saved her by shooting at that moment.

"Couldn't you have just told me if there was a problem?" Ma Ziling looked at the rapidly ascending elevator, on the verge of tears.

What if reporting it turned out to be a false alarm?

Thump, thump, thump!!!

Thinking this, Ma Ziling ran up the elevator like a madwoman.

Meanwhile,

Inside the elevator.

Jiang Tian was on the phone with his mother, even with his back to several people.

The man who got out of the Rolls-Royce looked calmly at Jiang Tian's back.

"Mom, make dinner. For tonight, make some braised pork trotters," Jiang Tian said into the phone.

Jiang Tian had been preparing to act as soon as he entered the elevator, but at the crucial moment, his mother's phone rang.

“Your mother’s calling you home for dinner. Running around like this isn’t good!” The Rolls-Royce man’s voice came from behind Jiang Tian.

His voice was completely devoid of the friendly and gentle tone he had shown outside the elevator; it was utterly devoid of emotion, as if he were speaking to a dead man.

“It’s just a pity your mother probably won’t be able to wait for you to eat.” The Rolls-Royce man’s voice continued.

At the same time, something hard pressed against Jiang Tian’s lower back.

In the Rolls-Royce man’s view, Jiang Tian should have been terrified.

But the next moment, a voice that surprised the Rolls-Royce man came out: “Then I’m sorry, but I’ve always vowed to be a good child who listens to his mother. I promised to come home for dinner, and I absolutely will not and cannot break my promise. Do you want me to be a bad child who disobeys his mother?”

The Rolls-Royce man looked utterly astonished, seemingly completely unexpected that Jiang Tian could say such a thing at this moment.

"Good, good, good, that's got guts, hahaha, as expected of Yunhai's anti-drug vanguard, Mr. Jiang, I admire your courage, but to dare come here alone, I have to say you have guts, even though it's just a suicide mission. You may be strong, but perhaps you lack a bit of rationality." The Rolls-Royce man suddenly spoke.

"You were recognized from this far away!" Jiang Tian's tone was slightly regretful.

This is why the secrecy couldn't be maintained. However, Yunhai's situation is too unique. The drug cartel is incredibly powerful, and Jiang Tian's reputation is too strong and too famous; complete secrecy is simply impossible.

Unexpected, yet also within Jiang Tian's expectations.

At this moment, if Jiang Tian wanted to, he could take care of everyone in the elevator, including the Rolls-Royce man and his six bodyguards, in three seconds.

Being a superhuman grants Jiang Tian not only quick reflexes but also a keen sixth sense. Even with a gun pointed at him, even with the trigger in his hand, Jiang Tian could kill him before he even had a chance to pull it.

Jiang Tian felt a pang of regret, but his eyes gleamed.

Sure enough, he hadn't made a mistake.

"It's true that you've managed to find your way here, but Jiang Tian, ​​you should know that the underworld won't tolerate you, and Yunhai certainly won't tolerate you. Too many people want you dead. You dare come here alone? Isn't that courting death?" the Rolls-Royce man said, preparing to attack.

Jiang Tian slightly raised his hand, his keen intuition telling him, as if he had unlocked some kind of genetic key.

His extreme confidence allowed him to even give the criminal a chance to fire first.

But the Rolls-Royce man's words ignited a fire within Jiang Tian.

These words undeniably soured Jiang Tian's mood.

Arrogance.

They couldn't tolerate him, so they wanted to wipe out his entire family?

Who gave these criminals such audacity?

The next moment.

Jiang Tian snapped back to reality, then his face darkened.

He was about to kill someone, and an acquaintance was present—wouldn't that easily lead to misunderstandings?

“You've mistaken me for someone else, it's not me,” Jiang Tian shook his head decisively.

This made Jiang Tian sigh helplessly.

Never mind.

Four years have passed.

Jiang Tian didn't deny it and asked, “What are you doing here?”



Chapter 148 A Sudden Strike, Thunder and Storm


“I’m a senior this year. The school allowed me to do an internship, and I happened to find a job through campus recruitment. I’m interning here, and I’m just going upstairs to deliver a document to a partner company,” Pan Meng explained.

Because.

At this very moment.

Unfortunately.

Jiang Tian, ​​when dealing with drug dealers and criminals, always preferred ruthlessness and few words.

Jiang Tian used to find this difficult; he practiced for a long time at the police academy but still couldn't use it effectively.

Jiang Tian could not only do it easily, but his speed was unmatched.

*Clang!*

Two shots, just two shots.

The last two bodyguards in suits lay lifeless on the ground, two bloody holes oozing from their foreheads.

Fast.

The entire operation took less than half a minute, less than twenty seconds. On average, one person was killed every second.

The speed was too fast.

So fast it was almost incomprehensible.

Silence!!

At this moment, the entire elevator corridor was silent.

Thump!!

Jiang Tian kicked away the corpse of one of the bodyguards blocking the elevator entrance.

To be honest.

At this moment.

Because for a righteous anti-drug police officer:

He faces immense pressure and danger on the front lines every day.

Just like when the higher-ups were wary of Tucha, if they didn't teach Tucha a painful lesson, those ruthless and audacious drug dealers would dare to follow suit.

Similarly.

This time, if Jiang Tian didn't do something,

this kind of thing would only increase in the future.

Chapter 150: Just because he glanced at her, she was gone?


Clap clap!!

Just as Jiang Tian started attacking wildly, grabbing the hair of the man in the white suit with one hand and slamming it against the ground,

Across the corridor, at the company entrance, a man who looked to be in his forties, who bore a striking resemblance to the man in a white suit, was applauding.

Jiang Tian curled his lips and said, "Bloodhand?" ”

The man didn't admit it, but he didn't deny it either, just looked at Jiang Tian calmly.

This time, Jiang Tian was completely certain. After all, the blood-red glowing spot on his body, aside from the Blood Hand, probably couldn't be found anywhere else.

After all, the level of his crimes was already not much less than Tucha's.

He had been hiding for so many years, and was found directly in his hometown?

"Cracking down on criminals is our duty!" Jiang Tian took out a towel and wiped the blood from his fist.

"Even if we committed a crime, after there was no resistance, Officer Jiang must respect our human rights." Bloodhand said coldly.

On that cold face was an unmistakable rage and the shock of seeing the scene.

That's right.

Corpses lay everywhere, and people lay scattered everywhere, screaming in agony.

No, those screaming were already barely clinging to life, and very few were still alive.

Including the man in the white suit, there were seventeen people in total. These seventeen were lying on the ground, ninety percent of them were already lifeless.

Jiang Tian's ruthlessness made Blood's scalp tingle.

Especially now, after killing so many people, Jiang Tian could still remain calm, causing Bloodhand's pupils to contract continuously.

Jiang Tian lowered his head, rummaged through the pockets of the man in the white suit, and finally found a bag of white powder. After showing it to Bloodhand, he spoke: "Don't you know drug dealers have no human rights?" ”

That's right.

Other criminals can respect their human rights.

But drug dealers.

There is no human rights that can be respected.

The blood's face was visibly ugly.

For Bloodhand, after all these years of caution, his favorite thing to do was to hide himself, to stay hidden behind the scenes.

As the boss of a security company, he mingles with high society and has a huge network of connections.

But all of that was built on the fact that he had committed no crimes.

Once Bloodhand's true identity is revealed, everything he has created will cease to exist.

Looking at the scene before him.

Bloodhand even wanted to slap him a few times—wasn't that just being shameless?

He had just decided to make a move against Jiang Tian in the morning, hoping to make Yunhai lively and make his tonight deal go more smoothly.

But I never dreamed of this!

The order was a casual plan issued in the morning.

At first, I thought success was one thing, but failure didn't matter.

But at noon, they came straight to me.

Are you a ghost?

I had just sent someone to come to your house and take you down, and you sniffed straight into the long-hidden lair.

The security company has been operating for so many years and has never made a mistake!

"How do you know about me?" Bloodhand's face was full of grimness.

He was certain that those two assassins, and Huang Meng, absolutely didn't know him.

He thought about it for a long time, but still had no idea how Jiang Tian had found him, or how he had managed all this before him.

Upon receiving the news, he made a snap decision and immediately arranged for more than a dozen skilled men to block the elevator entrance, preparing to kill him to silence him.

He only signed one more document for three minutes. When the gunshots rang out and he came out, he intended to dispose of Jiang Tian's body.

And then, damn it, they were wiped out at a glance?

"Since you know me, you should know that I can easily smell the stench on your drug dealers from a great distance." Jiang Tian twisted his neck and hooked his finger at the bloody hand.

He knew that for such a major drug lord, not being caught was one thing.

If caught, death was inevitable; surrendering was impossible.

Because such severe criminal penalties are the main reason anti-narcotics police are extremely dangerous, drug dealers know that being caught means the death penalty, yet they are prepared to die together.

Bloodhand narrowed his eyes.

Jiang Tian glanced into the office, and under the radar scanner surveillance, he could clearly see two red dots hidden behind Bloodhand. Even without radar scanning, Jiang Tian could somewhat see a shadow slowly moving.

The next moment.

Without giving Jiang Tian a chance to speak, Bloodhand charged straight at him.

There was only a two-meter aisle between the two sides.

One of them strode up to Jiang Tian and threw a punch straight at his face.

At this moment, Jiang Tian was multitasking.

He knew in his heart that Bloodhand wanted to get his attention, but in fact, the two drug dealers hiding inside the company entrance had already quietly slipped over through the glass corridor of the partition.

Jiang Tian turned his hand and grabbed Bloodhand's fist.

"Do you know why I'm called Blood Hand? Kid, I've been practicing Iron Sand Palm since I was three years old, training for most of my life. In my early years, when I fought the world, at least thirty people died at least fifty."

Greeting him so easily barehanded made Bloodhand sneer at the corner of his mouth.

The fist was about to leave afterimages, and even Jiang Tian could see the thick, pitch-black calluses on the opponent's fist.

"Are you taking me for granted?"

Jiang Tianyi gripped Blood's fist.

As soon as they made contact.

Hiss!!

The cold smile at the corner of Bloodhand's mouth instantly froze, and he gasped wildly, his eyes widening. This punch felt as if it had struck steel.

painful !!

The pain was so intense that tears nearly streamed down his bloody hands.

Splash!!

Without giving Bloodhand time to react, Jiang Tian's other hand directly turned into a fist and smashed toward the glass partition beside him.

A thick sheet of glass was shattered by Jiang Tian's circle.

Then, as if grabbing something, he suddenly withdrew his hand. In his palm, at some point, a burly figure had been pulled out, still struggling wildly as he emerged.

"Let me go, cough cough..."

The burly little brother grabbed by Jiang Tian's throat had his eyes nearly popping out.

But in the next moment, Jiang Tian's expression didn't change.

Crack!!

The drug dealer's neck was twisted off, and he collapsed weakly to the ground.

Bang!!

Gunshots rang out.

Behind Jiang Tian, it was as if he had eyes, grabbing Bloodhand's fist and suddenly bending sideways.

"Ah, you shark arms, I'm rough, are you blind?" Bloody Hand clutched his bleeding shoulder and cursed wildly.



Chapter 151 Miracles Will Last Forever, Continuing the Glory


"Boss, I'm sorry, let go of the boss, or I'll kill this woman." The henchman was also startled, but before he could even think about how Jiang Tian had dodged, he was about to point his gun at Pan Meng.

Pan Meng was locked in the elevator entrance, her face pale, clutching her head, her lips trembling as she repeatedly cried out, "No, no!!!"

An ordinary person, faced with this scene...

Pan Meng had been frozen in place from the very beginning, her legs unable to even support her weight.

Even later, there was a puddle of water at her feet.

She was completely terrified and wet herself.

But in reality, in this kind of scene, with more than ten people dying instantly, gunshots and bullets flying everywhere...

An ordinary person, especially a young woman who had just graduated and was doing an internship, would be terrified and wet herself in the face of such a scene; this was the most normal reaction.

Bang!!!

The gunshot rang out, and Pan Meng's pupils contracted rapidly.

Thump!!!

The bodyguard who had emerged from the back door fell stiffly to the ground, gun in hand, his eyes still fixed on Pan Meng.

A bloody hole was gushing from his forehead.

"Ugh!!!"

Pan Meng vomited.

Meanwhile, Jiang Tian held the bloodied hand in one hand, as if it were a chick, while slowly holstering his pistol with the other.

Then he raised his hand and slammed it down on the bloodied hand's chin.

"You..."

The bloodied hand's eyes widened, then he fell straight to the ground, unconscious.

He hadn't killed the bloodied hand because he still had value.

As a seasoned, veteran drug lord who had built his fortune through smuggling, he possessed significant intelligence and usefulness.

"You killed them?" Pan Meng's face was deathly pale.

She looked at Jiang Tian.

At that moment.

Pan Meng came to her senses.

Besides Jiang Tian, ​​no one else was standing at the scene. Pan Meng had just been so frightened that she was vomiting and had diarrhea.

After vomiting,

Pan Meng looked at Jiang Tian, ​​her mind drifting back to her high school days.

Jiang Tian was her deskmate, a very shy yet sunny boy who always secretly followed after a manipulative woman named Wang Yifei.

Of course, what Pan Meng remembered most vividly was how Jiang Tian used to borrow her homework and frequently beg her to bring him breakfast. He would not only give her some but also buy an extra so she could deliver it to Wang Yifei.

Because that manipulative woman played hard to get with Jiang Tian and refused his breakfast.

Recalling the past, Pan Meng thought Jiang Tian was going to be ruined by that woman, Wang Yifei.

But now...

Pan Meng looked at the scene before her, feeling her head spinning.

In the blink of an eye,

Jiang Tian had killed more than ten people in just a few minutes.

"Have you forgotten what I do?" Jiang Tian shrugged.

To be honest, Pan Meng was quite good to him back in school, especially when Jiang Tian turned over a new leaf and started studying. It was Pan Meng who tutored him; without her, Jiang Tian might not have even gotten into police academy.

"Police?" Pan Meng's mouth dropped open.

"Bingo, I'm now a proud narcotics officer," Jiang Tian explained.

"Narcotics officer? Then what about them?" Pan Meng suddenly stood up, her face full of excitement.

"Drug dealers, of course."

After a brief explanation, Jiang Tian took out his phone, intending to call the city police station to report.

The next moment, Pan Meng's words instantly darkened Jiang Tian's face.

"Are the anti-drug police in Yunhai really that terrifying? A lot of people online are saying that Yunhai's anti-drug efforts are just for show, nothing more than decorations, and some are even mocking Yunhai as the crime capital of Gotham."

After saying this, Pan Meng noticed Jiang Tian's dark expression and quickly changed the subject, saying, "Well, I strongly condemned them online back then."

Jiang Tian's lips twitched.

However, the online mockery was indeed accurate.

According to Jiang Tian's memory, it seemed to be five years later, when the higher-ups could no longer tolerate Yunhai, they were enraged and directly stationed a large army, conducting a full-scale crackdown for over half a year.

During those six months, clear gunshots echoed throughout the city.

In any case, Jiang Tian remembered it as quite intense.

But there was nothing that could be done. Foreign infiltration, a chaotic situation—only Jiang Tian could handle it; anyone else in his shoes could only watch helplessly.

It wasn't that they lacked ability, but the sheer size of the criminal organization and the extent of their collaborations created a dense, intricate web.

Jiang Tian held his phone listlessly. Pan Meng's words were too hurtful, and Jiang Tian decided not to answer. He was just about to call the Municipal Public Security Bureau to report.

Just then, Jiang Tian's phone rang. He glanced at it; coincidentally, it was Gao Xiaolong.

"Chief Gao, you haven't rested yet?" Jiang Tian scratched his head.

Meanwhile,

At the Municipal Public Security Bureau, things were bustling.

Gao Xiaolong said he was very tired and wanted to rest. Couldn't they talk about this later?

But after hesitating for a moment, Gao Xiaolong decided not to rest for the time being.

Mainly...

"The higher-ups attach great importance to Comrade Xiao Jiang. We know this incident will severely damage his reputation. With special approval from headquarters, Zhang Jiasheng's crimes are clear, and he has been exonerated. Therefore, under special circumstances, Comrade Xiao Jiang is hereby awarded a First-Class Merit Medal to encourage him to continue his efforts."

Xu Poye arrived.

He came by plane, traveling at breakneck speed.

He came directly to the Municipal Public Security Bureau, covered in dust from the journey.

Mainly because...

Xu Poye, Minister Tan, and other leaders at the Ministry of Public Security had discussed the matter at a meeting.

They had to admit that although the drug traffickers' attack on Xiao Jiang's family was unsuccessful, it was undoubtedly a major blow to the ambitious and promising young officer.

Would he be hesitant and timid in future operations?

Could a drug-fighting genius emerge and be forgotten?

This is not impossible, because such situations have occurred far too often. There have even been many outstanding drug-fighting officers who ultimately suffered the wrath of drug traffickers.

This wasn't the first time something like this had happened.

"The higher-ups are taking this situation very seriously, and Minister Tan is furious. He's firmly stated that the Blood Hand criminal gang must be thoroughly investigated and brought to justice."

Xu Poyue went straight to the point after arriving at the Municipal Public Security Bureau, without a single wasted word.

Of course.

One major reason was the immense sensation Jiang Tian had caused. Five first-class merits and one special-class merit in such a short time.

It was an unprecedented achievement.

And they were quite certain that no one would ever be able to do it again.

Only in a place teeming with criminal gangs like Yunhai, combined with Jiang Tian's terrifyingly powerful abilities, could this miracle be created under the perfect storm of circumstances.

It would be impossible anywhere else, not even during wartime.

This miracle will be eternal.

Even Xu Poyue and Minister Tan wanted to see Jiang Tian continue this miracle, rather than have him fall like a shooting star.



Chapter 152 I told you to go home and rest, and you actually did that?


The entire system, including the Ministry of Public Security, remained silent.

Normally, a first-class merit award application takes at least a month, sometimes several months.

But Jiang Tian's case was exceptionally well-received; he received the award in the morning and it was issued immediately by noon.

He shared the glory.

Gao Xiaolong’s eyelids twitched.

How could he not know?

Blood Hand was practically invisible.

Ten years of warrants, but what good had it done? There was still no news.

Even though they had been mentally prepared,

the city police officers still felt quite conflicted when they saw Xu Poye, the 21st Bureau Chief, personally arrive.

More importantly, the purpose of their visit was to award Jiang Tian, ​​a newcomer who had only been an intern for a little over a month, his fifth First-Class Merit.

Jealousy?

There's a saying that goes, "To surpass someone by a little is to be envious."

But when someone surpasses you by too much, to the point where you can't even see their back, envy no longer arises; all that remains is admiration.

Because all those achievements were earned through Jiang Tian's genuine strength and skill.

He single-handedly killed over a hundred drug dealers, and escaped death after breaking through security amidst a massive pursuit by countless drug traffickers.

Who could do that?

Gao Xiaolong led Xu Poye towards the municipal police office.

Jiang Peng could only follow behind them.

Xu Poye sighed and nodded.

He knew about this.

Specifically, the provincial department was monitoring a large drug trafficking group, even having connections with overseas criminal organizations.

The company has assets approaching several billion.

That's a big tiger.

If he weren't so tired, Gao Xiaolong would have gone to keep an eye on things, making sure nothing went wrong.

Because the call had already connected.

"Blood Hands?" Jiang Tian asked back.

Xu Poye was also there. They had already entered the conference room. Jiang Peng, as the bureau chief, was simply watching their exchange with a smile.

In reality, Jiang Peng was overjoyed.

After all, Jiang Tian was his son.

As for the drug dealers' retaliation, he was fine.

Elsewhere, perhaps no one would dare touch the bureau chief, but in Yunhai, those criminal gangs truly dared to do anything, and were capable of anything.

Jiang Peng leaned on the table, eavesdropping. Of course, Song Liguo, sitting beside him, was also watching expectantly.

Especially at this moment, they all knew that the small box Xu Poye had placed on the table was a First-Class Merit Medal.

What was this?

This was honor.

The highest honor!

For any policeman or soldier, what did a First-Class Merit Medal mean?

It was absolutely the highest honor they could dream of.

Xu Poyue ignored them, instead taking out his phone and speaking directly to Jiang Tian, ​​"Xiao Jiang, this is Xu Poyue. Come back to the Municipal Bureau first; I have brought you a First-Class Merit."

And since we haven't received any intelligence or information yet, Xiao Jiang, don't put too much pressure on yourself. Headquarters is closely monitoring the situation and taking action. I believe we'll soon have information about Blood Hand to avenge you."

First-Class Merit?

Jiang Tian's eyes lit up.

After all...

Although Jiang Tian already had four First-Class Merits...

It not only meant doubled income.

Even five First-Class Merits for collecting stamps, plus a building in the CBD.

A whole office building! In the most prosperous area of ​​the city center, even two thousand years ago, a single building here would be worth at least a billion or two billion.

As for how this income would be accounted for, where it came from, Jiang Tian had already inquired. There was absolutely no need to worry; it was all transferred from US stocks, with no loopholes.

The first part of what Xu Poye said delighted Jiang Tian.

However, Xu Poye's next words left Jiang Tian somewhat confused.

Psychological burden?

What was that?

Xu Poyue: "What did you do? Weren't you resting at home?"



Chapter 153 You actually lied about military intelligence? No, the sky is falling, it's true!


"What have you already said?"

That's why.

In the past, the most crucial problem in breaking through the stalemate with criminal groups was the inability to find clues.

Because no criminal group can ever, and no one can, stand against the state apparatus, no matter how powerful they are.

And in the past, Yunhai's anti-drug police had a weak presence, which allowed many criminal groups to remain stuck in the past.

They were completely unaware that times had changed.

The era of rampant, unregulated growth was gradually transitioning to formalization.

And at this stage, the primary consideration was social stability.

Jiang Tian understood this, but the criminal groups still hadn't grasped the situation and remained so arrogant. Even without him, the moment the state apparatus came into play, only annihilation awaited them.

Take Blood Hand, for example. Even if Jiang Tian hadn't caught him beforehand, he could have been apprehended later, but the cost would have been much higher. Money was secondary; the real sacrifices would have been many more.

Don't think this is for your sake; it's to protect the people and their interests. Even if it comes at a high price, it's worth it. Now, you need to clarify your stance. In this regard, I must severely criticize you.”

Xu Poye's expression instantly became extremely solemn, and he reprimanded Jiang Tian with utmost seriousness.

Combating drug lords and dealers is a matter of principle and a fundamental stance.

It's not about being embarrassed to trouble the police with the enormous resources involved, or thinking it's solely for your benefit.

Your thinking is wrong.

Don't let young officers be misled. Against drug lords, even if it costs a great deal of resources and manpower, it's worth it. This isn't for personal gain; it's for the people's interests above all else. Don't let your petty sense of shame cause greater losses for the people."

Thinking this, Xu Poyue slammed his fist on the table and looked at Song Liguo, saying, "No wonder there hasn't been much progress in Yunhai's anti-drug efforts. With this kind of mentality, it would be strange if there were any progress."

He understood even more clearly how strong the crackdown on drug dealers was from top to bottom.

Now, immediately tell me everything you know about the Blood Hands. The city bureau will act immediately, even if it means using all of Yunhai's police resources to turn Yunhai upside down."

"No need, really no need..." Jiang Tian's lips twitched as he opened his mouth to explain.

But Xu Poyue didn't give Jiang Tian a chance to speak. These words seemed to further enrage Xu Poyue: "Jiang Tian, ​​don't think that just because you've done something meritorious, you can keep crossing the red line. Are you trying to rebel? Do you want to become a black sheep in the team?"

Enraged, Xu Poyue was utterly furious, giving Jiang Tian no chance to speak.

Drug enforcement was an absolute red line, not to be crossed by anyone, and it was an emergency operation that required full force and absolutely no room for compromise.

It wasn't a commodity to be bargained for.

The next moment.

"Blood Hand has been caught?"

Thud!!!

Xu Poyue abruptly stood up, his face filled with shock and disbelief.

No.

What did this guy say?

First reaction.

Hmm.



Chapter 154 Xu Poye was stunned when he first saw the terrible scene.

Police uniforms often evoke a sense of awe in people.

Regardless of whether they claimed innocence.

On the other hand.

That was checking today's deal.

What? What deal?

What is Jiang Tian's profession? A narcotics officer!

Blood Hand's ledger.

Four thousand jin (approximately 2000 kg), almost comparable to Mr. Yun's account book!

He had his own set of experiences in arresting and fighting drug dealers, but these experiences were unlearnable; anyone who tried would die.

For example, in today's situation, anyone else would have been dead long ago.

These ordinary people are only suited to conventional methods of arresting drug dealers.

Click!!!

Because at his feet lay a corpse.

Chapter 155 The leaders have gone mad; they even have ledgers!


Xu Poye crouched down, glanced at the corpse on the ground, and saw it was shot right between the eyebrows. This startled Xu Poye, who then clapped his hands in approval.

"Back when we were ambushed by drug dealers, over a hundred drug dealers were killed with a single shot, every bullet hitting its mark."

Before Xu Poye could even react, he looked up.

Xu Poye's eyes widened, his pupils contracting rapidly.

The corpses lay scattered haphazardly, and crucially, every single one of them was holding a weapon.

Of course.

If they were ordinary civilians, they wouldn't be so shocked.

The key was that these people, without exception, were all burly and clearly trained fighters.

And look at their profession: Thunder Shield Security! This was a security company.

Hiss!!!

Xu Poye gasped sharply.

Finally, after scanning the corpses, he saw Jiang Tian's figure at the far end of the pile, slowly puffing out a cigarette.

He appeared silent and calm.

Killed so many people, and still so calm?

"What?! You're saying this guy just killed over a hundred people overseas, and then another hundred more in that drug dealer ambush that night?"

*Buzz!*

Xu Poye's head exploded with a buzz.

"Little Xu, what's wrong?" Gao Xiaolong asked knowingly from the side.

Actually, Gao Xiaolong had just recovered from his shock.

Look at the people following them; every single one of them was gasping for breath. They'd practically sucked all the cold air out of the seventeenth floor.

"Chief Gao, you've arrived."

Jiang Tian walked over, saluted, and said.

Gao Xiaolong nodded slightly: "Where's Blood Hand?"

Jiang Tian pointed to Blood Hand lying unconscious on the ground not far away. If Blood Hand dared to attack him and his family, how could Jiang Tian not retaliate?

For Jiang Tian, ​​killing someone was simple.

Now, he was focused on how to inflict unbearable pain on his opponent without endangering their life.

"Holy crap, Xiao Jiang, you've done it again?" Xu Poye asked abruptly, snapping out of his daze.

Jiang Tian blinked but didn't answer.

It was obvious.

Pfft!!!

Before Xu Poye could speak, Song Liguo, standing behind them, burst out laughing.

This startled Xu Poyue, who said, "Comrade Jiang, I came here specifically to bring you a first-class merit award."

As he spoke, something involuntarily flashed through Xu Poyue's mind.

Before coming, he had spoken with Minister Tan at the General Bureau, who had emphasized the need for psychological counseling for Jiang Tian, ​​especially to alleviate the psychological pressure Jiang Tian felt because of Blood Hand.

As long as they worked hard, they would eventually bring Blood Hand to justice.

Yes, eventually, because Minister Tan knew that was impossible in the short term.

But now…

Xu Poyue's eyelids twitched uncontrollably.

This…

The case was just opened this morning, and the wanted level and reward for Blood Hand's capture were increased.

And now, a whole morning has passed, it's only 2 PM, and you're telling him the Blood Hand case is solved?

Now Xu Poyue was completely bewildered. Should he present the first-class merit award to encourage Jiang Tian, ​​or not?

"What's going on with these two?" Xu Poyue calmed down and asked the two women.

Jiang Tian briefly explained their relationship.

Xu Poyue roughly understood.

Jiang Tian then went to Pan Meng.

Just now, Jiang Tian had draped his coat over Pan Meng's shoulders.

After all, Pan Meng had looked quite disheveled, and this had unconsciously stirred a strong sense of goodwill in her.

"Thank you," Pan Meng said, blushing and bowing her head.

Reuniting after several years, it hadn't been a big deal before; back then, they were just good friends.

But now, after all these years, Pan Meng was horrified to discover that Jiang Tian had truly changed completely.

"Can joining the police force really make someone this powerful?" Pan Meng thought back to the terrifying Jiang Tian she had just witnessed, and for a moment, she felt as if they were from completely different worlds.

"Sister Li, please take her to the hospital," Jiang Tian waved to Li Zijin.

“Now you remember me?” Li Zijin said with a resentful look, but still left with Pan Meng.

“It’s Blood Hand, no doubt about it.”

Xu Poye examined Blood Hand for a moment, then compared it with old photos, finally arriving at a definitive conclusion.

It was indeed him.

At the same time, this also meant that Jiang Tian would receive another First-Class Merit?

Thinking of this, Xu Poye’s eyelids twitched slightly.

“No, this kid has too many merits and is prone to arrogance. He should be kept in check. Giving him too many is like pulling up seedlings—not good. Although he has enough merits, giving each person a Second-Class Merit, and lowering the standard a bit for acting without reporting, would be acceptable.” Xu Poye thought to himself.

Just then,

Jiang Tian walked over.

“What is it?” Xu Poye’s face suddenly lit up with a broad smile as he greeted him.

"Well, this is Blood Hand's ledger. I just looked at it, and it records over two thousand kilograms of drug transactions. I checked, and the ledger is accurate." Jiang Tian smiled before speaking.

*Pfft!!*

"What the hell did you say?"

*Boom!!*

*Thud!!*

At that moment, Jiang Tian felt a slight impact.

Before Jiang Tian could react, he looked down and saw the ledger already in Gao Xiaolong's trembling hands, examining it closely.

For example, Mr. Yun's ledger had directly earned two comrades in the city bureau two individual second-class merit awards.

It even ultimately received a collective first-class merit award.

A collective first-class merit award! You can imagine what a ledger represents. Is this just a ledger? No, it's a record of achievements.

Each record recorded a tremendous achievement.

According to the regulations, arresting anyone, even one, is punishable by execution.

And these are all tremendous achievements!

As for the hero who seized the ledger, it was none other than the famous young Jiang standing before him.

Most terrifyingly, this was already the second one.

What kind of achievement is this?

Xu Poye remembered Minister Tan's instructions, and his face involuntarily darkened.

What kind of second-class merit award is this?!

With the appearance of the ledgers, all the leaders, including Gao Xiaolong, went crazy.

It was a scene of people practically fighting tooth and nail to get their hands on them.



Chapter 156 A Perfect Son-in-Law: Gao Xiaolong is Jealous of Lao Mu


[In recognition of Comrade Jiang Tian's significant contributions to the Zhang Jiasheng case, he is hereby awarded a First-Class Merit Medal.]

City Bureau.

After the Narcotics Control Team brought the Blood Hand gang back,

[Ding, the host's stamp collecting medal is now 5/5 complete. The CBD building property rights have been automatically issued.]

This is great! One building is worth at least one billion yuan, and that's just its current value. Jiang Tian clearly understands that the real boom in housing prices will occur in five years.

By then, it will at least triple in value, meaning three billion yuan?

Most importantly, not only that, but the monthly rent for this building is astronomical.

[Ding, the God of Wealth's blessing has been upgraded to 5/5. The current reward is four yuan per minute.]

Jiang Tian was overjoyed because this meant his monthly income had reached nearly 150,000 yuan. Wouldn't the sixth First-Class Merit Medal mean a monthly income of 300,000 yuan?

Although money wasn't particularly important to Jiang Tian, ​​having money and not using it was a completely different concept from not having money at all.

[A new First-Class Merit Medal has been awarded. When the host collects six First-Class Merit Medals, a Rolls-Royce Phantom VII will be awarded. Current mission progress 5/6]

Jiang Tian was increasingly delighted.

He had been thinking of buying a car in the next couple of days.

After all, although Jiang Tian hadn't checked his bank account recently, many of the criminals he apprehended were wanted fugitives, and the rewards for kills and captures had been deposited into his bank account along with his achievements.

Although he hadn't calculated it precisely, it had now added up to nearly two million. He had originally planned to buy a Mercedes-Benz W14, but now, why bother with a W14? He'd go straight for a Rolls-Royce.

What? Wasn't that a bit too high-profile?

High-profile my foot!

As a narcotics officer who had risked his life countless times, what was wrong with enjoying himself?

He'd fought a lifetime of battles; couldn't he enjoy himself a little?

[A new special stamp-collecting mission has been activated. Upon collecting Third-Class Merit, Second-Class Merit, First-Class Merit, and Special-Class Merit, a special attribute (Rebirth) will be awarded.] Note: (When equipped, it greatly enhances the host's recovery ability after injury.)

After finishing his business at the Municipal Bureau, Jiang Tian took out his phone and decided to call Mu Ya.

After all, Jiang Tian genuinely wanted to find Mu Ya.

As for Gao Yangyang, she was truly an unexpected addition to Jiang Tian's team.

However, just as he was about to call Mu Ya, Jiang Tian bumped into her as soon as he exited the Municipal Bureau.

"Why are you here?" Jiang Tian asked, his face full of surprise.

"You have the nerve to say that? Last night you left me at the hotel and ran off. I couldn't get through on the phone, and I couldn't find you anywhere," Mu Ya said through gritted teeth.

"I really did have an important mission last night," Jiang Tian sighed helplessly.

"Alright, I forgive you." Mu Ya's personality was just like that—gentle and generous—which was why Jiang Tian was able to like her.

"As an apology, I'll pay for today's expenses. Buy whatever you want," Jiang Tian said, waving his hand generously after making a fortune.

"You little brat, you didn't embezzle anything, did you? You have a bright future ahead of you, don't go astray." Mu Ya's eyes widened.

"What are you thinking? This is my reward for risking my life to capture wanted criminals." Jiang Tian tapped Mu Ya's head.

"Ugh!!!"

Mu Ya rubbed her head, following behind Jiang Tian. Although she appeared indignant, she was secretly overjoyed.

If Jiang Tian had been there last night, Mu Ya really didn't know how she would have faced him.

Things were developing so fast. Even if Mu Ya wouldn't refuse, she would wonder if Jiang Tian was only pursuing her to get her body.

Jiang Tian's departure actually made Mu Ya feel even more favorably towards him.

"Thank you," Mu Ya suddenly said.

"Why?" Jiang Tian was suspicious. She was hit and then thanked him? Did Mu Ya have some kind of special attribute?

"What are you thinking? You thanked me yesterday..." Mu Ya exclaimed, exasperated.

The so-called emergency mission, in Mu Ya's view, was merely Jiang Tian easing the awkwardness between them, cooling things down. This was the normal pace of a couple's relationship; otherwise, why would they sleep together after only knowing each other for a few days?

Thinking of this, Mu Ya felt a surge of emotion and hugged Jiang Tian from behind.

"Hey, what's in your pocket? It's so hard!" Mu Ya touched her face, full of confusion.

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile: "Why don't you take it out and see?"

"Tch, fine, I'll see."

Mu Ya put her hand into Jiang Tian's pocket.

What she saw.

A beautiful box appeared before her eyes.

"What's this?" Mu Ya asked, her face beaming with joy. "Jiang Tian, ​​is this a mystery gift you gave me?"

Jiang Tian remained silent, his face darkening, while Mu Ya, assuming it was a ring or something, carefully opened the box.

A medal.

A First-Class Merit Badge.

Mu Ya wasn't naive; she recognized it immediately and gasped, covering her mouth in surprise.

"Don't make a fuss," Jiang Tian waved his hand. "Take it if you like."

After all, he already had five medals like this, and his sixth First-Class Merit and Special-Class Merit would be coming soon.

A mere First-Class Merit medal wasn't really that important.

"This is a First-Class Merit! You're really so indifferent?" Mu Ya asked in astonishment.

"If you like it, I'll give it to you," Jiang Tian said.

"No, no, no..." Mu Ya hurriedly shook her head.

But when she turned and saw Jiang Tian's serious expression—he really wasn't joking—she was instantly moved.

What could be a better gift than this medal?

Ugh!!!

Mu Ya closed her eyes and moved closer to Jiang Tian.

...

"That kid, he's a real headache."

At the city police station entrance, Gao Xiaolong sat in the passenger seat, with his personal driver, Xiao Chen, in the driver's seat.

Xiao Chen was practically a confidant, brought from his hometown of Beijing, and had been with Gao Xiaolong for decades. Their relationship was extremely close; Gao Xiaolong had never hesitated to speak frankly with Xiao Chen.

"Is this girl Old Mu's granddaughter?" Gao Xiaolong asked.

"Yes, I've seen her before," Xiao Chen nodded.

"Damn, that old bastard Old Mu snatched her away. Otherwise, it would have been Yangyang, that girl." Gao Xiaolong thought of his granddaughter.

My mood instantly plummeted. As an old fox, I could tell at a glance that Yangyang's lingering affection for Jiang Tian after returning home meant that Jiang Tian's heroic rescue of her overseas had undoubtedly won her over.

I thought there was still a chance, and I wanted to find an opportunity to play matchmaker.

But as soon as I stepped outside, I was heartbroken. The Mu family's granddaughter was shameless; she was kissing someone in public!



Chapter 157 In your youthful and impetuous years, did you choose to curry favor with the powerful?

He was destined for greatness.

Jiang Tian had already become a legend.

In other words,

And his current position was completely unworthy of Jiang Tian's achievements; a promotion would be imminent.

He was practically a perfect son-in-law!

Xiao Chen sweated profusely, not daring to utter a word.

Because of Old Mu's status, Gao Xiaolong could joke and tease him freely, but he dared not voice any objections.

"Mom."

The next moment, Mu Ya called out.

But sometimes, what you fear most is what happens.

Jiang Tian quickly reconsidered. This was the heart of the city center, and most of the leaders' families lived nearby. A chance encounter like this wasn't particularly coincidental.

Besides, Jiang Tian was upright and had nothing to fear. He could confidently say that he absolutely loved Mu Ya and would marry her someday.

Especially given Mu Ya's conservative nature, she was determined to marry him.

Their secret engagement was just a matter of time before it was discovered.

"Mom," Mu Ya said, forcing herself to approach.

Mu Ya's mother, elegant and dignified, glanced around at the crowd but said nothing, only nodding calmly. "I just bought groceries. Come and eat with us. The food outside isn't healthy."

Then the group turned around. A blue Maserati was parked at the mall entrance.

Before his rebirth, Jiang Tian might have felt awkward in such situations, but now, he felt absolutely nothing.

The lady driving the car casually asked, “Little Jiang, right? Judging by your age, you just graduated. Have you graduated yet?”

“I’m a senior this year, and I’ve already started my internship. I’ve been assigned to the narcotics police unit,” Jiang Tian answered honestly.

“What about your parents?” the wealthy woman continued to inquire.

Jiang Tian wasn’t angry about this. After all, he had poached someone’s daughter, and Mu Ya’s grandfather was a high-ranking official, while her parents were big businessmen.

To be able to afford a Maserati, their family background was definitely wealthy and powerful.

“My father is the director of the Yunhai Bureau,” Jiang Tian didn’t hide anything, believing his own background also belonged to the upper echelons.

“A young director, huh? Not bad. But do you know what our family and Mu Ya’s grandfather do?” the wealthy woman continued.

“Mom, didn’t you say…” Mu Ya immediately became anxious.

The Maserati slowly drove into the lakeside villa area.

Mu Ya’s mother frowned and said, “Mu Ya, the family respected your opinion before, but that guy named Xiao Bo, don’t you know what you’re doing?”

After saying that, she didn’t give Mu Ya a chance to speak.

Mu Ya's mother turned to Jiang Tian and said, "You're a narcotics officer. Putting aside the danger you face, what will happen to Mu Ya if something happens? Just think about it: Mu Ya always wears clothes worth tens of thousands of yuan. How much do you earn a month? Three hundred or five hundred? Mu Ya is a naive young girl. As a narcotics officer, you should think calmly. Can't you understand?"

"Auntie, you can't judge a book by its cover. I'm a junior narcotics officer now, but what about the future?" Jiang Tian thought his attitude was quite good.

However, Mu Ya's mother's attitude did make Jiang Tian's expression gradually turn cold.

In his previous life, Jiang Tian had suffered too many grievances, and he was prone to a stress response to such grievances.

"You're so young; you should be full of vigor, taking it upon yourself to protect the interests of the people, not fantasizing about currying favor with powerful figures or climbing the social ladder. You and Mu Ya have only known each other for a few days, and I don't think there's any real affection between you. It'll be easy for you to let go. Am I wrong?" the woman said calmly.

"Mom, are you really forcing me?" Mu Ya's eyes were almost filled with tears.

"You're still young, you don't understand these grassroots people at all. They'll do anything to climb the social ladder. Isn't Xiao Bo a prime example? They promoted him in a year, and he ended up cleaning in the police station." The wealthy woman stood up to see her off.

"Guests are guests. The food is ready, eat before you leave."

It seemed like an invitation to stay.

Jiang Tian stood up, glanced at the empty teacup, and turned to leave expressionlessly.

Jiang Tian was sincere towards Mu Ya, but he was gradually growing tired of his mother.

As for accusations of Jiang Tian currying favor?

To put it bluntly, Minister Tan was keeping a close eye on Jiang Tian now, and it had even attracted the attention of people in the higher-ups within the courtyard.

Did he need to curry favor with the Mu family?

Besides, in his previous life, Jiang Tian knew even better about the Mu family after Old Master Mu retired.

Mu Ya's parents weren't involved in politics, meaning there was no heir and they had faded from the historical stage. The family business was also declining; before Jiang Tian's transmigration, Mu Ya was exhausted from working for the company and was on the verge of bankruptcy.

But Jiang Tian was destined to shine brightly on the historical stage.

"I'll go with you," Mu Ya said, following Jiang Tian as they left.

"No need. You stay home and keep your mother company. I'm fine. I'll go back and rest, and then explain things to your mother properly." Jiang Tian shook his head slightly.

He didn't want Mu Ya to have a falling out with her family.

Even if Mu Ya did end up with him, it wouldn't be a happy ending.

"Alright, stop crying. I'm leaving now. See you tomorrow." Jiang Tian turned and left.

On the surface, nothing seemed amiss, but a fire was burning within Jiang Tian.

So what if he was just a small-time policeman?

In terms of wealth, his CBD office building was worth more than all of Mu Ya's family's assets.

But here, Jiang Tian disdained flaunting his wealth.

Just then, Jiang Tian's phone rang. He glanced at it; it was an unfamiliar number. Jiang Tian was about to hang up, but the caller dialed again, so Jiang Tian answered.

"Hello, is this Mr. Jiang?" came an unfamiliar voice from the other end.

"Yes, it's me." Jiang Tian looked at the phone number, confirming again that he didn't recognize it.

Chapter 158: The witch flaunts her wealth in the afternoon, and Mu's father is arrested in the evening.

Ding ding!!!

Half an hour later.

Although Jiang Tian wasn't a saint, he had indeed done *that* with Gao Yangyang. He felt that with Gao Yangyang's intelligence and abilities, she wouldn't act like she was going to die for him because of that.

Men are just like that.

Given Jiang Tian's current physical condition, getting completely drunk was difficult, but after one bottle, he was already feeling quite tipsy.

Huh?

Gao Yangyang kept praising him.

This made Jiang Tian unknowingly quite drunk.

after finishing a whole table full of vodka bottles, he was truly intoxicated.

If Gao Yangyang were in Muya's position, she would probably sever ties with her mother and leave home without hesitation, no matter who tried to persuade her.

He's getting anxious.

Chapter 159 The Roundtable Meeting Begins, the Grand Show Starts

Trouble has struck.

But then, the phone rang again.
