Jiang Tian wasn’t in a hurry, but continued to observe the situation. Clearly, most of the drug dealers were already resting and sleeping.

Only a small number of drug dealers were still on duty.

Based on Jiang Tian's scanning radar, the cave he was observing was at least two to three hundred square meters in area. Further in, there were winding paths, but the space was significantly limited, barely wide enough for two people to walk side-by-side. Most of the red dots were located at the very back.

Outside, there were about four drug dealers, standing guard at the four corners, each looking as if they hadn't woken up properly, yawning.

"Heh, a bunch of beasts. They probably don't have anything else on their minds besides this shitty stuff."

Qin Shiyu's brows furrowed deeply as she was forcibly dragged by two drug dealers, one holding her wrist, the other her hair.

Even in pain, Qin Shiyu's face remained unchanged, only a cold smile and mockery on her face.

But deep within her eyes, her pupils were constantly contracting.

Despair was inevitable.

Who could save her?

Perhaps no one.

Helplessness.

Qin Shiyu was utterly helpless.

Back at the brick factory, the drug dealers had been eager to try their luck, but still shaken, they hadn't done anything.

Then, suddenly, a group of people resembling anti-narcotics police appeared. Caught completely off guard, the drug dealers were caught off guard and wiped out. If the dealers hadn't been in a hurry to escape, they probably would have been completely wiped out.

This sudden fall from heaven to hell left Qin Shiyu feeling utterly hopeless and speechless.

She had long heard that Yunhai was known as the "City of Sin," or "Little Gotham" online.

The reported crimes were numerous and horrifying, but the key issue was the police's lack of action, which earned it the nickname "Little Gotham."

This only deepened Qin Shiyu's despair.

She regretted coming here.

She'd heard it was chaotic, but she'd never heard it this chaotic.

And she hadn't expected the official actions to be so unreliable, just like the online rumors.

"Scream all you want, it'll be a while," the drug dealer grabbing Qin Shiyu sneered.

This made Qin Shiyu's eyes grow even more somber.

Just a casual glance back, from Qin Shiyu's angle, brought her face directly to the entrance of the cave she'd entered.

What she saw was a young man holding a gun.

Qin Shiyu's first thought was, "Is this another drug dealer?"

Her second thought was, "Why is this guy pointing a gun at his own people? Is he practicing aiming?"

Just as Qin Shiyu was thinking this,

Bang! Bang!

Two deafening gunshots rang out.

The cave was an enclosed space, almost silent.

The gunshots, combined with the echoes of the cave, exploded like bombs.

Even from that distance, Qin Shiyu's eyes glazed over, and her ears rang.

But then, the pain in her head suddenly vanished.

Qin Shiyu stared wide-eyed at the young man who had fired the shot.

Flash crackled and popped.

In the dim, flickering light,

"Holy crap, what happened?"

"Who fired that?"

"Something's happened."

"Quick! Quick! Quick!!!"

The drug dealers' frantic shouts echoed from within the cave.

Amidst the chaotic screams, the four drug dealers guarding the hostages reacted instantly, hastily trying to load their weapons and pull the safety.

But unfortunately, it was too late.

Bang! Bang! Bang!!!

Jiang Tian, ​​expressionless, fired a rapid-fire shot.

The four drug dealers fell to the ground almost simultaneously.

“Charge!!!”

“Everyone, don’t move.”

“Drop your weapons! Drop your weapons!”

Accompanied by Song Liguo’s roar, after Jiang Tian shot and killed the six drug dealers on the surface, all the members of the Yunhai branch rushed out in a swarm.

Qin Shiyu looked at the two drug dealers lying on the ground, then at the four lying dead.

Six drug dealers, dead in an instant.

What kind of marksmanship is this?

A sharpshooter?

Qin Shiyu’s pupils contracted as she stared at the young figure. He wasn’t in police uniform, but at this moment, he shone with an unparalleled brilliance in her eyes.

"Tch, what's with the show-off?"

Qin Shiyu, momentarily panicked, scoffed and quickly turned away. Then, with remarkable composure, she found a corner and crouched down.

She saw that after the group entered, several people were quickly rescuing the hostages.

A large group of people were pointing their guns at the cavern inside.

Meanwhile, Jiang Tian was walking along, reloading his pistol.

Compared to automatic rifles and other firearms, Jiang Tian didn't really like them. For him, pistols were more convenient.

They fired faster, and he could kill someone much faster.

In this world, Jiang Tian could confidently say that within a hundred paces, no matter who the opponent was, he could instantly kill them.

[Sin Value +246]

[Sin Value +369]

[Sin Value +428]

Good heavens.

This is truly something else.

These drug dealers are absolutely heinous!

The Yun family's drug dealers have far more sin values ​​than Tucha.

Jiang Tian was secretly shocked, but also somewhat delighted. Looking at the dozens of red dots on the scanning radar, he couldn't help but lick his lips.

Click!!!

Jiang Tian expressionlessly cocked his pistol and walked towards the cavern inside.

But the next moment.

Jiang Tian suddenly felt his wrist gripped.

Looking down, he saw Qin Shiyu, who was crouching behind a rock, had grabbed him.

Seeing Jiang Tian looking down at her, Qin Shiyu hurriedly explained, "Don't go in. There are dozens of drug dealers inside. It's very dangerous. Those people all have heavy firearms."

While Qin Shiyu was speaking...

Jiang Tian suddenly saw a pair of slightly reflective eyes peeking out from around a corner in the pitch-black interior of the cave.

From this angle, it was completely dark inside.

The passageway was only wide enough for two people; the firelight from the large cavern couldn't reach inside, yet those inside could see out, something an ordinary person couldn't observe.

Clearly, the drug dealers had planned and prepared before entering.

These people were indeed stronger than the previous drug dealers.

But…

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian raised his gun and fired.

A deafening gunshot rang out.

Accompanied by a thud, a body fell to the ground inside the cave.

This time, Qin Shiyu, who was extremely close, instantly felt a ringing in her ears and couldn't hear anything.

However, her eyes were involuntarily fixed on the drug dealer who had fallen halfway out of the cave, already dead, blood still gushing from his forehead.

Qin Shiyu was stunned.

This...she could actually do that?

Jiang Tian, ​​looking at Qin Shiyu's expression, had to admit, was in a pretty good mood.

Because, in his past life, Jiang Tian had been tricked into bed by Wang Yifei, and then embarrassingly seen by Qin Shiyu and Zhao Qiuni when they opened the door. He would never forget the look of disappointment and disdain on their faces.

In his past life, Jiang Tian looked at them as if they were celestial beings, only able to look up in awe.

Now, the situation had reversed.



Chapter 171 The Great War Breaks Out, Outsiders' Worries


"Listen up, everyone inside! Drop your weapons!"

*Thud!*

Just then, the fully armed anti-drug police officers behind them turned on their overhead spotlights and pointed them at the cavern inside. In that instant, the intense light refracted.

The interior is completely clear.

But there was no sound from around the corner.

Stubborn to the end.

Very good.

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile; he liked this kind of stubborn drug dealer.

"Let go first," Jiang Tian said, looking down at Qin Shiyu.

Qin Shiyu's face flushed slightly, but she quickly regained her composure, becoming completely calm.

Is this the aura of a domineering female CEO?

Jiang Tian glanced at Qin Shiyu with amusement. He had seen Qin Shiyu's domineering CEO persona on television many times in his previous life, her decisive and efficient manner. Seeing her now, acting like a little woman, was a truly rare sight.

"There are dozens of drug dealers inside. I'm only telling you this because you saved me. You'd better be careful, or don't blame me if you die." Qin Shiyu turned her head to the side, avoiding Jiang Tian's amused gaze, but her words were somewhat arrogantly overbearing.

"You guys should leave first."

Jiang Tian didn't make any rash moves, only keeping an eye on the cave entrance, after all, there were still so many hostages around him who hadn't been evacuated.

Jiang Tian then turned and waved to Li Zijin, who jogged over and said, "Captain Jiang."

"Take her away from here to a safe place," Jiang Tian ordered.

The hostages inside the cave had already begun their evacuation.

“Yes.” Li Zijin nodded and helped Qin Shiyu up.

Jiang Tian keenly noticed Qin Shiyu's subconscious avoidance and the barely perceptible micro-expression on her face.

“Does she have mysophobia?” Jiang Tian wondered.

Whatever it was, Qin Shiyu didn't show it at this moment. As she stood up to leave, she even turned back to Jiang Tian and said, “Be careful.”

“Worried about me?”

Jiang Tian clicked his tongue in amazement.

Because in his previous life, the media had reported on her a lot; she always appeared decisive and efficient in public, seemingly uninterested in anything.

Before his transmigration, Qin Shiyu was already close to forty, but she had never been involved in any romantic relationships, or rather, she was still unmarried in her forties.

The media speculated that Qin Shiyu might not be interested in men at all.

Now it seemed the rumors were somewhat exaggerated.

After speaking to Jiang Tian, ​​Qin Shiyu, supported by Li Zijin, joined the group of hostages.

Jiang Tian turned his head and saw that, as Qin Shiyu approached, Mu Feng, Mu Ya's father, rushed out from among the hostages and ran to Qin Shiyu, repeatedly saying something.

Unfortunately.

Qin Shiyu seemed completely uninterested, her face expressionless, and she didn't respond at all.

Mu's father's expression grew increasingly tense, even bordering on ingratiating.

Of course, Jiang Tian wasn't interested in their affairs; his gaze returned to the depths of the cave.

"Prepare for action."

After seeing that all the hostages had safely left, Song Liguo waved to everyone, and two anti-narcotics police officers carrying Type 95 submachine guns ran to either side of the cave.

Two more, armed with riot shields, advanced side-by-side into the cave.

Jiang Tian followed behind.

If it was safe to carry out the mission, Jiang Tian wouldn't risk his life.

Silence.

Deathly silence.

But it was precisely this silence that instilled a terrifying psychological pressure.

Everyone's foreheads were sweating, and sweat involuntarily seeped from their palms.

A battle was imminent.

"Miss Qin, believe me, believe me one last time, Yunhai is absolutely safe, our investment project will definitely succeed."

Outside the cave, Mu Feng kept speaking behind Qin Shiyu.

"Don't you have any morals? The police and drug dealers are fighting inside, and you still have the mood to talk business?" Qin Shiyu said coldly to Mu Feng.

"I..."

Mu Feng smiled bitterly to himself.

If he had a choice, he wouldn't have humbled himself like this.

The main issue is that he's recently been implicated in a scandal. Not long ago, he embezzled all the company's funds to invest in a project, only to discover it was a scam, and he lost everything.

As for seeking loans through connections, he would have done so long ago if it were an option.

But he can't. The investigation is too intense. If his company's non-compliant loans are discovered, it might even implicate Elder Mu.

Otherwise, why would Mu Feng be so humble, constantly pressuring Qin Shiyu to invest at this time?

"I'm sorry, I'm not in the mood to discuss this right now," Qin Shiyu said haughtily, her head held high, like a proud swan soaring in the sky.

But after speaking, this swan looked into the cavern. Although she couldn't see anything, she couldn't help but want to look a little longer.

"Comrade, we have a car over there. You can get in and rest for a bit, then come with us to give a statement," Li Zijin said to Qin Shiyu.

"Will everything be alright inside?" Qin Shiyu stopped in her tracks, unable to contain her worry.

Li Zijin watched Qin Shiyu walk away, constantly turning back to look, and felt a surge of emotion. Look at this young woman; even after being rescued, she was still worried about the hardworking anti-drug police.

And those people? Some didn't even say thank you; not only that, they were angry, complaining about why they hadn't arrived sooner.

The contrast was stark.

"Don't worry, comrade, those drug dealers are sitting ducks. Our comrades are all excellent..."

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Before Li Zijin could finish speaking,

a series of loud, booming sounds suddenly erupted from the cave.

It was gunfire.

In the confined space, the compressed sonic booms were deafening.

In the quiet of the night, the sonic booms compressed by the gunfire in the confined cave were utterly deafening.

The gunfire continued unabated.

Upon hearing the sound, Li Zijin dared not delay: "You all wait here."

After saying this, Li Zijin quickly left.

Qin Shiyu, remaining where she was, stared blankly at the cave entrance, listening to the terrifying gunshots inside, experiencing firsthand the deafening threat of death.

Each gunshot could potentially claim a life.

Experiencing it firsthand, the profound shock it evoked was indescribable.

At that moment, Jiang Tian's face involuntarily flashed through Qin Shiyu's mind.

She had to admit that the young man who was the first to rush out and shoot down the drug dealers when she was in danger had indeed left a deep impression on her.

Furthermore, a sense of unease suddenly arose in Qin Shiyu's heart.

Will he be alright?

He must be fighting the drug dealers right now.

Will it be very dangerous?

Will he achieve something this time?

How many drug dealers will he be able to kill?



Chapter 172 He stood among ten thousand people, radiating brilliance.


Without comparison, there's no harm done. Without the group at the brick factory, Qin Shiyu wouldn't have felt this so strongly.

But now, with the comparison,

looking at the real anti-drug police, she suddenly realized that the group before hadn't come to rescue anyone, nor to arrest drug dealers; they'd come to cause trouble.

She'd definitely file a complaint against them when she got back.

Also, what was that young man's name?

She thought she heard him called Captain Jiang. His surname was Jiang, right? Good, good, she'd definitely present him with a banner.

While Qin Shiyu was thinking this,

Li Zijin had just reached the entrance of the cave.

A series of voices came through the walkie-talkie: "Everyone come in and escort the drug dealers. All drug dealers have been apprehended."

"That's it?"

Qin Shiyu, standing at the cave entrance, was stunned.

Because only about twenty people had gone in.

There were more than thirty drug dealers inside!

It was over just like that?

Ten minutes later.

More than a dozen drug dealers, blindfolded and handcuffed, were escorted out by two officers.

Qin Shiyu looked at Song Liguo, the leader, with curiosity and asked, "Officer, weren't there more than thirty drug dealers inside? How come only a dozen came out?"

Did the others escape through a side path?

This cave has side paths?

"They're all dead," Song Liguo said simply.

Hiss!!!

So fast?

Qin Shiyu was dumbfounded.

No.

If the police officers in Yunhai are all this capable, why are they all being criticized online, and why are they calling you "Little Gotham"?

Isn't something wrong?

Song Liguo was also still shocked.

Good heavens, he had thought Jiang Tian was awesome, but he never dreamed that after witnessing Jiang Tian's actions firsthand, Jiang Tian's awesomeness would reach such a terrifying level.

The so-called one-handed magazine change was just basic maneuvering, because you couldn't even see Jiang Tian change magazines.

With a snap, seven drug dealers were gone.

Then, with a flick of his wrist, the magazine was full.

A magician?

Song Liguo was completely dumbfounded.

He'd watched Jiang Tian grow up; how come he'd never realized before that little Jiang was a magician?

Thinking of this, Song Liguo couldn't help but recall how Jiang Tian, ​​snotty-nosed, followed his daughter around, laughing hysterically at a piece of candy.

In the blink of an eye, damn it, the kid hadn't just grown up, he'd become a magician?!

"Who taught you these skills?"

Song Liguo waved Jiang Tian over and clicked his tongue in amazement.

Because, in his memory, the Jiang family didn't have any secret family techniques passed down through generations!

"Uncle Song, are you crazy? Police academy!" Jiang Tian laughed.

Hiss!!!

Song Liguo gasped, then raised his hand angrily, "I'll beat you to death, you brat!"

Jiang Tian laughed heartily. At Song Liguo's speed, Jiang Tian felt he couldn't catch him even with one leg.

Jiang Tian felt he was about the same level as Captain America in the movies.

This is what superhuman beings are like.

Song Liguo only chased him a couple of steps as a joke, and then stopped fooling around. He was just in a good mood.

Putting everything else aside, they got a collective first-class merit tonight.

Not bad, not bad.

Actually, today was also very fruitful for Jiang Tian.

It seems like only collective credit exists.

But don't forget who brought this credit: Jiang Tian!

Everyone involved in this operation, without exception, harbors a strong liking for Jiang Tian.

Rushing in required almost no dangerous actions.

Following Jiang Tian around, they shared in the collective credit.

A collective first-class merit!

Stalking the credit won't last. Sometimes, sharing some of the credit yields greater rewards.

A mere collective credit is enough to fill the entire anti-drug squad with goodwill towards Jiang Tian.

Before, they were amazed by Jiang Tian, ​​but no matter how impressive he was, the credit belonged to Jiang Tian, ​​not them.

But after today, the entire Yunhai anti-drug squad's support for Jiang Tian is absolutely genuine and voluntary.

Happy.

Everyone is beaming with smiles.

And whenever officers passed by Jiang Tian, ​​they greeted him with excitement, joy, and delight, enthusiastically calling him "Captain Jiang."

This heartfelt respect was immediately apparent.

"Haha, the result of everyone's hard work," Jiang Tian said modestly.

Zhao Wei, however, walked behind Jiang Tian with his head held high, almost swaggering, his expression one of smug pride.

Hearing Jiang Tian's modest words, he instantly became dissatisfied: "Captain Jiang, over thirty drug dealers, you killed more than twenty! Who wouldn't be surprised? These guys did nothing, yet they got a collective first-class merit award. You should be incredibly arrogant now."

"Get lost," Jiang Tian rolled his eyes, too lazy to respond.

Everyone was chatting and laughing, and unknowingly, Jiang Tian seemed to stand at the center of the crowd, radiating light even in the darkest night.

Yes.

Qin Shiyu, following behind, felt exactly that way.

Radiating light.

Everyone seemed to be giving that young man special treatment.

Especially.

Just moments ago, when she was worried about Jiang Tian's safety and how many people he could kill, she was stunned when she suddenly heard Zhao Wei's voice from ahead.

More than twenty.

There were only thirty-odd drug dealers in total, and more than twenty were dead, all killed by Jiang Tian?

Have she misheard?

Qin Shiyu's eyes were filled with confusion.

Of course, Jiang Tian had been paying attention to Qin Shiyu the whole way. He clearly saw Mu Feng repeatedly come to Qin Shiyu's side, repeatedly telling her something with a bitter expression.

But Qin Shiyu remained unmoved throughout.

Jiang Tian vaguely heard that it was about investment.

Of course, Jiang Tian had no interest in these things. In fact, if it weren't for Liang Ru, Jiang Tian might have wanted to cultivate a relationship with Mu Feng.

But now, forget it.

With that old hag Liang Ru around, Jiang Tian really doesn't dare to chat or message Mu Ya anymore.

"I'll say it one last time, I need to reconsider."

Meanwhile, after speaking to Mu Feng, Qin Shiyu took the opportunity to run to Jiang Tian's car and said, "Officer Jiang, do you mind sharing a car with me?"

Jiang Tian looked at the empty seat next to his car and then nodded almost imperceptibly.

"Thank you, Officer Jiang." Qin Shiyu nodded, then opened the car door and sat in the back seat.

There were only seats left in the back.

Because Zhao Wei and Li Zijin were in the front passenger seat.

Only Jiang Tian could fit in the back, and there was still room for one more person.

Mu Feng nodded to Jiang Tian with a regretful expression.

Although he wasn't in a good mood, Mu Feng had also witnessed Jiang Tian's bravery tonight.

It was as if a hero had descended to earth, wreaking havoc on drug dealers.

The young man was handsome and ruthless; Mu Feng had to admit that this young man was a million times better than Xiao Bo.

If his son-in-law were this Officer Jiang, he'd probably wake up smiling.

"Officer Jiang, my name is Mu Feng, the owner of Yunmu Construction Company. Feel free to contact me if you need anything." Mu Feng handed Jiang Tian his business card through the window.

"No need." Jiang Tian's face was cold and unyielding.

Hmm?

Mu Feng noticed Jiang Tian's expression turn cold upon seeing him and was slightly taken aback, because he genuinely wanted to befriend this young man.

He felt this young man had a bright future ahead of him, and he might be able to use some political resources to help him, creating a mutually beneficial arrangement.

After all, his family had run out of political connections.

However, Jiang Tian's reaction truly surprised him.

"Young man," Mu Feng said.

"I'm not your young man, I don't know you, and I don't want to know you," Jiang Tian said, rolling up the car window.

To be honest, the old hag completely disgusted Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian even felt he needed some time to process this.

As for Mu Ya, Jiang Tian decided to let time prove him right.

Perhaps, forced relationships are never sweet, or perhaps the two were simply not compatible.

Thinking of this, Jiang Tian thought of Gao Yangyang.

That lively and spirited girl.

She was much better than Mu Ya.



Chapter 173 A Crazy Slap in the Face: Trainee Inspector, We're Getting Better Too


"What's going on?"

Completely dumbfounded after being turned away, Mu Feng was bewildered, because this was clearly a win-win situation!

He didn't understand why Jiang Tian had such a strong grudge against him.

Thinking carefully, he realized he hadn't offended Officer Jiang!

Soon.

The convoy arrived at the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

The entire entrance to the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Although it was the dead of night,

it was still brightly lit.

Xu Poye, holding a walkie-talkie, watched with a slightly excited yet relieved expression as hooded drug dealers were being escorted out of the dark armed police vehicles in the distance.

The success was almost unbelievable to him.

"Chief Xu, we've arrived at the cave. After careful investigation, we've found numerous gunshot wounds, traces of fire, and even a considerable amount of blood on the ground. This is a major discovery."

Gong Zhe's excited voice rang out on the walkie-talkie, breaking the tranquility of the night.

And shattering Xu Poye's pleasant mood.

"You've reached the cave?" Xu Poye couldn't help but raise his voice.

"Yes, Director Xu, we consulted with the locals and finally found this hidden cave. We also saw numerous trampling marks, confirming it was definitely left by drug traffickers, and it's the same group with the hostages. This is a major discovery!" Gong Zhe's tone grew increasingly excited.

To avoid a repeat of the first incident, Xu Poye didn't mention it was a discovery by the Yunhai branch.

Instead, he directly stated that drug traffickers had been found in the cave, giving them the exact location and instructing them to provide support as quickly as possible.

However, this result greatly disappointed Xu Poye.

Extremely disappointed.

The cave was now deserted.

Gong Zhe stared blankly at the walkie-talkie, then turned to his apprentice.

"Director Xu, what's wrong?" Gong Zhe asked, puzzled.

Wasn't this good news?

Exciting news that could boost morale?

"You took so long to get here, do you expect me to give you an award?" Xu Poye's voice came through the walkie-talkie.

"Director Xu, you don't know, this place is incredibly difficult to find," Gong Zhe said with a wry smile.

"Difficult to find?"

Xu Poye was stunned, then his face lit up with rage.

Back at the city bureau, Xu Poye had heard Gong Zhe repeatedly say that Yunhai's problem stemmed from the local anti-drug efforts being lagging behind and the personnel being incompetent.

Occasionally, a decent narcotics officer or a junior trainee could handle it.

Ultimately, it was a local problem, not related to the criminal gangs.

As for Jiang Tian, ​​he was just a lucky, slightly more capable person; his many achievements were simply due to luck.

He was lucky.

But why was he able to find it directly, while you, having given him the location, still took so long?

"Alright, then let me tell you, those hostages and drug dealers have already been arrested and taken to the Municipal Bureau. It was Comrade Xiao Jiang who discovered the hostages, and it was Xiao Jiang and the Yunhai branch who arrested the drug dealers. When they discovered them, I immediately notified you to go and provide support. However, they have already taken the hostages to the Municipal Bureau, the battle is over and they have gone home, and you have only just arrived. Are you still feeling smug?"

Xu Poye roared in fury.

He felt that perhaps he had been too lenient with his men.

When did this situation arise among them?

"What?"

Gong Zhe's head buzzed.

No.

The people have been arrested?

"They're already at the city police station. All the hostages have been successfully rescued. Now you just need to search for the scattered drug dealers." Xu Poye finished speaking and put down the walkie-talkie.

Then his furious expression instantly turned into a smile.

"Comrades, you did a great job! The operation was a complete success. I've applied to the higher-ups for a collective first-class merit award; everyone will receive one." Gao Xiaolong led the applause to welcome the returning team.

Of course, for Jiang Tian, ​​today's operation wasn't stressful at all.

The situation in the cave was resolved quickly and simply.

There was basically no pressure.

"Also, there's one more thing," Gao Xiaolong said, sitting in the main seat.

A mission debriefing meeting was held, but the operation went smoothly and simply, with virtually no significant lessons learned.

"Just now, I spoke with Minister Tan on the phone. Minister Tan believes that our Yunhai City Bureau has undergone significant changes and is very excellent, with outstanding performance in training new recruits. Therefore, headquarters has decided to take advantage of this drug dealer arrest opportunity to involve all of Yunhai's narcotics trainee officers," Gao Xiaolong said.

As soon as Gao Xiaolong's voice rang out, all sound in the room fell silent.

Everyone stared wide-eyed in disbelief.

Even Jiang Tian was utterly astonished.

To involve the narcotics trainees from the past year—that is, Jiang Tian's cohort—in this operation.

"Then, based on performance, the top ten will be selected for early promotion, hoping to quickly cultivate a group of outstanding narcotics officers capable of handling tasks independently," Gao Xiaolong said, tapping the table.

Okay.

This was completely useless to Jiang Tian.

Of course, whatever they were planning was none of Jiang Tian's business.

"Xiao Jiang."

Jiang Tian, ​​who was sitting in the outermost corner of the conference room, quickly stood up upon hearing this. "Sir, please speak."

Gao Xiaolong said, "This mission is assigned to you. You'll be in charge of leading them."

"Me?" Jiang Tian was utterly astonished.

"Who else should I assign it to if not you?" Gao Xiaolong countered.

Jiang Tian nodded blankly and sat down.

Killing drug dealers was fine, but leading newcomers, especially newcomers from the same cohort?

Jiang Tian was completely bewildered.

After everything was finished, it was already past ten o'clock at night.

Jiang Tian walked out of the city police station, looking at the twinkling stars in the sky. In his later years, such a night view was rarely seen.

This meeting lasted about two hours.

It mainly focused on the interrogation of the drug dealers.

As for the hostages, they were released after a brief statement.

But as he was leaving,

Jiang Tian saw a blue Maserati parked outside.

As Jiang Tian approached, the car window rolled down, revealing a mature face.

“Xiao Jiang, Auntie has prepared dinner at home. Your Uncle Mu is already waiting for you. He told me you saved him and killed a lot of drug dealers, and he wants to thank you properly,” Liang Ru said with a smile.

“Inviting a toad like me for a midnight snack?” Jiang Tian asked with a mocking smile.

Liang Ru’s smile gradually turned cold: “Xiao Jiang, I’m giving you a way out because you helped save your Uncle Mu. If you push your luck, you’ll end up with nothing. With my help, you have a bright future, but without my family’s backing, how far can you go? Your father’s position is your only hope.”

In her eyes, Jiang Tian was just Mu Ya’s sycophant.

At most, he was a promising young man, but how many geniuses fall along the way? Was Jiang Tian so certain he wouldn’t die young or get into trouble?

She had already given him face by agreeing to give her a way out.

Jiang Tian, ​​capable yet from a poor family, was already incredibly lucky to have agreed to be with her, yet he still didn't appreciate it. This had gradually cooled Liang Ru's attitude.

Jiang Tian laughed.

This woman thought that agreeing to let Mu Ya be with him was like giving him charity.

But did Jiang Tian need to be a kept man?

"Although you have some ability, I hope you can face reality. You're trying to climb up to our family's standards. I'm giving you this opportunity, so you need to seize it. Only then can you change your destiny. Otherwise, what's the point of working your whole life? You'll still be at the bottom of society," Liang Ru said sarcastically, chin raised.

Just then, before Jiang Tian could say anything...

Beep beep!!!

A car horn sounded, and the next moment, in the darkness, a bright pink Rolls-Royce Phantom with its dazzling, upright gold emblem stopped behind the Maserati.

Then the car window opened, revealing a breathtakingly beautiful face. A beautiful smile graced her face as she looked at Jiang Tian.



Chapter 174 The Cat Becomes the Mouse's Bride, That's Crazy!


"Don't look at that toad. That's a Rolls-Royce, worth millions. How much do you earn a year? Five thousand or ten thousand? You probably couldn't even afford a single wheel in your entire life. Your merits are enough to make me glance at you a little. I hope you won't be ungrateful."

Liang Ru's patience was dwindling.

In her view, her personal presence was already a favor to Jiang Tian, ​​a gesture of respect for him after he rushed in to save Mu Feng.

Giving you face, yet you take it too far, acting like you're something special.

Jiang Tian, ​​in truth, felt helpless.

That's how society is.

While Jiang Tian's merits were numerous, this was due to his future prospects and the leadership's favor. Right now, he was, in the end, just a low-level narcotics officer.

In the eyes of successful people in this society, it was a worthwhile investment, but they maintained their condescending attitude.

A bright future hadn't materialized yet, and it was useless now.

This further solidified Jiang Tian's determination to climb the social ladder. What was he fighting so desperately for? To protect social stability, and even more so, to defy fate.

What did having a bureau chief as a father matter?

If Jiang Tian didn't have the system, his family's fate would have been easily decided, just like in his previous life.

The bureau chief may seem high and mighty, but in many people's eyes, he was no different from an ordinary person.

Even so, Liang Ru couldn't look down on him.

"Little Jiang, I've already given you face. Don't let your youthful pride cause you to miss an opportunity you might never have again in your life," Liang Ru's tone softened slightly.

Like scolding a dog, the alternating relaxation and leniency made Jiang Tian chuckle awkwardly.

Perhaps Liang Ru, lacking the ability to influence the system, didn't understand what his achievements represented.

Did she really think he needed the Mu family?

No.

The Mu family was at most an added bonus for him, while he was a lifeline for the Mu family.

Unfortunately, the old hag didn't understand.

Click!!!

Just as Jiang Tian was about to speak, the Rolls-Royce door suddenly opened.

A pair of high heels stepped out first, followed a moment later by a woman at least 1.75 meters tall, with extremely long legs and flowing hair.

Of course, that wasn't the main point.

The main point was that the moment this woman raised her head, her flawless face was fully revealed.

A cold, aloof demeanor, an imposing aura, like a haughty queen, she looked down at Liang Ru, who had just spoken.

This instantly silenced Liang Ru, who was still arrogantly trying to discipline Jiang Tian like a dog.

Tap tap tap!!!

In the quiet of the night, the police station entrance was brightly lit.

Liang Ru's eyes widened instantly as she looked at the woman's face, and she was immediately startled.

Qin Shiyu.

That's right.

It's her.

How could Liang Ru not recognize her?

Speaking of which, the Mu family is currently on the verge of bankruptcy, struggling to survive. It all started because of her. That foreign businessman used her to swindle all of the Mu family's working capital.

Without investment, it would be a catastrophe for the Mu family, especially at this crucial time in Yunhai when things are very tense and connections are difficult to utilize.

He didn't meet the loan requirements, and Mu Feng couldn't control everything, because in this era, how many people in the real estate industry are ordinary people without powerful connections?

And without a doubt.

Mu Feng's contact with, and even his fawning over, Qin Shiyu wasn't just about solving his immediate crisis; it was also because Qin Shiyu's investment could bring even more terrifying brand recognition to the company later.

For no other reason than that the name Qin Shiyu represented an authority in the investment world.

Qin Shiyu was absolutely a queen-level figure in the financial world.

Mu Feng was kidnapped by drug dealers while discussing investments and conducting on-site inspections with Qin Shiyu in Gaodian Town.

Liang Ru knew all of this.

Although she didn't know Qin Shiyu personally, they had met before.

"Miss Qin?"

Liang Ru gasped.

Although her father-in-law was a high-ranking official, this financial queen—could she be without powerful backing?

And why was this financial queen here?

Liang Ru's mocking expression froze for a moment, then instantly replaced with a fawning one.

She could belittle and belittle Jiang Tian, ​​even calling him worthless, but in front of Qin Shiyu, she had no right to be arrogant.

Wealth, connections—Qin Shiyu was far superior to her.

Most importantly, her family currently needed Qin Shiyu's help.

Her expression almost instantly became obsequious, trying to get closer.

She didn't even have time to think about why Qin Shiyu was there.

But the next moment.

Liang Ru's smile instantly froze.

Because at this very moment.

In her eyes, the queen-like, haughty Qin Shiyu walked to Jiang Tian's side.

Liang Ru's first reaction was, "They know each other?"

Her second reaction was, "Are you crazy? How could they possibly be involved?"

Oh no.

Mu Feng was kidnapped by drug dealers, so Miss Qin must have been kidnapped by them too. Therefore, Miss Qin might just be here to find out what's going on from Jiang Tian.

"I knew it! How could the two of them be involved? Even if you, Jiang Tian, ​​have done more, how could you possibly know someone as high-ranking as Miss Qin?" Liang Ru realized and breathed a sigh of relief.

She was still thinking that she could use Jiang Tian to persuade Miss Qin to invest.

That way, she could somewhat forgive his rudeness today; otherwise, this sycophant would never get Princess Mu Ya.

But before Liang Ru could continue her wild fantasies and calculate how to use Jiang Tian to leverage his favor and get Miss Qin to invest,

the next moment...

Liang Ru's eyes suddenly widened.

Because she saw something.

Liang Ru's mind exploded instantly.

In her eyes...

Miss Qin, this celestial peacock who had walked up to Jiang Tian, ​​should have had no ties to the mortal world.

Yet, she simply...

wrapped her arms around Jiang Tian's.

And what was even more astonishing was that Miss Qin, who usually exuded a haughty queenly aura, stood beside Jiang Tian like a little woman. Wearing high heels and almost as tall as Jiang Tian, ​​she leaned her head slightly on his shoulder.

"Darling, who is this woman?"

Qin Shiyu pointed at Liang Ru, asking Jiang Tian with apparent curiosity.

Buzz!!

Upon hearing this, Qin Shiyu's mind went blank.

Qin Shiyu and Jiang Tian?

One a commoner, the other a peacock in the sky?

How could these two be involved?

Why?

In truth, after the initial shock, Liang Ru was also deeply panicked.

Because this was completely outside her plans.



Chapter 175 A Husband-Protecting Maniac? Jiang Tian was stunned.


Before coming,

Old Master Mu had specifically told Mu Feng and Liang Ru that Jiang Tian's future was unimaginable.

In their family, there was no heir.

Their nephews and such were practically useless, lacking any ability whatsoever.

Among the direct descendants, only the only son, Mu Feng, was still in business, but the business was barely surviving and had no future.

And across three generations, there was only one person left, Mu Ya.

Mu Ya studied journalism and was still unemployed.

It could be said that the Mu family had no successor. Once Old Master Mu retired, the entire Mu family would essentially disappear from the historical stage.

However, Old Master Mu still had a few years left.

If Jiang Tian could marry Mu Ya, with Jiang Tian's abilities, his own merits, and Old Master Mu's help, it would be a powerful combination, directly connecting them.

The Mu family wouldn't need to worry about the future.

Old Master Mu explained the situation clearly, intending for Liang Ru to come and apologize to Jiang Tian, ​​invite him home for dinner, and then reconcile.

However, Liang Ru had her own agenda on the way.

According to Old Master Mu, the Mu family's future would depend on this young man, Jiang Tian?

Instinctively, she already looked down on Jiang Tian. The fact that the Mu family would rely on him in the future made her increasingly angry. A slightly capable policeman—what right did he have?

On the way, she resolved to thoroughly shatter Jiang Tian's arrogance, to make him realize his place, and to teach him a lesson.

"I only agreed because you saved your Uncle Mu."

In her mind, with her daughter's excellence, Jiang Tian was nothing more than her daughter's lapdog. If she agreed, she could easily manipulate him.

But the reality was...

Liang Ru stared blankly at Qin Shiyu, then at Jiang Tian.

This trash—what right did he have?

What right did a lowly policeman have?

Actually, Jiang Tian's mind was racing. He was certain that Qin Shiyu, with her personality, couldn't possibly be the type to fall head over heels in love at first sight—that was utter nonsense.

Then Qin Shiyu must have overheard Liang Ru's hurtful words in the back of the car.

Given Qin Shiyu's intelligence, even if she didn't know what had happened, she was willing to stand up for him at this moment. No matter what, Jiang Tian couldn't expose her.

"Honey, I ordered some late-night snacks. Let's go get some together," Qin Shiyu said again.

Jiang Tian nodded naturally, "In that case, let's go."

After saying that, Qin Shiyu pulled Jiang Tian to get into the car.

At this moment, Liang Ru finally came to her senses.

"No, you can't leave!" Liang Ru suddenly shouted, blocking Jiang Tian's path, pointing at him angrily.

Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes slightly. Out of respect for Elder Mu, he hadn't argued with this old hag, repeatedly tolerating her. However, if she continued to push her luck, Jiang Tian's patience wouldn't last forever.

"Jiang Tian, ​​you're two-timing me! How can you be so immoral? Do you have any respect for discipline?" Liang Ru loudly accused Jiang Tian.

They couldn't let Jiang Tian leave.

Liang Ru knew.

If they let Jiang Tian leave, it would truly be the end for them.

Although Mu Ya was outstanding, compared to Qin Shiyu, she was utterly outclassed.

In terms of appearance, Mu Ya wasn't lacking, but at a certain level, looks really don't differ much; it's more about figure and temperament.

In this aspect, Mu Ya was no match for Qin Shiyu.

The investment queen of Financial Street.

A mysterious background and identity.

She was completely outclassed in every way!

“What a joke! Today when I went to your house, you kept saying I was a toad trying to eat swan meat, dreaming, that I should never have anything to do with your daughter. Fine, I give up, I won't pursue your daughter anymore, okay? There was nothing between us to begin with. What, just because I know your daughter, I can't even find a girlfriend?”

Jiang Tian's face was icy, his face full of cold mockery as he spoke to Liang Ru.

And at this moment.

Qin Shiyu finally understood what had happened.

Jiang Tian met his girlfriend's parents, and then she didn't like him?

She didn't like Jiang Tian? Was Jiang Tian a toad?

Although Qin Shiyu and Jiang Tian first met in the cave, Qin Shiyu immediately had Jiang Tian investigated afterward.

If drug dealers knew Jiang Tian's information, how much more so would Qin Shiyu, with her background and influence? After learning everything about Jiang Tian in just three minutes, Qin Shiyu was utterly astonished.

He was practically a great hero!

He had killed hundreds of drug dealers, setting a historical precedent, and was even slated for a special merit award.

That's right, Qin Shiyu even knew that the special merit award application was still pending.

Because of this, she couldn't wait to meet Jiang Tian and discuss the situation in Yunhai.

She also wanted to express her gratitude to Jiang Tian in person, because after learning about how she was rescued that day, Qin Shiyu understood that without Jiang Tian, ​​she might have truly perished.

The existence of such an outstanding young man in the world completely captivated Qin Shiyu's attention and piqued her curiosity.

She was eager to learn more about Jiang Tian.

Upon arrival, Qin Shiyu witnessed the scene before her. Initially, she thought Jiang Tian was being looked down upon by the wealthy, which infuriated her. "How dare you, a businessman, look down on a hero who protects the people?" she thought.

But after hearing Jiang Tian's words, Qin Shiyu understood.

This was even more outrageous than she had imagined. "Jiang Tian, ​​who's currently under review for a historic special merit award, is a toad?" she thought.

"Even without that, judging from how decisively he dealt with the drug dealers today, he's not a toad!" she exclaimed.

"More importantly, he already has several first-class merit awards.

He's eliminated hundreds of drug dealers and seized countless drugs. This anti-drug hero, in your eyes, is just a toad?" she asked.

"Such an outstanding man, in your eyes, is worthless, unworthy of your daughter?"

Qin Shiyu was utterly incredulous, pointing at Liang Ru and saying, "What are you? How dare you call my husband a toad?"

"Your husband?" Liang Ru was speechless.

"Wait, things are progressing this fast?"

"I just scolded you this afternoon, telling you and Mu Ya to be ruined, and tonight you're hooking up with Miss Qin, the financial queen, and so intimately?"

"I'm stunned."

"The next moment.

*Slap!!*

Qin Shiyu went up and slapped Liang Ru across the face.

"No matter what her background is, in front of Qin Shiyu, she's nothing at all."

"My husband is a drug-fighting hero who has taken down hundreds of drug dealers and received multiple first-class merit awards. What makes you think he's a toad?" Qin Shiyu said coldly.

Good heavens.

Absolutely good heavens.

Jiang Tian scratched his head and silently withdrew his raised hand.

Qin Shiyu's hand was even faster than his.

He hesitated for a moment, and Qin Shiyu actually delivered the slap for him.



Chapter 176 Class Reunion, Dazzling the Entire Audience


"I'll beat you every time I see you from now on, honey, let's go." Qin Shiyu pulled Jiang Tian and opened the Rolls-Royce door.

Jiang Tian didn't say anything, mainly because he was curious about Qin Shiyu's actions today. Why was she helping him?

Although he didn't need her help.

Just as Jiang Tian was about to get in, Qin Shiyu asked him suspiciously, "Honey, you're not going to make me drive, are you?"

What was this woman up to?

Jiang Tian frowned, completely confused about Qin Shiyu's intentions.

However, Jiang Tian still opened the car door and sat in the driver's seat.

To be honest, this was the first time Jiang Tian had ever driven a Rolls-Royce, in both his past and present lives. The luxurious feeling was completely different, even just getting in was different.

Damn this capitalist indulgence!

Jiang Tian cursed it several times in his heart, but then he thought that he would soon have one too, oh well, never mind.

“Aunt Liang, I think what you said this afternoon was very right. Someone like me, a nobody, shouldn't dream of climbing the social ladder. As for Mu Ya, I think I should listen to you. See you again sometime.” Jiang Tian rolled down his window, waved to Liang Ru, and drove off in his pink Rolls-Royce.

Leaving Liang Ru standing there, watching the taillights, her face extremely pale.

“How could this be? This nobody, how could he?” Liang Ru kept muttering to herself.

Her head was still buzzing.

What was so great about this nobody? Why would a woman like Qin Shiyu be interested in him?

“Right, what about Mu Ya?”

Suddenly, after snapping back to reality, Liang Ru remembered that now that Jiang Tian had a new lover, what about Mu Ya?

And what about Old Master Mu's instructions?

What about Old Master Mu's plan?

Liang Ru's heart skipped a beat, and she panicked instantly.

Everything was going well. If it weren't for what happened that afternoon, Mu Ya and Jiang Tian would have happily married—a perfect match.

But now?

Mu Ya's favorite boyfriend is gone, the young man most favored by Old Master Mu.

Furthermore, this promising young man has multiple first-class merit awards, representing limitless potential, even surpassing Old Master Mu is entirely possible.

Now, she's ruined it all.

*Slap!*

Liang Ru slapped herself.

Her heart was bleeding with regret. She couldn't understand why she had acted so foolishly that afternoon, insisting on humiliating him.

But unfortunately, Jiang Tian didn't witness this side of Liang Ru; otherwise, he would have been overjoyed.

"What do you want?"

In the car, which had been silent since it started moving, Jiang Tian turned to Qin Shiyu and asked calmly.

He was very rational. He didn't believe in love at first sight with ordinary women, let alone a woman like Qin Shiyu. To mistake a woman who owned a top-ranked investment company for a naive and innocent girl would be truly foolish.

After getting into the car, Jiang Tian closed the window and got straight to the point.

Qin Shiyu's expression was full of admiration as she said, "As expected of Officer Jiang. I just wanted to treat you to dinner to thank you, but I didn't expect to encounter such an infuriating situation. I couldn't stand it and said a few words. Officer Jiang won't be angry with me, will he?"

"It's alright, I'm sorry you had to see this." Jiang Tian gave a wry smile.

“No, you're a hero. They look down on you because they're blind, not because of you,” Qin Shiyu explained.

Jiang Tian smiled slightly, not continuing, because his phone rang. He pulled the car over to the side of the road, took out his phone, and glanced at it.

When he saw the caller ID, Jiang Tian's expression turned slightly surprised.

Nothing more.

Because the name was... Fang Jie.

Fang Jie was Jiang Tian's childhood friend. When Jiang Tian was down on his luck, he often went out drinking with him. Later, when Jiang Tian faced difficulties, Fang Jie often helped him.

Although Fang Jie himself was also in a bad situation—he found a wife, but the child wasn't his; his wife ran off with someone else, leaving him with the child, whom he had developed feelings for and couldn't bear to abandon.

Then his wife went to live with someone else, leaving him to raise the child.

Overall, his situation was only slightly better than Jiang Tian's.

The two had always had a good relationship because they had been classmates since elementary school, continuing into high school and even university, maintaining frequent contact.

Jiang Tian even noticed a string of exclamation marks on his phone, scrolling through them to find that Fang Jie had called him seven times.

However, Jiang Tian usually handed in his phone for safekeeping when on missions; he didn't carry it with him.

"Jie, is something wrong?" Jiang Tian's tone softened.

"Damn it, I called you so many times, and you finally answered! What the hell were you doing? You didn't answer so many calls; I almost thought something had happened to you!" Fang Jie's phone rang urgently.

Hearing the familiar, energetic, and spirited voice, Jiang Tian felt a sense of unfamiliarity and awkwardness, because the Fang Jie of the future always used that aged and decaying voice, filled with sighs and helplessness.

"Didn't you see the message in our class group? It's a get-together today! Everyone's out doing internships, so we're all getting together. We just finished dinner at the hotel," Fang Jie said hurriedly.

Jiang Tian opened his phone and went into the class group chat. Sure enough, it was full of messages from over 99 people.

They'd been talking about it since yesterday, but Jiang Tian was too busy with his tasks to have time to read the chat.

Jiang Tian turned to look at Qin Shiyu, then replied expressionlessly, "No time, not going."

He had absolutely no interest in these social interactions.

Even in his previous life, he hadn't been interested in hearing about it.

"Emperor KTV! Aren't you coming? You love singing, don't you? It's the most luxurious KTV in all of Yunhai," Fang Jie said anxiously.

Huh?

"Emperor KTV?" Jiang Tian remained unmoved: "No."

"Let's go for a walk together, I'm free now," Qin Shiyu said, eager to learn more about Jiang Tian.

She was very curious about him.

"Are you going?" Jiang Tian asked.

"Yes," Qin Shiyu nodded.

"Fine, let's go then." Jiang Tian nodded slightly. He'd been under a lot of pressure lately; singing would help him relax.

"Okay, wait for me." Jiang Tian hung up the phone.

It was almost 11 PM. When Jiang Tian arrived at Emperor KTV, the parking lot was nearly full; business was booming.

Qin Shiyu was even holding onto Jiang Tian's arm.

As Qin Shiyu walked along, her demeanor and appearance attracted countless admiring glances.

Qin Shiyu seemed quite used to it.

“Here, Jiang Tian is here.”

Just then, Fang Jie stood in the hall, waving to Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian turned his head and saw Fang Jie. More than ten years had passed, and even the younger Fang Jie's demeanor was different.

Most importantly, Fang Jie was accompanied by a girl.

“Hahaha, come here, Jiang Tian, ​​let me introduce you to my girlfriend. We're getting engaged soon!”

Fang Jie ran to Jiang Tian's side, excitedly introducing the heavily made-up woman beside him.

“Brother, I'm no longer single. This is Lili, my girlfriend. What do you think? Pretty, right?” Fang Jie boasted.

Jiang Tian's brow twitched, and his eyes involuntarily drifted to Lili's stomach.

If he remembered correctly, this woman was already pregnant when she first met Fang Jie, so she couldn't wait to find him to be her "babysitter."

Fang Jie even mentioned later, during a drinking session, that he only found out after the divorce that Lili used to be a prostitute.

Indeed, her "buffs" were stacked to the max.

"Beautiful, beautiful, congratulations." Jiang Tian's lips twitched.

"Come on, let's go upstairs. By the way, that bastard Zhao Kai is here too. He seems to know people at this Emperor KTV. Be careful." Fang Jie whispered to Jiang Tian.

"It's okay, so many years have passed." Jiang Tian shook his head.

The past is like the wind. For these people, it's only been three and a half years, but for Jiang Tian, ​​it's been twenty years, a lifetime.

"That's good. Hey, who are you, beautiful lady?"

Fang Jie was too engrossed in the conversation to notice Qin Shiyu. Only after catching up with Jiang Tian and trying to lead him to a private room did he realize that Jiang Tian seemed to be accompanied by a woman.

He couldn't help but rub his eyes.

Hiss!!!

Exquisite features, a perfect figure, a stylish suit paired with leather boots—this, damn, is she a fairy?

“I’m Jiang Tian’s girlfriend,” Qin Shiyu said, giving Jiang Tian plenty of face.

“Pfft!!!”

“Holy crap!!”

“With such a beautiful girlfriend, are you out of your mind?”



Chapter 177 You've gotten better at being an idiot?


The moment Fang Jie turned around, he was stunned, bewildered. Could there really be such a beautiful and elegant woman in the world?

And with such a great figure.

Such a beautiful woman.

You say she's your girlfriend?

Are you out of your mind?

Fang Jie's eyes widened, staring at Jiang Tian in shock.

He remembered showing off his girlfriend Lili to Jiang Tian earlier, and now, looking at Lili again, Fang Jie blushed.

Wait a minute.

Wait a minute.

Where's Wang Yifei?

Actually, Fang Jie and Jiang Tian grew up together. Fang Jie knew Jiang Tian too well and understood this seemingly reserved guy's long-standing crush on Wang Yifei.

Fang Jie saw through her from the start—that woman was a green tea bitch—but Jiang Tian wouldn't listen to anyone's advice back then.

Now he's come to his senses. Back then, Fang Jie was worried about Jiang Tian, ​​but now, wow, he's completely changed. "I advised you to stay away from Wang Yifei, not to find such a beautiful girlfriend!"

There's a saying: "I'm afraid my brother is suffering, but I'm also afraid my brother is driving a Land Rover." That's Fang Jie's mentality.

His mentality has collapsed.

Jiang Tian, ​​on the other hand, raised an eyebrow. It has to be said, the considerate Qin Shiyu gave Jiang Tian plenty of psychological satisfaction.

She satisfied all his desire to show off. Just standing there, Jiang Tian felt he'd gained enough face.

"I'm face-blind. What's this about pretty or not? To me, don't all women look the same?" Jiang Tian said calmly.

Holy crap.

Fang Jie's eyes widened: "You're getting all cocky just because I called you fat."

He didn't say that when he was pursuing Wang Yifei. Now he's found such a stunning beauty and he's telling his brothers this?

Fang Jie gritted his teeth.

Qin Shiyu rolled her eyes, subtly pinching Jiang Tian's soft flesh, but Jiang Tian felt nothing.

"That idiot Zhao Kai drove over in a BMW to show off, even calling the owner of Emperor KTV to give us our private room a free meal. He's been acting all high and mighty. When his wife shows up, he'll be slapped in the face." Fang Jie led the way excitedly.

Zhao Kai.

To be honest, if Fang Jie hadn't brought him up, he would have almost forgotten about him at this gathering.

Because of what happened in his past life, Jiang Tian had almost lost contact with all his high school classmates, except for Fang Jie.

As for Zhao Kai, if Jiang Tian remembered correctly, Fang Jie had mentioned him once while drinking, saying he'd been imprisoned for several years for some offense.

He wondered if Zhao Kai was still at large.

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile as he followed behind Fang Jie with Qin Shiyu.

As for Lili, Jiang Tian glanced at her, nodded briefly, and then ignored her completely.

But Lili seemed quite interested in Jiang Tian, ​​frequently turning back to try and strike up a conversation, though Jiang Tian mostly remained silent.

This left Lili visibly disappointed.

So, as Jiang Tian followed behind, looking at the back of Fang Jie's head, he felt a chill run down his spine.

But soon, Jiang Tian thought of his past life, and his mood became somewhat withdrawn.

Click!

Just then, they reached the second floor and walked to the door of a private room. Fang Jie opened the door.

No one was singing inside, but there was a lively chattering noise.

As soon as Fang Jie opened the door, everyone's eyes were drawn to the entrance.

"Where's Jiang Tian? Hahaha, where's Jiang Tian? Is he too ashamed to show his face because he's doing so poorly?" An untimely voice rang out from the crowd.

"Zhao Kai, shut up if you can't talk nonsense," Fang Jie said grimly.

Whoosh!!!

There were over twenty people in the private room. Actually, everyone had agreed to get together three and a half years later to catch up and reconnect.

Almost all the classmates from Yunhai were there.

Twelve men and ten women. The room was quite large. Among the men, a man with a slicked-back hairstyle, wearing a suit and glasses, stood out. He looked refined, but his face was now contorted with rage.

Especially after hearing Fang Jie's words, he instantly stood up: "Fang Jie, are you fucking courting death?"

"Fang Jie, hurry up and apologize to Zhao Kai."

Just then, a female classmate stepped forward, quickly winking at Fang Jie while glancing at a young man sitting next to Zhao Kai.

Fang Jie frowned. The person who spoke was Wang Cuifang, their former class monitor, a very warm and generous person who often helped classmates during their school days.

"We're all classmates, never mind, never mind. Fang Jie, come over here. Where's Jiang Tian? Did he come with us?"

As Wang Cuifang stepped forward, the academic representative, Li Zhi, dressed somewhat flamboyantly, also stepped in to smooth things over.

But at this moment, Zhao Kai stood there, his face still grim.

His gaze was fierce as he stared at Fang Jie.

This made Fang Jie swallow hard. It wasn't that Fang Jie was cowardly; it was just that back in school, everyone in the class had been saying that Zhao Kai's family had a shady background.

He even knew quite a few petty thugs outside of school.

Now it's even more outrageous. Emperor KTV! This is a very famous and influential KTV in Yunhai, where land is incredibly valuable.

It's said the owner is extremely powerful and well-connected.

Zhao Kai even managed to get the minor owner of Emperor KTV involved. How could Fang Jie not break out in a cold sweat?

Silence.

The atmosphere became slightly tense.

The young man next to Zhao Kai stood up, picked up a glass of wine, and walked over to Fang Jie.

Splash! Splash!

The wine spilled over Fang Jie's head.

"Hahaha, don't be scared, I'm not going to eat you, am I? Just kidding, you won't be angry, will you?" The young man's gloomy expression instantly turned into a loud laugh, perfectly illustrating what it means to be capricious.

"Even Young Master Deng said it's fine, so I'll just take what you just said as a fart, hahaha." Seeing the young man speak, Zhao Kai's expression also instantly brightened, and he laughed.

He completely took Fang Jie's actions as a joke.

"By the way, did that little simp Jiang Tian finally arrive?" Zhao Kai walked up to Fang Jie and patted his face.

Fang Jie's face was covered in what looked like either alcohol or cold sweat, and he seemed somewhat dazed.

"Oh, here he is! Why are you standing at the door?" Zhao Kai suddenly pointed with both hands at Jiang Tian's face, which was only visible through the crack in the doorway, and said excitedly.

"A good dog doesn't block the way, you idiot, get out of the way." Zhao Kai directly pulled Fang Jie aside.

And at that moment.

The view finally became completely clear.

Jiang Tian stood expressionless at the door, with a stunningly beautiful woman beside him.

Hiss!!!

The moment he saw the beautiful woman,

Jiang Tian was practically ignored.

"Have you seen enough?" Jiang Tian cracked his neck and smiled.

Zhao Kai, his face full of exaggeration, exclaimed, "Damn, you idiot, you've finally gotten better! You've found such a beautiful girlfriend?"

These words also jolted Deng Shao, who was standing next to Zhao Kai. At that moment, the young master of Emperor KTV, Deng Shao's eyes were practically bulging out of their sockets.

After waking up, he quickly wiped his mouth.



Chapter 178 Trying to show off in front of Qin Shiyu? You're not qualified.


"My God, Jiang Tian, ​​is this your girlfriend?"

"My goodness, she's so beautiful?"

"Are you crazy?"

"Where did you find her?"

The classmates erupted in an uproar.

Wang Cuifang and Li Zhi ran up to Jiang Tian, ​​exclaiming repeatedly.

Jiang Tian's smile remained unchanged, but it grew increasingly cold.

Jiang Tian didn't know much about this class monitor. He'd heard Fang Jie mention that Wang Cuifang seemed to be planning to move to Dongjiang.

With Jiang Tian's words,

the atmosphere instantly froze.

No one insulted you. Come in and have a drink. It's been years! Jiang Tian, ​​you've grown handsome!"

Actually, everyone sensed something was wrong. They knew Jiang Tian and Fang Jie were close, so was this revenge for Fang Jie?

But...

This was insane.

They couldn't understand how Jiang Tian dared to do this.

It has to be said...

This was the situation over two thousand years ago.

Compared to later generations, this era had far more diverse customs.

For example, someone might know a powerful gangster from their school days.

Or someone might be involved in organized crime.

These things occasionally existed in later generations, but in this era, they were far more prevalent.

Back in school, Jiang Tian and Zhao Kai had some conflicts, but with the school and teachers around, nothing serious happened.

Now, however, he had completely let loose.

Of course, Zhao Kai was unfazed, but Jiang Tian's gaze lingered on Deng Shao.

Putting everything else aside, with Jiang Tian's experience in drug enforcement, he sniffed and detected a strong, pungent odor of meth.

"I said, 'What's wrong with that stinky idiot? You have a problem with that?' Zhao Kai mocked.

"Don't confront them head-on, just admit your mistake."

"Yeah, Jiang Tian, ​​don't be impulsive."

"Brother Jiang, just bear with it."

Even Fang Jie tugged at Jiang Tian's sleeve, trying to dissuade him.

The main problem was that ordinary people like Fang Jie were filled with fear of a big shot who had risen through the ranks in a first-tier city.

Ultimately, it stemmed from a lack of experience.

“Kid, drink this glass of wine, apologize to Zhao Kai, and let's call it a day, okay?” Deng Shao said, holding a glass of wine horizontally in front of Jiang Tian.

“I can’t drink,” Jiang Tian asked.

Finally, Deng Shao revealed his true colors, saying, "You don't have any connections, so you can have your girlfriend drink for you, right? You won't even give me that much face?"

*Buzz!*

The moment those words were spoken, the room fell silent.

Deng Shao.

This was Deng Shao, the small-time owner of Emperor KTV! He was a real figure in the underworld, someone with real power and influence!

How dare you?

After repeated requests, Deng Shao reluctantly came to support his underling.

He hadn't even been interested in this small classmate reunion until he saw a woman as beautiful as an angel.

Deng Shao was utterly bewildered. Could there really be such a beautiful woman in the world?

He had only one thought in his mind: he would get this woman by any means necessary.

In this world, he's never failed to get any woman he desires.

An ordinary person is no challenge for him with just a little manipulation; in fact, he could probably scare such an ordinary person to their knees with his mere words.

But now, Deng Shao simply couldn't believe it.

What did this person say?

What was he saying?

Zhao Kai was even more dumbfounded.

Daring to offend Deng Shao was practically a death sentence.

And the next moment...

"If you don't apologize, you're asking for trouble!"

"The owner of Emperor KTV, what else do you want?"

These classmates all stood up to persuade Jiang Tian.

They all chimed in with their opinions.

What made Jiang Tian more relieved was that Fang Jie stood behind him at this moment, silent, clearly waiting for his reaction.

Putting everything else aside, although he had been a bit cowardly just now, he didn't lack the courage to be impulsive when he was with him.

He was actually short of manpower, or rather, he was short of backup. If the conditions were right, Jiang Tian felt that bringing Fang Jie in to team up with Zhao Wei would make for a perfect duo.

he saw Deng Shao's condescending and mocking gaze.

And there was Zhao Kai's gloating expression.

And many classmates, some making sarcastic remarks, some mocking Jiang Tian, ​​and some simply watching the spectacle.

Chapter 179: Deng Shao was crippled, and the entire audience was stunned.


Huh?

Silence!!!

Deathly silence.

*Thud!!!*

A gangster?

A criminal organization?

A ruthless family?

The small business owner of Emperor KTV?

"So, you can kill people so easily?"

"You need to know one thing: gambling, prostitution, and drugs are inseparable. "Deng Shao reeked of icy odor; Jiang Tian smelled it as soon as he entered the room."

How could he be so ruthless?

Too ruthless.

This is Young Master Deng!

Chapter 180 Deciding how to die in three minutes? How arrogant!

"Call my dad! Call my dad right now! Have him bring some men! I'm going to kill this bastard!"

"Hiss!!!"

As he spoke, Deng Shao gasped, his eyes bloodshot with a ferocious glint as he glared at Jiang Tian, ​​saying, "You bastard, today you either kill me, or I'll kill you."

"Call for help?" Jiang Tian scratched his head and grinned.

"Good-for-nothing, you don't want to call for help too, do you? Call them over and let's see who's better." Zhao Kai, holding his phone, also grimaced in pain and mocked.

Jiang Tian licked his lips.

Standing behind Jiang Tian, ​​Qin Shiyu's eyes grew increasingly bright, gazing at his retreating figure with dazzling light.

It has to be said, Qin Shiyu was growing more and more impressed with Jiang Tian.

Especially the ruthless way he acted.

This left a deep impression on Qin Shiyu. Most importantly, she noticed the scent emanating from Jiang Tian. Previously, she had always felt disgusted by men.

They were either pungent or wore perfume that made her want to vomit.

Plus, she had a severe case of mysophobia, and was averse to contact with everyone, even her parents.

Because of this, she rarely interacted with men. But now, smelling Jiang Tian's scent, there were none of those strange odors. Instead, he possessed a strange, incredibly attractive, yet indescribable fragrance.

A very, very refreshing scent.

Therefore, she felt absolutely no aversion to being with Jiang Tian.

"Honey, what do we do? They've called for backup." Qin Shiyu spoke softly, her face cool and aloof.

But Jiang Tian knew this woman was a complete drama queen. She was an extremely cold and arrogant woman, and Jiang Tian grew increasingly wary, wanting to know what she was up to.

Jiang Tian crouched down.

*Slap! Slap!*

He grabbed Deng Shao's hair and slapped him twice across the face.

The body camera on his chest clearly recorded the entire incident.

It could be said that Deng Shaofeng's initial attack,

and the subsequent discovery of the heroin,

were irrefutable evidence.

Moreover, Jiang Tian had a feeling there was a big fish involved. Based on his experience as a seasoned criminal investigator, there was definitely a big fish behind it all.

No matter what, who would complain about having too much credit?

"Come on, call for backup," Jiang Tian said.

"Holy crap!"

"You son of a bitch, you're practically asking for death! How dare you insult Young Master Deng like that!"

Zhao Kai's eyes widened, and he gasped frantically. This was Young Master Deng! This was Young Master Deng!

How dare you, you little brat!

Even if you've got a death wish, you can't do something like this!

Zhao Kai's scalp tingled. His family was a bunch of thugs, but they were nothing special. In front of Young Master Deng, they were practically treated like dogs.

The only reason he could call Young Master Deng to back him up was because Young Master Deng was free and in a good mood today.

It turned out that Deng Shao was actually here.

Even more terrifying was that he had been beaten up by his own classmate.

Zhao Kai didn't dare to think any further.

With trembling hands, he dialed Deng Shao's father's number.

He had the number saved, and a calm voice answered.

Zhao Kai, naturally, didn't dare to delay and quickly recounted what had happened.

"Okay, I understand. Your classmate, right? Alright, tell him to think about how he wants to die. Give him three minutes to consider. I'll be there in three minutes. Also, before then, no one is allowed to leave that private room."

The voice fell silent, and the call ended.

But Zhao Kai knew that his father had arrived.

Not only had he arrived.

Jiang Tian's fate was sealed.

Buzz!!!

Zhao Kai's phone had been on speakerphone.

Everyone in the room fell into an instant, a deathly silence.

Everyone's gaze turned to Zhao Kai in terror, then to the wretched Deng Shao.

Everyone trembled uncontrollably.

"Jiang Tian, ​​look at the mess you've made! You're asking for death, why drag us all down with you?" Li Zhi roared at Jiang Tian.

"Yeah, Jiang Tian, ​​you've dragged us all down with you!"

"We're doomed! We heard Boss Zhao used to be a ruthless killer, he's killed countless people. Jiang Tian, ​​you've ruined us!"

"Jiang Tian, ​​kneel down and apologize to Deng Shao right now, otherwise... otherwise..."

Whoosh!!!

The next moment.

Jiang Tian remained expressionless, but his eyes burned with murderous intent as he looked at them.

In truth, Jiang Tian changed after killing the drug dealer. His demeanor and everything else changed. After killing, he naturally possessed a terrifying aura.

An aura that instilled subconscious fear in his kind.

Besides, Jiang Tian had killed so many drug dealers.

Just looking at that scene, it was truly something no ordinary person could bear.

“What are you going to do? Are you going to hit us again?”

“You’re asking for it. Can’t you stop dragging us down with you?”

“Yeah, Jiang Tian, ​​you were too impulsive today. Young Master Deng didn’t do anything, yet you hit him so hard. Do you have any humanity?”

Li Zhi accused Jiang Tian.

But that last sentence only made Jiang Tian laugh awkwardly.

Didn’t do anything?

He’s already stabbed him with a butterfly knife. What, does he have to stand still to be considered human?

Jiang Tian was truly impressed by his blatant lying.

“Come on, let me stab you. Didn’t you say a few stabs with a butterfly knife are nothing?” Jiang Tian picked up the butterfly knife and charged at Li Zhi.

“Don’t come any closer, you madman, don’t come any closer.”

Thump!!!

Li Zhi sat down on the ground with a thud.

Swish!!!

Jiang Tian's knife stopped precisely at Li Zhi's throat, the tip barely touching the skin.

A drop of blood trickled down his neck.

Li Zhi trembled with fear.

Especially after Jiang Tian caught a whiff of a foul odor, he couldn't help but look down, only to see a wet patch beneath Li Zhi's buttocks.

Has he wet himself in fear?

Jiang Tian released his grip, the butterfly knife falling to the ground. He then slapped Li Zhi across the face, saying, "I was being polite to you, but you've taken advantage of my kindness. If you're so eager to lick my boots, why are you even working? You'd be rich as a gigolo by now."

Jiang Tian sneered.

He hadn't initially intended to engage.

But these people were really pushing their luck.

They were ungrateful.



Chapter 181 The Boss Arrives, The Boss Kneels


“You madman, you madman! You’re dead! You’ve caused a huge disaster! You’ve improved your skills a bit, but what good are they? When Boss Deng gets here, we’ll see how you die!” Li Zhi clenched his fists, his eyes filled with resentment as he glared at Jiang Tian.

He was even impatient to see how Jiang Tian would die.

No sooner said than done.

Thump, thump, thump!

Just then, a series of hurried footsteps echoed down the corridor.

They paused only briefly at the door of the private room.

Then a dark figure took over the doorway, burly and with fierce eyes, blocking the entrance and indifferently surveying the scene inside.

“Uncle Deng!” Zhao Kai, enduring the pain, limped to the burly man’s side and hurriedly greeted him respectfully.

“Where’s Shaofeng?” Boss Deng looked around but couldn’t find his son.

"There, there."

Zhao Kai pointed to the ground, to Deng Shaofeng, who was almost unrecognizable.

One leg was bent in a bizarre position.

His face was a bloody mess; no wonder he wasn't recognized. He was beaten beyond recognition, lying on the ground convulsing. Upon seeing Deng Laoda, he excitedly shouted in a hoarse, trembling voice, "Kill him! Dad, kill him! Kill him!"

Hiss!!!

Deng Laoda's eyes widened.

Shaofeng?

This was his son?

"Who did this?" Deng Laoda roared, his face flushed red.

He'd gone mad.

For Boss Deng, his only son, Deng Shaofeng, was someone he'd had in his thirties, whom he doted on like a precious darling.

Even a minor fall would cause Boss Deng days of heartache.

He'd been spoiled like this since childhood.

It was more important than his own lifeblood.

Seeing Deng Shaofeng in this state...

Boss Deng went berserk: "Who is it? Step forward!"

*Swish!!!*

As he spoke, he suddenly pulled a large machete from behind his back.

He strode over to the nearest man, Li Zhi, and, with a large knife to Li Zhi's neck, roared with bloodshot eyes, "It's you?"

Li Zhi's legs went weak, and he frantically shook his head, "No, it's him, it's Jiang Tian, ​​Boss Deng! This beast is too arrogant! We all tried to stop him, but in the end, he beat us all up. Look, my face is still swollen! Boss Deng, if you want to do something, kill him! It has nothing to do with me!"

Bang!!!

Boss Deng kicked Li Zhi to the ground and looked at Jiang Tian with his large knife.

Meanwhile, Jiang Tian and Qin Shiyu were sitting on the sofa.

Actually, Jiang Tian hadn't paid any attention to Boss Deng at all. Instead, he was watching the man behind Boss Deng as he entered.

Behind him, seven or eight more henchmen poured in, two of them carrying black leather suitcases filled with unknown items.

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile.

"Jiang Tian, ​​you piece of trash! Hurry up and kneel down to kowtow to Young Master Deng and apologize! If you want to die, don't drag us down with you!" Li Zhi shouted angrily.

"Heh, he's courting death and dragging others down with him. Jiang Tian, ​​if you have any sense, hurry up and kneel down to kowtow to Young Master Deng and beg for his forgiveness," Zhao Kai pointed at Jiang Tian and said.

Wang Cuifang, worried, approached Jiang Tian, ​​swallowed hard, and whispered, "Why don't you just lower your head and admit your mistake? Otherwise, these people might really kill you."

Deng, holding a large machete, looked down at Jiang Tian, ​​a mocking smile on his face.

He seemed to be waiting for Jiang Tian's answer.

Qin Shiyu, seemingly oblivious, leaned against Jiang Tian, ​​her eyes sparkling as she stared at him, curious about his next choice.

"Squad Leader Wang, out of all these classmates, you're the only one with a bit of kindness," Jiang Tian patted Wang Cuifang's shoulder and laughed.

"When did you start laughing? Are you afraid Deng will kill you?" Wang Cuifang was dumbfounded. What kind of person was this?

This guy was a real gangster, someone with blood on his hands.

He had a formidable reputation in Yunhai.

But to be honest, Jiang Tian, ​​though filled with mixed emotions, raised his voice, "I don't believe it. This is a society governed by law. How can he be above the law?"

"Pfft, hahaha!!!"

"This idiot."

"Damn, hahaha, can you really run into such a top-tier idiot?"

The henchmen following Boss Deng burst into laughter.

Boss Deng, a cold smile on his face, approached Jiang Tian.

He raised his large machete, and in the next moment, brought it down mercilessly on Jiang Tian.

He aimed for the head, going straight for the kill.

When the blade struck, Jiang Tian was certain that an ordinary person would have their head split open.

He was truly aiming to kill.

Jiang Tian's eyes flashed.

The scene fell even more silent; everyone held their breath.

Even Zhao Kai instinctively turned his head, unable to bear watching what was about to happen.

Wang Cuifang's pupils contracted as she raised her hand: "No!"

It's over.

Fang Jie, standing beside Jiang Tian, ​​felt a chill run down his spine, his head buzzing. Just as he was about to rush forward,

Bang!!!

A deafening gunshot rang out.

The next moment.

Thud!!!

The sound of a bullet piercing flesh was so clear in the silence.

Everyone was too afraid to watch the horrific scene of Jiang Tian's head being cleaved open.

They were stunned.

Completely dumbfounded.

When they heard that terrifying, deafening sound, everyone was stunned.

Their eyes trembled as they looked at Jiang Tian.

And when they saw what appeared, their heads exploded.

What did they see?

What they saw.

Jiang Tian was holding a black object.

Upon closer inspection, the black muzzle was hissing and emitting smoke.

Less than half a meter away from him, Boss Deng's large knife clattered to the ground, and he stared at Jiang Tian with utter bewilderment.

Yes, Boss Deng was bewildered too.

How dare he?

How dare this person?

This is in broad daylight! In broad daylight, he openly brandished a gun.

Wait a minute, is the question whether he dared or not? The question is, why does this person have a gun?

A desperado?

His son has provoked a desperado?

In an instant, countless thoughts flashed through Boss Deng's mind.

And so did everyone else in the room.

Wang Cuifang, who was closest, stared at Jiang Tian with completely blank eyes.

Li Zhi, sitting further away, was unable to stand up.

Pointing at Jiang Tian, ​​his finger trembled, and he couldn't speak for a long time.

As for Zhao Kai,

his face was blank.

Was this still the same introverted boy from school, who would shyly smile and not care when called a good-for-nothing?

How could he have changed so much in three and a half years?

He was very confused.

It felt like a dream.

Whoa!!!

A moment later, the private room erupted in chaos.
